Awesome!
rating 2.0. not what i was expecting well it was really underwhelming and half empty box

rating 3.0. Interesting taste of Japan.  Culture guide makes it more interesting too. My daughter in law lived in Japan during her senior year of high school.  I sent a box to my son and family to give them an idea of what it must have been like to live in Japan as she did.  The kids (aged from9-15)  had variable reviews regarding the taste of the foods.  But the culture guide was interesting to read.  I will probably cancel the subscription but it was an interesting dive into Japanese food culture.
rating 5.0. Loved it! Shipped from Japan, was certainly a treat for me and my girlfriend!

rating 1.0. Good Gift Idea, Not worth the money Great packaging and a great gifting idea, but the snack that it comes in are a joke. You can buy most if not all these candy at a local Asian market. If you live on the east coast or west coast, this would not be a problem. Let me warn you that the 20-25 piece of candy is extremely misleading. A tiny single wrap chocolate counts as one of those "piece" of candy. You are really getting 10-15 pieces of regular size Japanese candy and for Japanese candy, regular size is small, and small is one piece. If your looking for value, look else were, but if your looking to gift for around $20, this may be just about right.
rating 5.0. ordered for grandson doing grad work @ stanford; was supposed to go to japan but now stuck here perfect gift; recipient delighted. prompt delivery

rating 5.0. CLASSY, TASTY AND FUN BUT NOT INEXPENSIVE I waited until I received one year's worth (four) Classic Bokksus to write my review.  First, regarding the quality; the boxes, accompanying literature, and the wrappers of each individual item in the boxes are striking.  The boxes themselves are refined and as solid as paper boxes can be.  I never received a damaged box or box with damaged contents.  Not a single item ever arrived stale.  I receive an email from Japan every few months notifying me that someone has mailed something to my address.  I'm not 100% sure but these might be the Bokksus because they seem to arrive shortly thereafter.  Everyone who saw the booklets commented on how beautiful the photographs were.  As to the contents, there's a good variety of sweet and savory in each box.  I like the little cakes and pastries the most, followed by the different types of tea.  I'm not as enamored with the hard candies that often leaves me feeling that I'm sucking on a sugar ball colored with artificial dyes.  I guess I expected more punch with natural flavors.  As several others have noted, the cost is rather high for a box full of snack items one might find on the impulse buying racks at a checkout lane at a convenience store.  Having lived in Japan before, I can say that while they taste good, some of the items, especially the salty snacks are pretty inexpensive to purchase there.  Taking into account the cost of shipping from Japan and the need for profit margin however, I suppose this is understandable.  I find myself having a hard time keeping up with the arrival of the next box.  That is, a new one arrives before I've finished the previous one.  This would make an outstanding gift subscription for someone interested in Japanese food/culture.
rating 5.0. Nice selection Good variety with a well-written sheet explaining the contents.

rating 5.0. Wow! Due to everything going on in the world right now it took a while to get this box to me. I voiced my concerns with customer service and they were quick to assist my issues. I just received my box today and I am not disappointed! I’ve ate 2 snacks from this box so far and I am already on the hunt for one of them! I subscribe to a lot of different snack boxes from Japan and this is by far one of my favorites! It’s a little pricey but the snack selection, attention to detail, and information available is all incredible!

rating 5.0. Snacks that make me HAPPY! 🥰 Just got my first box and enjoyed opening it with my daughter who also loves Japanese snacks.  The goodies bring back wonderful memories of trips to Japan. It makes us happy even if we can’t travel at the moment.  Everything  in the box was yummy,  and the book that came with it was nice to read. We can’t wait to try each of the snacks. Definitely excited for the next box already. Thank you Bokksu!

rating 2.0. Nicely packaged. Questionable value. This is a box of individually packaged candies and snacks, sent directly from Japan. The treats come in a nice box, with a booklet explaining how each item fits into the month's theme. There are several items that are unique, such as hand made hard candy. But while the treats were tasty overall, many of them are sold in larger and cheaper packages at major Asian grocery stores in the US.  The treat box comes in a plain outer box, with a custom form declaring the package is worth the equivalent of about $20. This suggests shipping costs make up the difference. This may be worth it, if you don't have access  to an alternative. However, it seems excessive to order snack-sized versions of items I can buy at any time and at about half the price.

rating 5.0. Fun and Different I am not Japanese, but am interested in other cultures and cuisines. This box has an interesting selection and each piece is different and unique. There is a lot of material to look up the back story and details, or (as I often do) you can just try stuff "blind" and check out what you like most after trying... which I find quite fun. Between great products and elegant presentation... makes for a great gift for yourself or others.

rating 4.0. Cheaper than a trip to Japan A really nice presentation of a selection of snacks from Japan. I like the booklet that comes with it, explaining the origins of the foods, plus whether it's sweet or savory, contains alcohol, etc. It really ups the enjoyment level learning a little bit about the foods and the country at the same time.

My only complaint is that I wanted to specifically skip the August box since it had some strawberry sweets in it, and I despite that flavor. So, I waited until the Bokksu site said that September was shipping, and subscribed. So, naturally, August showed up at my doorstep anyway. Oh well. I hate that some of the goodies are going to be uneaten, but everything else inside was more my style, so it wasn't a total loss.

Despite shipping direct from Japan, it arrived right when they said it would, and in fine condition.

rating 2.0. It arrived quickly, but... I usually don’t like leaving bad reviews, but this was a bit irritating. I got this box for a gift to a friend since he’s really into the Japanese culture. The box itself arrived a lot faster than I thought it would have, but even with first glance, it looked like something tried to get into the package. The box it came in was squished down and torn into, so that didn’t save the actual snack box from anything. The snacks were all crumbs and broken, which just made it look so unappealing. I had to find a new gift just because this one arrived in such a horrible condition. Not to mention, the price isn’t exactly cheap, so getting a box I could barely even use was a bit frustrating when I had to pay about thirty dollars for it.
rating 2.0. First one was worth it but then it was a massive let down the next time to the point then I canceled it
rating 3.0. Low value high gimmick Nice presentation and explanations but very underwhelming as far as quality and quantity.

rating 3.0. FUN BUT OVERPRICED I DID ENJOY THE ADVENTURE OF THE BOX AND BEING INTRODUCED TO NEW THINGS. BUT THE SNACKS THEMSELVES WERE JUST OK. THERE WERE TOO MAY THINGS THAT WERE SIMILAR FOR THE MONTH OF JULY, LIKE TOO MANY TYPES OF WHORCHEWTISHIRE  RICE CRACKERS. A COUPLE OF THOSE WOULD HAVE SUFFICED. THE HAND MADE FIZZING CANDIES WERE INTERESTING AND THE STRAWBERRY MOUSSE LAYERED WAFFLE COOKIES IN THE SHAPE OF A FISH WERE EXCELLENT. I WANTED MORE DESCRIPTION ON THE INFORMATIONAL POSTCARD, LIKE WHY WERE THESE ITEMS PICKED?? I DID NOT RECOGNIZE A THEME.

rating 4.0. good and bad I've only received one of these, and I currently don't think it's worth it as a subscription to me, but it certainly wasn't all bad. I got some kind of citrus-themed box. Now, citrus is not one of my favorite flavor types, though I don't hate it, either. So, this boxed was a mixed bag for me. There were some absolutely amazing lemon cookies, which I was not able to find online when I went to see if I could buy just them anywhere. There was a filled bun thing that was pretty good, too. There were other things that I tasted and tossed without finishing. There was definitely a lot of variety in products, which was nice, and the pamphlet explaining things was helpful. But for me, there were maybe two items that were really good, at least three or four which I didn't care for at all, and some others that were interesting and not too bad but nothing amazing. Now, if it had been a chocolate-themed box, it might have been entirely different. For $40/month, it's just not worth the gamble to me. I'd probably buy it if I could buy individual boxes that interested me, rather than the random sub thing, but for $40/month, that's too much money for me to want to bet on the curated randomness (random to me) of this sub box. But if you're a lot more open to different foods and really enjoy lots of different things, maybe it'll be more worth it to you. It definitely looked well put together.

rating 5.0. Flavor packed curated snacks! So I’ve only gotten one box so far but I've subscribed tp the service so fingers crossed. Waiting from July 8-20 felt like an eternity but the box was worth the wait! I’m enjoying mine with my bf and going through the booklet and reading about where they sourced everything is a fun little exercise. The snacks are very fragrant and flavorful- the white chocolate infused freezedried strawberry is an experience in itself. Can’t wait for my next box!

rating 3.0. Quite A Variety, But . . . I enjoyed the sweet but could have done without the other snacks . . . definitely wasn't worth the full price nor did I like the subscription "unknowns" of future box content.  Cx'd Subscription right away!

rating 5.0. Very good variety Love the variety of snacks that are included in this box! I love Japanese snacks because they’re so much lighter. I also love the pamphlet that comes in the box because it helps explain what everything is.

current_product_reviews: rating 3.0. Good presentation, good finds, way to little for the money I would rather get a less glossy pamphlet about what I'm eating and box they come in and get more snacks/variety. This is a very good production. The snacks are all interesting even if you don't like them all. I've never heard of any of the things sent (though that doesn't say all that much - I'm an idiot) but at the money spent for what you get, it just isn't worth it for very long. +3 stars for quality of treats and materials, -2 for value. Got 2 or three months (don't know if I cancelled before the 3rd month - see the aforementioned idiot comment)
other_product_reviews:
rating 1.0. Had subscription for two months, received the same box twice - complained, never heard from them Ok, so let's get the crappy customer service out of the way - had the subscription for two months. Received the same box twice. Emailed, never heard back from. Have received no credit, Amazon simply puts me in touch with the provider. So there's that.

This is a kitchen chemistry set with a nice coat of paint on it. No different then the ones you could buy in a toy store, except that can give you dozens of experiments per set while this seems to give you two. For about the same price. So there's that. My son thought that each set would add to each other and we waited to see, but as I said, it was literally the same thing twice.

1 star for service. 1 star for product. 1 star for the disappointment

input: rating 2.0. You can find u The product was intended to last a month in the description, I was given 12 pieces, 2 tripe twist, 4 beef esophagus, 2 bully springs, 4 cow ears. I was EXPECTING what came in the pictures like bones to keep him occupied for days. On top of that I ordered my first box on the 1st, didn't get here until the 18th, this box is just not worth it.

rating 2.0. they are healthy treats My dog does not like cow ears that was in the box.
Wish we could pick items. See what next month is
rating 5.0. great for keeping them chewing their own stuff love this and so do my 2 schnauzers
rating 1.0. crap my dog didn't like but others did should have a different variaty of stuff not all the same type not good value

rating 1.0. There’s no way I would give this to my dog! There were no ingredients listed on any of the packaging and none of it was made in the USA. The advertisement says “not made in China”, after reading where everything was made, I think I’d feel more comfortable with it coming from China. I didn’t even open a single package, it all went straight into the garbage. I’m not feeding my dog anything without a list of ingredients, especially when it comes from a third world country.

rating 5.0. Nice selection ! I love that there is nothing from China or anything that is rawhide!  For what you get, I think the pricing was good at the intro rate but a bit out of my range for the normal monthly fee. But the peace of mind knowing that it is all natural and the dogs loved everything in the box would be well worth it if I could stretch my budget just a bit!
rating 5.0. Standard Poodles Treats. Our two std. poodles enjoyed each of the different selections in their initial shipment.  I know they are looking forward to future arrivals.

rating 5.0. doesn't last for my dog but great product My dog loved the treats although he is a heavy chewer and ended up eating the treats extremely quickly so this box unfortunately only lasted about 1 week
rating 3.0. Not a very good value. I've found better deals. All the treats in this box don't last very long.

rating 3.0. Not a big selection I only got one box and cancelled the subscription.

They only give 4 different treats now instead of 7ish. I received cow ears which one dog liked but my other didn’t. Both of my dogs have high food drive and are not picky eaters.

I’m not so disappointed in the quality of products as they seemed to be decent quality. I think my dissatisfaction comes from price and selections.
I could have got locally and gotten the same chews for the same quality but gotten more from locally.

Overall, quality chews but my dog didn’t like the treats they gave the most of.

rating 5.0. Canine Buffet! It is great to have a "sampler" box of treats that let my dog try.  This is much better than standing, wondering in the overpriced pet aisle, "what chew treats will my dog love?".  I now know she likes all of the items in the first box, but her favorite is the Bully Sticks.  I can order just those as my dog and I wait for her next box of chew treats to arrive.  This is perfect as my dog is a pup going through that first year of chewing.  With these treats, there is no destruction of things around the house.  She is kept busy enjoying the chew treats.
rating 5.0. Dogs love them!!! I love that my pooch loves these treats.

rating 3.0. You do not get much for the price. Now they probably cost more, but for a box set, I do not think you get enough for the cost.  We did the trial so not much of a loss and that price was great for what you get.  Maybe each box is different.  Seemed to be pretty good quality.  You may like them.  Not for us.
rating 5.0. Fun to get My Labrador’s loved the treats in this box. They are hard on treats and toys. They blast through them pretty quickly.
rating 2.0. Not worth the money For the price. We should get more things. I am canceling the order. Not worth it

rating 1.0. Too expensive not long lasting too few items Not worth the $. Some chews were hollow fake bully sticks. 4 packages with max 4 in each bag. Fake bully sticks 3 thin real bully’s couple of ears and a couple thin curly things
Will not buy products again
Way to expensive!
rating 5.0. The Duke is a Australian Shepard Would like more treats in the box

rating 3.0. Disappointed The chew toys were not very sturdy. My dogs, each around fifty pounds, destroyed them in just a minute or two. I plan to try one more box. If it isn’t better, I’ll cancel future deliveries.
rating 2.0. Dissatisfied These products are not real Bully sticks, all have esophagus parts and don’t last more than a few minutes for my 50 pound dog.

rating 2.0. Value is not there I have two dogs and they blazed through these treats so quickly. The treats seemed to be of good quality and my dogs liked them; however, I got a 50% off deal and still felt like I paid too much. Truth is, I have no problem paying for good quality stuff, I just was on the fence about the actual products.

rating 4.0. Good but not great I buy pawstruck jerky every month as Grizzly Wolf's (90lb GSD) regular treat. I like this company so I thought I'd give this subscription a try. His first box was good, but I don't think the value is there for future boxes (i got a deal on his first box). He went through the largest chew so fast, I barely saw him chew it. Still, it was a good deal on the one box, but I'll be canceling his subscription.

rating 5.0. Good box, just not for my pup I appreciate the contents, but it ended being too much for my dog to have these regularly. I did alternate items, and she loved all of them, but it's just too much for her system. She's a little older, 12yr+, so I thought these would slow her down and help keep her teeth clean. But she ate several quite fast and I suspect that's what didn't work w/ her system. I'd get this again if I had a younger dog. And I'd be open to learning of a senior-dog type box.

rating 3.0. Not for aggressive chewers I bought the box for large dogs (50+ pounds) for my 15 pound terrier as a replacement for rawhide chews.  I got the box for large dogs based on the reviews.  My dog loved the chews, but the spiral one was completely gone in less than 10 minutes.  Out of curiosity I put down the large braided one, and he had eaten 2 inches of it in about 5 minutes before I picked it up.  This is not what I was looking for.

rating 4.0. Most chews were great, would be nice to know whats in each bag. For the bully sticks and esophagus twists it was a good deal. Problem is nothing was labeled. There was one package that I am pretty sure was rawhide which is cheap and a controversial chew. I also would prefer more subscription options. Having to skip each month instead of having a chance to order bi monthly or quarterly would be more practical.

rating 4.0. Great value & selection of quality products Nice selection of products! My dogs love them! Each type of chew was individually packaged in a resealable bag, and I feel like I got great bang for the buck! Plenty of products that are high quality and not full of bad ingredients, at a fraction of the price of those big pet supply stores. Shipping seemed to be a bit longer than most packages, arrived after 1.5 weeks, which is my only complaint. Otherwise, extremely happy as are my pups!
rating 1.0. Made my dogs sick.  Both of them. Make both of my dogs sick.

rating 5.0. Puppy Approved! He was so happy! 5+ Received my Pawstruck Chew box.... My Puppy loved it.... All of his chew bones and treats lasted a long time.... He was very excited to get his surprise box.... It gave him lots of joy and comfort for his chew time. Some of his chew bones were Smokey scented. Very happy! Puppy Approved ☺️
rating 5.0. Good price Lots of cool stuff for my little girl!

rating 5.0. Absolutely the best I don't understand the hate about the product being produced in the U.S. It states were the company gets it's ingredients from. It is just simply based in Cali. We have two 80+ lb dogs and they love these. This is going on year two that we have been getting these boxes and probably won't ever change. I think we have tried 4 or 5 different brand subscriptions and Pawstruck is the absolute best.
rating 3.0. Not What I expected Very small box with very few "treats" for my large dogs. Was worth a try, but not going to recommend.
rating 1.0. Quality and to be what you said I was expecting Large treats. for my Large Dog. Not even close

rating 2.0. Beware: apparently not US sourced I canceled my subscription after the first delivery. The items in the box were all packaged in Pawstruck-branded bags, and there was NO indication that they were sourced in the United States. I refuse to give my dogs anything that may come from China or other countries where they have no quality control and use harmful chemicals which has caused sickness and death in many animals consuming the products. Very dissatisfied.
rating 5.0. Dogs love them Dogs love them. Glad they are all natural. They only last 5 min with my big GSD. The box is expensive but all dog chews are.
rating 5.0. Yum! I bought this for my golden retriever, hopefully to cheer her up! She has loved all the treats:)
rating 5.0. Happiness My dog LOVES the pawstruck box!

rating 5.0. Dogs love it!! I really debated getting a subscription to Pawstruck for large breeds because of the cost, but decided to give it a try. I have two large dogs and signed up for one box per month because they don't need that many large treats and it has worked very well. Victor and Maggie have loved every treat they have sent and Maggie can be picky. We have received 3 or 4 boxes and I don't
think we've gotten the same thing twice. Most of the treats are huge and tend to last longer than other natural treats, some up to 20-30 minutes for my very aggressive chewer. They put a card in each box with the names, pics and descriptions of what's in the box. The only downside is that the individual bags aren't labeled, so for those of us who can't keep the cards handy you don't know what's in most of the bags.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Large treats! I love this box, great variety, lots of large treats, I just ordered my second subscription!
rating 5.0. Large treats! I love this box, great variety, lots of large treats, I just ordered my second subscription!
rating 5.0. Large treats! I love this box, great variety, lots of large treats, I just ordered my second subscription!

rating 3.0. Full price seems high Items appear to be of good quality, but unwrapped with no country of origin. Also, trial price of $15 seems about right, $30 is too much.

rating 2.0. Not what I expected but pups will enjoy. Not at all what I was expecting. There are 9 hard treats in the box not much variety. I canceled as I did not feel it was worth the cost.

rating 1.0. Only 6 chews, not worth the $$ I am disappointed and will not continue subscribing. Advertised as 15-20 pieces, but the box only contained 6 chews that only last about 20 minutes for my pup.

rating 1.0. Did not expect this. Wow the picture in the description had me thinking this was a great service.  Got my first box and was completely underwhelmed.  Six small chews for two large/medium dogs.  All six items appeared to be molded rawhide, no variety at all.  My border collie now has an dry hacky cough.  Country of origin is unknown. And products are not labeled so in the trash they go.  Better safe than sorry!

rating 1.0. This is the worst! Get a bark box!!!!! Rip off I just received my first box! Not impressed. There were only 2 bully sticks and some little chew rawhide. Are you serious! I’m done no more this sucks should have gone with bark box.

rating 3.0. Disappointing first impression Same experience as others.  Only 5 chews were in the box when the description said 10-15.  Perhaps that only applies to the small dog box?  Either way, I’m cancelling my subscription.
rating 2.0. Too expensive for what you get A few pieces of cheap chews. No bully sticks, no antlers. I can buy more at Walmart for less.

rating 2.0. Wow, so disappointed. Extremely disappointed.  I was very taken back to open the box to find 6 items thrown in a box with a piece of tissue paper.  I would not recommend this product.  It all went to the garbage.

rating 2.0. Very underwhelmed Mine sounds better than a few people, but I did only get 6 treats, and 3 of them were very tiny and skinny tendons, so didn't take them long to work through them. There was also a trachea tube, a 5"pizzle , and a longer braided pizzle (Iam staving that for a trip for the puppy).  I have 8 dogs, and ordered the large/ medium breed box, expecting to get something like what they showed in the photos. Nope. Large box, very empty, good thing it was half price for the first month, I did right away cancel. I planned to weigh the treats to give a better idea of weight, but handed out treats instead to a few lucky recipients. I did get photos though, and will post them later.
rating 3.0. Not enough for my big chewers. Good quality but my baby chewed right through them in minutes.

rating 2.0. Not for every dog! The biggest box only lasted my Australian Cattle Dog 6 days -1 a day. Each treat only took a few minutes to chew. Kind of a bummer so I cancelled my subscription. And he was a little backed up afterwards, not too bad, just a little.

rating 2.0. Ehhh...nothing special I ended up canceling this. I got 5 treats all of which were gone in 2 minutes flat each none of them were “long lasting”. I submitted for a large dog but 2 were more for a medium sized dog.

rating 3.0. Okay It would probably have been perfect if I had smaller dogs or if they weren't such chewing monsters. Everything in the box only lasted a few minutes when given to my dogs. I have a 80 lb doberman and a 60 lb pitbull for size reference.

rating 2.0. First box was disappointing The box was not as advertised.  When I ordered it claimed 15-20 chews per box, and the box I received only had 8 chews.  I just checked the description again and it was recently changed to “at least 10 chews” per box and they haven’t even met that!  The chews themselves seem good quality, but I was hoping for more variety and a larger quantity.  I cancelled after the trial box because $30 is a bit outlandish for 8 chews.

rating 2.0. Underwhelmed I expected more. I received 6 chews and each was very small, with the largest being a braid that was about 8 inches long.
It only took my dog about 5 minutes to chew through each item. Definitely not for aggressive chewers. Luckily, I only ordered one month instead of committing to a subscription.

rating 2.0. Underwhelmed for the price These are really great quality chews, though it didn't take my newfoundland long to demolish them and I would not call her an aggressive chewer. I was happy however, with the quality. The quantity for the price though, is not sufficient. I expected a 30-dollar box to be bursting with awesome chews for the month and the few chews I received in the under-stuffed box were gone in two days!  I love the idea of the gnawbox, and would try it again if I could get what I really needed: a big box of long-lasting chews that I can trust are good enough quality for my dog...

rating 1.0. Value for money. Dogs love them. Excellence treats and good value. I just wish they would send varieties in pairs not threes as I have two dogs.

UPDATE: I had to return the remainder of the box. Both my terriers who usually can eat most anything got severe diarrhea.

The have never reacted to other brands of bully sticks like this before so I think something is definitely wrong with this product.
rating 1.0. Will never buy again. Smelled badly. Sticks came apart like string-like consistency. Our dog threw up after chewing on one if the bones. Poor quality compared to the bones at Petco.
rating 5.0. Great Quality Great selection of all natural pets loved some, wish there was more product for that cost

rating 3.0. Great selection, but they were too dry in my first box It would be a 5 star review if they weren't so dry.  My dogs love them, they look good, and great selection, but way way too dried out.  When my dogs bite into them, they flake and crumb all over, which isn't how they should be.  I'm hoping I just got a back-stock/overstock box, and the rest are not that way.  I'm willing to try one more, but if it's the same way, then it's just no good.

rating 3.0. Completely average, at the 50% discount price Dog seems fine with everything. None of the pieces appear to be anything special, that I couldn't buy separately, or are sourced 100% locally organic or something. At 50% off, $15, this seems about reasonable. You get several treats, of several varieties, that will last maybe a month. At full price? Seems really overpriced for what you get. Why wouldn't I go with something like rawhide chews, which are supposed to be good for dental hygiene, at 30% less in price, for a guaranteed month supply?

Overall, at this price, seems completely average. At full price, I wouldn't buy this again.

rating 2.0. Not for every dog! The biggest box only lasted my Australian Cattle Dog 6 days -1 a day. Each treat only took a few minutes to chew. Kind of a bummer so I cancelled my subscription. And he was a little backed up afterwards, not too bad, just a little.

rating 5.0. Well worth it This is our second box and we are beyond happy. This one is even better then the first. A huge variety and my Mastiff puppy couldn't be happier. The hoofs are by far his favorite he chews for a while then tosses them around and plays with them they have lasted for almost a week now and the box is packed with lots of other treats. We can't wait for next month.

rating 4.0. Nice product overall I was a little nervous given some of the reviews, but we received a large bag filled with several different types of chews that our dog loved. The packaging looked really nice (looks like they listened to reviews that were concerned with this!) and included a key chain light. We got several ears and both long and short jerky sticks; our dog loved the ears but chewed through the jerky in a minute. Overall, it was a great value for the promotional price, but at full price it doesn't keep our dog entertained long enough to be worth it for us.

rating 3.0. Happy to try them I ordered a set for large dog, it came with a good amount of different kind of treats. They keeps my dog busy for a period of time. I received 3 treats looks like a horn, it took a week for my dog to finished one piece. The horn is the best of all. You cannot selecting what you want. Company ship out those treats randomly.
The price is pricey, I luckily paid half price only to try out (Amazon promotion few months ago). I will not pay a regular price for the box, I could get more treats or the kind I really want on that price.
Some of treats are good products but I won't need them every month (monthly auto ship).
It took almost a month to arrive from the day I ordered. That was the most disappointed part.
Will I buy it again? Yes if it is on 50% off. NO if I need to pay full price.

rating 2.0. Ehhh...nothing special I ended up canceling this. I got 5 treats all of which were gone in 2 minutes flat each none of them were “long lasting”. I submitted for a large dog but 2 were more for a medium sized dog.

rating 2.0. Disappointed I receiver 3 beef chews, 3 pig ears and 3 beef tendons, really disappointed because the picture had many more items than just 3. Not even worth the $15 introductory price. Then my 75 pound female pit bull chewed these items up in less than 30 seconds.
rating 1.0. Do not buy My 5 months puppy throws up every time he eats one of these chews.
rating 1.0. Didn't like my dogs hated them I cancled after first order and got more I didn't want
rating 1.0. Poop alert Cancelled subscription after the first treat. Gave my dog horrible gas and the shots for 48 hours.

rating 3.0. Has potential I have received two boxes and both times, shipping was delayed. Dont know who delivers their snail mail.

Got the first box with a discount price. Items were great. Pretty much the same things that I buy normally - - bully sticks, hooves, twisties, etc.
My 3 dogs love it and this box saves me a trip to the store. So I decided to stay on the subscription.

Second box came with a handful of small bully sticks, a large hoof, and a toy from the dollar store. Not worth the $30.

rating 5.0. Be patient and communicate :) This is a follow-up review: our very first box was less than good, and my original review reflected that. Nature Gnaw handled it like a champ and reached out, offering a replacement. Nature Gnaw has been kind, courteous and has absolutely redeemed themselves. The replacement box was amazing and exactly what I was expecting when I signed up for a monthly subscription.

rating 4.0. Great value. We have now had our second delivery. The first box was packed with great things for our dogs  to chew on. The second box wasnt nearly as full but still had a lot of quality chews & still a bargain!  Nothing smelled artificial or like they had been sprayed with something. Our dogs really enjoyed them. We will see what the 3rd box brings.

rating 3.0. Great selection, but they were too dry in my first box It would be a 5 star review if they weren't so dry.  My dogs love them, they look good, and great selection, but way way too dried out.  When my dogs bite into them, they flake and crumb all over, which isn't how they should be.  I'm hoping I just got a back-stock/overstock box, and the rest are not that way.  I'm willing to try one more, but if it's the same way, then it's just no good.

rating 5.0. Great deal - happy dogs This was a phenomenal deal. I've signed up for the subscription. I needed something to entertain my two Labs in the morning while I was working from home and this was beyond perfect. The chews were a good quality and there were some that could be eaten quickly and others, like bones and hooves, that are keeping them happy for a little longer. I love that this comes from a small US company and have been recommending this to all my dog friends.
rating 5.0. Can’t wait for the Next box. Good variety of dog chews. Hope the 2nd box is just as good.
rating 1.0. Unsafe items in box Had to throw half of it out.  3 hooves and 2 bones that splintered badly.  Vet said to Toss them out. Waste of money.

rating 1.0. Smelled odd and our dog wouldn't touch them 😑 The treats came packed in a plastic zip-top plastic bag. They had a funny smell. Our dog would not touch them. They were a total waste of money for us. I canceled as soon as I saw she didn't like them. This was very disappointing!

rating 1.0. Large breed approved? LIES! These items for a heavy chewer or large dog? My pup is 7 mos old and it took him 5 mins to go thru this. Mind you he still has most of his baby teeth. This did not satisfy my pup or older dog. They both stared at it like it was a joke. I'm EXTREMELY disappointed in this product. I could've done better at a pet store.

rating 4.0. Good The box has a good amount of treats in it. They are probably worth the price I paid. However my dog doesn’t seem to interested in eating them. I normally get him large bones and rawhides but thought this may be better. The bow sent is cute but I probably won’t use it on my male dog seeing that it’s pink. Overall good quality and quantity just have a picky dog.

rating 2.0. Wow, so disappointed. Extremely disappointed.  I was very taken back to open the box to find 6 items thrown in a box with a piece of tissue paper.  I would not recommend this product.  It all went to the garbage.

rating 2.0. Not convinced... Not only did my July box arrive in September, but it was quite sketchy. No labels, no packing information about what is inside or where it came from or anything about it at all. Also came with a pet brush...not sure my dog is going to like chewing on that! ;) Supposedly this is for a large dog or aggressive chewer and my dog is both of those things. Most of the chews are too small to begin with and there were 3 or 4 hooves which crack easily and splinter off. I don't even remember those being an option as a possibility of what could be included. With better communication that is clear and informative and a treat size that actually is fitting for a large dog, this wouldn't be that bad. If I hadn't paid half price for a trial month, I would be very disappointed at the $30 price point. My suggestion is to use your $30 to invest in a high quality package of bully sticks and then you will know what they are and where they are from!
rating 3.0. Not worth the money Dog LOVED it but not worth the money. Got more out of local grocery stores
rating 1.0. Good product....bad shipping. I really liked this product but too many times the item got lost or ran late.  I ended up canceling because of it.

rating 3.0. Hard on the stomach. These seemed really great and our puppy loved them, but they made her breath stink so bad and her poops were really off. Sadly after giving her 3-4, we had to toss the rest.

rating 2.0. Disappointing I did received a decent amount of chews for the on sale price, definitely not worth $30... most of them were the cut off ends of bully sticks. They call them bully bites. These are a danger for choking and blockage. My pup swallowed one whole.

The presentation is horrible. They are thrown in a box with a sheet of tissue paper. I mean at least put them in a ziplock bag.

The products themselves were very dry.
I have since ordered from Pawstruck and have been very pleased with all of their products.

This company needs to step up their game if they are going to continue in this industry!

rating 1.0. It’s not not big dogs nor for chews. Give one and they both devoured in seconds Not at all what I was expecting
