rating 3.0. Hard on the stomach. These seemed really great and our puppy loved them, but they made her breath stink so bad and her poops were really off. Sadly after giving her 3-4, we had to toss the rest.

rating 1.0. received less than half of what was advertised. so disappointed. I was so excited to get this subscription for our pups. The advertisement showed what I thought we were getting in our box. Was incredibly disappointed. There was one bag (pictured) with 2 kinds of treats. I had given the dogs a few snacks out of it (5 to be exact) before the picture. but it is like over half the box is missing. there were no hooves, and some of the twisty dog treats don't look like full treats they look like leftovers, and definitely wouldn't consider this to be 15-20 as advertised. I sent an email to the seller, and paused our subscription, just incase it was a mistake. But based on some of the other reviews, it just seems like it's false advertising.
rating 5.0. Dogs went crazy Dogs loved them. However, I don’t know if it’s worth the cost for how little is in the box.

rating 1.0. Only 6 chews, not worth the $$ I am disappointed and will not continue subscribing. Advertised as 15-20 pieces, but the box only contained 6 chews that only last about 20 minutes for my pup.

rating 4.0. Good The box has a good amount of treats in it. They are probably worth the price I paid. However my dog doesn’t seem to interested in eating them. I normally get him large bones and rawhides but thought this may be better. The bow sent is cute but I probably won’t use it on my male dog seeing that it’s pink. Overall good quality and quantity just have a picky dog.

rating 3.0. Happy to try them I ordered a set for large dog, it came with a good amount of different kind of treats. They keeps my dog busy for a period of time. I received 3 treats looks like a horn, it took a week for my dog to finished one piece. The horn is the best of all. You cannot selecting what you want. Company ship out those treats randomly.
The price is pricey, I luckily paid half price only to try out (Amazon promotion few months ago). I will not pay a regular price for the box, I could get more treats or the kind I really want on that price.
Some of treats are good products but I won't need them every month (monthly auto ship).
It took almost a month to arrive from the day I ordered. That was the most disappointed part.
Will I buy it again? Yes if it is on 50% off. NO if I need to pay full price.

rating 3.0. cool treats sadly my dog is a big chewer, and even though he is 15 pounds, and this was marked for large dogs, he can consume one of the bully sticks or pigs ears in about 10 minutes.  so as much fun as this subscription was, I had to cancel as it won't last as long as I was hoping for him., and I was nervous giving to a larger dog, as they may try to eat the whole thing in bigger bites.

rating 4.0. DID NOT LAST 10 minutes. I’m sure they are good, but EXTREMELY EXPENSIVE IN MY OPINION These Dog Chews are supposed to be better, but they are quite Expensive. In the box I received
4 small bags , 1 with a ear chew , that was finished in less than 10 minutes, one bag had 3 ? tendons and same thing, gone in less than 10 minutes, another bags had hooves I believe, maybe 3 small , one other bag had another chew in it of some kind
I paid $29.95 for this and I would have NEVER ORDERED IT , had I HAD ANY IDEA THE ITEMS WERE GOING TO BE GONE SO QUICKLY. A CHEW SHOULD LAST FOR AN AFTERNOON AT LEAST, ESPECIALLY @ THIS PRICE. BUT I WONT STAY IN THIS CLUB because THE NEXT BOX WOULD $39.95 or MORE. This is JUST NOT FEASIBLE TO ME. Yes they are A Healthier dog chew, but RIDICULOUSLY PRICED!!!!! . Just my own opinion. TammyWood

rating 5.0. Be patient and communicate :) This is a follow-up review: our very first box was less than good, and my original review reflected that. Nature Gnaw handled it like a champ and reached out, offering a replacement. Nature Gnaw has been kind, courteous and has absolutely redeemed themselves. The replacement box was amazing and exactly what I was expecting when I signed up for a monthly subscription.
rating 3.0. Not enough for my big chewers. Good quality but my baby chewed right through them in minutes.

rating 3.0. Has potential I have received two boxes and both times, shipping was delayed. Dont know who delivers their snail mail.

Got the first box with a discount price. Items were great. Pretty much the same things that I buy normally - - bully sticks, hooves, twisties, etc.
My 3 dogs love it and this box saves me a trip to the store. So I decided to stay on the subscription.

Second box came with a handful of small bully sticks, a large hoof, and a toy from the dollar store. Not worth the $30.
rating 1.0. Won't purchase these anymore It didn't come with all items as advertised

rating 5.0. What a treat I purchased these for my dogs when the subscription was 50% off.  I figured I would cancel after the first month.  Anyhow my 3 dogs enjoyed the treats SO much that my husband guilted me into not cancelling the subscription.  They are beyond happy every time a new box arrives.
rating 1.0. Good product....bad shipping. I really liked this product but too many times the item got lost or ran late.  I ended up canceling because of it.

rating 1.0. Boring subscription I received this package of chews in my first Gnaw Box subscription service.  Boring, but ok enough to try for a second month. Received this package of chews in my SECOND subscription box.  I canceled.  My dogs did like the chews but I expected a sample of items for them to try, not the same thing month after month. I can do that with my Subscribe and Save subscription.
rating 3.0. NOT ENOUGH KNAW TIME! It doesn't take my dog a long time to eat them.  I thought it would give her many min. of knaw time, but she goes through one very quickly.
rating 1.0. Not worth your money Had barely 10 pieces and half of those were very small and broken. Not worth your money. Barely anything. The box is worth about $10 total at a store.

rating 2.0. Underwhelmed for the price These are really great quality chews, though it didn't take my newfoundland long to demolish them and I would not call her an aggressive chewer. I was happy however, with the quality. The quantity for the price though, is not sufficient. I expected a 30-dollar box to be bursting with awesome chews for the month and the few chews I received in the under-stuffed box were gone in two days!  I love the idea of the gnawbox, and would try it again if I could get what I really needed: a big box of long-lasting chews that I can trust are good enough quality for my dog...
rating 5.0. Can’t wait for the Next box. Good variety of dog chews. Hope the 2nd box is just as good.

rating 1.0. Not for big dogs and foreign sourced I got some good size pieces mixed with smaller pieces that I wouldn't say qualify for big dogs. Definitely not worth the price. The package doesn't say where it sources its product from, just "globally sourced". Umm no. Meat products sitting while shipped from one country to another is what causes bacteria to grow and dogs to get sick. I'm not paying a premium for dog treats shipped from god knows where. This stuff is made from beef? America makes enough beef that they could source this stuff here but obviously they just wanna source it from elsewhere, save a buck and charge like it's premium. Nope!
rating 5.0. Happy dogs I have 3 tough chewers and they all love the nature gnaw treats - especially the.porky pretzels.

rating 5.0. My dogs loved everything! This was a box made for chewers. I was hesitant to purchase, but am glad I did. My Belgian Malinois literally eats my entire house if she doesn't have a good chew to gnaw on.

rating 2.0. Wow, so disappointed. Extremely disappointed.  I was very taken back to open the box to find 6 items thrown in a box with a piece of tissue paper.  I would not recommend this product.  It all went to the garbage.
rating 3.0. Not worth the money Dog LOVED it but not worth the money. Got more out of local grocery stores

rating 2.0. Not convinced... Not only did my July box arrive in September, but it was quite sketchy. No labels, no packing information about what is inside or where it came from or anything about it at all. Also came with a pet brush...not sure my dog is going to like chewing on that! ;) Supposedly this is for a large dog or aggressive chewer and my dog is both of those things. Most of the chews are too small to begin with and there were 3 or 4 hooves which crack easily and splinter off. I don't even remember those being an option as a possibility of what could be included. With better communication that is clear and informative and a treat size that actually is fitting for a large dog, this wouldn't be that bad. If I hadn't paid half price for a trial month, I would be very disappointed at the $30 price point. My suggestion is to use your $30 to invest in a high quality package of bully sticks and then you will know what they are and where they are from!

rating 3.0. Fair... My Labs had these gone in no time. Not a bad deal for the introductory price, but certainly not worth the full subscription price. I would not purchase again- even at the intro price.
rating 2.0. Not worth it Disappointed with number of items in box. Will not repurchase. Waste of money. Needs better quality variety
rating 2.0. Too expensive for what you get A few pieces of cheap chews. No bully sticks, no antlers. I can buy more at Walmart for less.
rating 1.0. Do not buy My 5 months puppy throws up every time he eats one of these chews.
rating 5.0. Great Quality Great selection of all natural pets loved some, wish there was more product for that cost

rating 2.0. Very underwhelmed Mine sounds better than a few people, but I did only get 6 treats, and 3 of them were very tiny and skinny tendons, so didn't take them long to work through them. There was also a trachea tube, a 5"pizzle , and a longer braided pizzle (Iam staving that for a trip for the puppy).  I have 8 dogs, and ordered the large/ medium breed box, expecting to get something like what they showed in the photos. Nope. Large box, very empty, good thing it was half price for the first month, I did right away cancel. I planned to weigh the treats to give a better idea of weight, but handed out treats instead to a few lucky recipients. I did get photos though, and will post them later.
rating 5.0. Value Great variety for the price

rating 2.0. First box was disappointing The box was not as advertised.  When I ordered it claimed 15-20 chews per box, and the box I received only had 8 chews.  I just checked the description again and it was recently changed to “at least 10 chews” per box and they haven’t even met that!  The chews themselves seem good quality, but I was hoping for more variety and a larger quantity.  I cancelled after the trial box because $30 is a bit outlandish for 8 chews.

rating 3.0. Not for large dogs Out of the entire box, 2 chews lasted more than an hour. The quality is good but the size of the treats and how long they last doesn’t match up with the cost. If you are interested I would order the large box for small and medium dogs.

rating 2.0. I will give it another month.... First box received... Not at all what I expected.  One bag of approx 6 thin bully type sticks and chews.  Half the chews were broken and small.  Not great for 100lb dog.  Not a good value for the money based upon my dog finishing a chew in 5 minutes.
rating 2.0. Not what they advertised Just received our very first box for our two mastiff puppies.  Opened it up and was highly dissapointed.  There was only 6 pieces in this box.

rating 4.0. Great value. We have now had our second delivery. The first box was packed with great things for our dogs  to chew on. The second box wasnt nearly as full but still had a lot of quality chews & still a bargain!  Nothing smelled artificial or like they had been sprayed with something. Our dogs really enjoyed them. We will see what the 3rd box brings.

rating 5.0. My Dogs Love These Love these. They came quickly. Fair price. Good quality and my dogs absolutely love them. And we have 1 pit bull, 1 Rottweiler, 1 pitweiler (pitty/rotty mix). 2 out of my 3 are aggressive chewers.

rating 2.0. Disappointing I did received a decent amount of chews for the on sale price, definitely not worth $30... most of them were the cut off ends of bully sticks. They call them bully bites. These are a danger for choking and blockage. My pup swallowed one whole.

The presentation is horrible. They are thrown in a box with a sheet of tissue paper. I mean at least put them in a ziplock bag.

The products themselves were very dry.
I have since ordered from Pawstruck and have been very pleased with all of their products.

This company needs to step up their game if they are going to continue in this industry!

rating 5.0. Great Quality I liked the quality of the product and that it is sourced in the USA.  However, it was a bit pricey for my snack lover.  He is a very productive chewer and goes through these way too fast.  Needed to get him really tough toys that I can put treats in so it takes him awhile to extract them.

rating 3.0. Completely average, at the 50% discount price Dog seems fine with everything. None of the pieces appear to be anything special, that I couldn't buy separately, or are sourced 100% locally organic or something. At 50% off, $15, this seems about reasonable. You get several treats, of several varieties, that will last maybe a month. At full price? Seems really overpriced for what you get. Why wouldn't I go with something like rawhide chews, which are supposed to be good for dental hygiene, at 30% less in price, for a guaranteed month supply?

Overall, at this price, seems completely average. At full price, I wouldn't buy this again.

rating 5.0. Quality large chews Wow! Pleasantly suprized by the amount, variety and size of these chews! Great quality and my Newf was psyched to get a package in the mail. Highly
Recommend. I bought the large size.
rating 1.0. Will never buy again. Smelled badly. Sticks came apart like string-like consistency. Our dog threw up after chewing on one if the bones. Poor quality compared to the bones at Petco.

rating 1.0. Smelled odd and our dog wouldn't touch them 😑 The treats came packed in a plastic zip-top plastic bag. They had a funny smell. Our dog would not touch them. They were a total waste of money for us. I canceled as soon as I saw she didn't like them. This was very disappointing!

rating 2.0. Underwhelmed I expected more. I received 6 chews and each was very small, with the largest being a braid that was about 8 inches long.
It only took my dog about 5 minutes to chew through each item. Definitely not for aggressive chewers. Luckily, I only ordered one month instead of committing to a subscription.

rating 1.0. Waste Not worth it bunch of cheap rawhide and 3 inch long bully twist
Don’t waste ur money

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Exceptional Value Our dog's loved this box of goodies. We will continue the subscription when out budget allows.
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Great subscription box Variety & value were exceptional. Will subscribe again when it's in the budget.
rating 5.0. Great subscription box! Great variety & value. Will subscribe again when it's in my budget.
rating 5.0. Great Selection All of our dog's enjoyed this bag of chews. Exceptional value.

input: rating 3.0. Great idea, but . . . I thought this would be a fun way to try some different teas. I like the packaging, and the reusable, canvas-like, tea bags are a neat idea (if not what is shown in the picture). However, I cannot see trying to clean them after every cup. Most of the tea samples had large amounts of dust and tiny slivers, and I suspect that the end result would have been better if I had actually used the bags. Instead, I used a teapot with a loose-leaf filter. We've tried the orange herbal and the oolong, but we really did not like them. At the end of the day, if you want to try some different teas without committing to a huge purchase, this is one way to do it.

rating 5.0. Tasty quartet of interesting teas Got my first delivery and the teas are delightful. 3 leaf teas and 1 herbal. Interesting combinations of flavors. All 4 are delicious. Love the reusable tea bags too! I am getting several pots out of each flavor, so, a good value as well.
rating 5.0. Highly recommend Received as described. Clear instructions on how to brew each tea. I’ve only tried the blood orange tea, but it was delicious!!  Can’t wait to try the others!

rating 5.0. If you love tea, you gotta try this box! As a huge tea lover I was so excited to try this box, I was not let down! Loved all of the different flavors, the price is great, and it comes with reusable tea diffusers in case you don’t have one.

rating 5.0. Informative and unexpectedly interesting! As a novice to the whole loose leaf tea world, I appreciate this opportunity to try different teas that I might not otherwise try or even have access to. I especially like the description card that details why the specific tea was included and what to expect. Looking forward to what my next box will bring!
rating 5.0. New tea varieties I really liked trying the variety of teas you sent. It is nice to be able to try new teas that you would not even know to try.

rating 4.0. Didn't expect that. I was very excited to get my first box since I have been a Tevanna user forever till they went away. I was out of town when my box arrived ,so I was even more excited when I finally got home and to the mailbox. I will say, when I opened the mailbox and saw this tiny little box, I thought, Hmmm, I didn't expect such a tiny box, and for $11.99 are you kidding me? I will say also, I wasn't really sure what to expect but, with all the hype online and the pretty pictures on the buying page, I wasn't expecting such a tiny thing. But, after opening the box, and getting those cute little gauze tea bags, for steeping, I felt a little better, it comes with great directions, and a few lines about each tea, I felt a lot better.

Now for the tea. When I saw which teas I was getting in my first box, I was not excited. I don't like green tea, or blood orange, in fact, I really don't like Orange at all, but, after steeping my first tea (Blood Orange) I was hooked, The flavor was so soft and the tea was not bitter, it had a lovely flavor and their is a little note in there on how to make it for your water bottle, That's exciting.

So all and all. It is very fun to see the teas and try them, I've only had one so, I'll update the rating as we move through the teas.

Happy Tea drinking.!!
rating 5.0. Lovely tea All the tea I've gotten so far gas been lovely~
rating 5.0. Nice variety Lovely variety. It's nice to have a little surprise every month. I will definitely be buying some of these again
rating 5.0. Tasty Rich Robust and Stout Tea 4 ALL SEASONS It has been a while since I ordered tea. I remember receiving it. Oh, what a Glorious Day it turned Out To B...

rating 4.0. Money value is there, not to my tastes First, the good: I felt that the amount given of each tea was adequate. The blood orange herbal was a little light, but blood orange herbal is kind of ubiquitous so I didn't mind. The price is reasonable, especially when you consider that most regular samplers like these have a big markup.

The bad: See: ubiquitous. Two of the provided teas were basics (lady grey, blood orange herbal). In addition, I didn't read properly and didn't realize that every shipment would be 1/4 green tea, which I hate. It's basically the only type of tea I won't drink. That's my issue, though...it's clearly on the tin. Only downgrading for the unexciting 2/4.
rating 2.0. Where are the bags? Seems like a good concept and idea.  Tea is good but wow...only 4 bags?  That means I get 4 cups of tea....what about the rest?

rating 5.0. Best tea I’ve ever had! So fresh. Tea is for the most part the only thing I drink, so my cubbard is packed with brand named teas like Lipton, Twinings, Stash, Bigelow, Tiesta, and tons more and none of them I feel come close to the quality, taste and pureness of Simple Loose Leaf. This is by far the best tea I’ve had before, it’s so fresh and packs so much taste per cup it’s unreal.

The first sampler pack was absolutely delicious and opened my eyes to a few teas I haven’t heard of before, the Genmaicha, which was so unique and refreshing, and the Blue Lady. Their version of the blue lady is my favorite tea I have ever had, period. I bought another lavender earl grey tea at my grocery store since and it was so bitter and harsh comparatively, no comparison.

After my first month that was only $3, I was hooked! I searched up their website and found they offer green, herbal and black tea boxes as well for sale, same as here, $11.99 after shipping. They had a deal, 50% any box subscription so I got green and black for only $6 a piece.
After receiving I was thrilled to received 8 teas that I have never heard of before in my life. I’ve only tried 3 so far, but all have been winners, especially the cranberry orange herbal. I typically HATE herbal but this was incredible and was packed with dried cranberries.

For $11.99, you’re not getting a lot of tea I’m going to be honest, but what you are getting is a nice assortment of high quality tea that you most likely have not heard of before. This is perfect for people like me who is simply bored of the 3-4 choices grocery store shelves provide, and want teas from Africa, India, China, Indonesia and other countries around the world!

I attached a picture of all the teas I’ve received so far, left 4=sampler, middle 4=black box, right 4=green box.

rating 5.0. Pleasant! Excellent customer service - won me over!

Generous portions for its price (tea samplers of this quality and portion sizes are usually more costly). I really enjoyed the Blue Lady Earl Grey - fantastic flavor that lingers. I also enjoyed the Blood Orange Herbal Tea a lot - overall, great quality teas for the price! Would definitely recommend.

rating 4.0. It was worth trying. I subscribed because of the Amazon deal where my first box would only cost $3. I was pleasantly surprised by the sturdy packaging and amount of tea I received. Since I already have strainers for brewing loose leaf tea, I have not tried the bags which came in the box. As for the teas, I received Blood Orange Herbal, Blue Lady Grey, QiLan Oolong, and Genmaicha. I really enjoyed the herbal tea (rooibos, orange peel, hibiscus, rosehips, apple pieces, safflowers, rose petals, and orange/vanilla/lemon flavor) and would buy it again on its own. The black tea (whole leaf black tea, blue mellow blossoms, lavender flowers, and bergamot flavor) was pretty good, although I already have other Earl and Lady Grey teas that I enjoy. I found the oolong to be okay and drinkable, but will probably pass it on to a friend. The Genmaicha (bancha green tea, popped corn and toasted hulled rice kernels) was horrible on all counts. Upon opening it smelled odd as though something was old or rancid, but I decided to give it a go anyway.  After forcing three sips I had to pour it out. I don't know if I got a bad bag or I just don't have a taste for that blend, but I'm throwing the rest of the bag in the trash. While I enjoyed this box experience (for the most part), I'll be cancelling my subscription since it's a better deal for me to buy tea that I can see, smell and ideally sample first.

rating 3.0. Subscription is a great deal.  I just thought I could pick the teas each month. I am not enough of a tea connoisseur to enjoy the green or black teas if the selection of the month is too strong.  I incorrectly thought that the box would include my selections after the first shipment, but each month it will be their offering for each category.  If you enjoy experimenting, this is a great deal for the amount/quality of tea you get.  Even if you end up tossing a selection a month because you don't like it.  Just be aware that this is not the Netflix of tea.  Your preferences will not affect what is shipped to you.

rating 5.0. Good QUALITY tea! Tea is good quality.  Think TEAVANA, not pre-bagged powders.  4  different  tea types are sent, this is great if you like variety, and trying new flavors.  They send fabric tea pouches to put the tea in, which freaked me out at first b/c I've only ever used paper tea bags, or a tea ball.  I rinsed off the fabric tea bags, got them wet and wrung them out a couple times, poured some tea in and put in my mug.  Worked great.  You can re-use them if you dump out the used tea right away and just rinse them out again.  They send great literature about the 4 teas they send.  This is a FANTASTIC box for the price.

rating 4.0. Not worth the full price The types of teas are wildly varied, which is fun, but the packages are rather small.  Plus the instructions recommend 2 tsps of leaf per cup, which means you go through the tea very quickly.  I did a 1-month trial at 75% off but wouldn't pay the full price.

rating 4.0. Fun way to try lots of teas I subscribed for a few months and have enjoyed trying many of the teas. I skip the little cloth bags altogether (although they're cute!) and just use a full bag of the loose tea in my large French press. It seems like the right amount, and I drink the first half of the tea hot and the second half iced.

My biggest issue is that I want more black tea (caffeine!) and less of the herbal or green. I wish there was a way to subscribe to ONLY get black tea varieties, or ONLY herbal, etc. I'd keep my subscription going if I could skip the green and many of the herbals.

rating 5.0. Favorite subscription box I got this for my husband and me. We both love teas and subscription boxes. The blueblady grey was a little light for our liking. I prefer a full flavored black tea. The Qi Lan oolong is fantastic. It has lots of that good Smokey oolong flavor I like. The green tea was interesting. It has corn and rice in it. I like it and would continue to drink it but probably wouldn’t buy it. The orange rooibus tea was really good. I love rooibus and this one was packed with orange, vanilla, and some sour notes from the hibiscus. I would buy that tea. Overall, we were delighted with this subscription box and I hope we are as impressed with the next ones. I love that it gives us some new flavors to try every month and we get to enjoy this one together.

rating 4.0. Pretty good for the price Overall I think this is a good deal and it's fun getting new teas each month, that's why this is 4 stars

I'm not a big herbal fan and some of their flavor combinations leave me cold, but I've had a couple of very pleasant surprises, including one herbal.

Taste is subjective; bearing that in mind, to me the black tea quality is decent, the green tea somewhat better. Both similar to what I would get in bulk tea at Whole Foods. But I still look forward to my monthly surprise.

current_product_reviews: rating 3.0. The tea variety is fantastic, but... We have received several shipments now, and have thoroughly enjoyed the teas we have received.  The reason I gave them three stars instead of five is because if you want more... tough!  I wanted more of the Vedic, but discovered I could not purchase it from them, nor did they give the maker of the tea to buy it there.

input: rating 5.0. Might have to upgrade! Got this for my wife and she adores it. She brews in a steel teapot that is kept over a light flame to keep it warm over the course of a morning or afternoon during work and absolutely loves the quality and selection of tea. The only problem is that if you are a heavy tea drinker, you'll go through the pack extremely fast.
rating 5.0. New tea varieties I really liked trying the variety of teas you sent. It is nice to be able to try new teas that you would not even know to try.

rating 5.0. A small cup of joy. My daughter is a tea fanatic! When this tea sampler arrived, she acted like it was Christmas morning. Out came the China teapot and cups and we were in business. I had to smell each pouch of exotic tea then taste them. For two straight days we sampled teas. They are fragrantly mixed, interesting and give joy in each steeped cup. I will definately reorder these tea blends and look forward to the happiness this small gift gives my daughter and me especially in these times we are living. Blessings to you all. Relax, breathe, and have a cup of tea with a loved one.

rating 4.0. Pretty good for the price Overall I think this is a good deal and it's fun getting new teas each month, that's why this is 4 stars

I'm not a big herbal fan and some of their flavor combinations leave me cold, but I've had a couple of very pleasant surprises, including one herbal.

Taste is subjective; bearing that in mind, to me the black tea quality is decent, the green tea somewhat better. Both similar to what I would get in bulk tea at Whole Foods. But I still look forward to my monthly surprise.
rating 5.0. Great tea! Bought as a gift and they loved it

rating 5.0. Excellent Tea and Service, Solid Value I've been a tea drinker for many years, and I've been receiving this tea subscription for most of this year.  The quality and variety of teas I've received has been excellent, and the service they provide has been flawless.  I've had absolutely no problems or complaints, and the tea has arrived without fail or issue.  In comparison to other tea subscriptions of similar size and price, I've found that this one is the best value.  I will happily continue to subscribe!
rating 5.0. Nice variety I gave this to a tea lover for a gift and they were very happy with it.

rating 5.0. Every cup of tea is a new adventure Very much enjoying the overall experience. I don't necessarily love every single tea they send, but I do love the variety paired with information about each tea. Add to that, the freedom to brew as much or as little as I like or mix them and brew two or more kinds in the same cup. Every cup of tea is a new adventure. I love it! <3 💖 ☕
Excellent value
rating 5.0. Fun way to try different teas I’ve only had one delivery but have already discovered two new favorites. Hope to see a good variety in the boxes.

rating 5.0. Worth it! Got this for my niece for Christmas, she'll be getting her 3rd subscription box in a couple weeks and she loves it! Everytime I bring it up and ask her what flavors she got, she excitingly goes to grab them, shows them to me and proceeds to tell me about them.
I definitely say it's worth it!

rating 5.0. Great option for new and seasoned tea lovers Love my teas so far! I received my first box and got to brewing right away. The variety is a great mix to try new things and I appreciate the pamphlet inside explaining each tea, what is inside and where it is found. Very clear instructions for brewing time.

rating 5.0. Favorite subscription box I got this for my husband and me. We both love teas and subscription boxes. The blueblady grey was a little light for our liking. I prefer a full flavored black tea. The Qi Lan oolong is fantastic. It has lots of that good Smokey oolong flavor I like. The green tea was interesting. It has corn and rice in it. I like it and would continue to drink it but probably wouldn’t buy it. The orange rooibus tea was really good. I love rooibus and this one was packed with orange, vanilla, and some sour notes from the hibiscus. I would buy that tea. Overall, we were delighted with this subscription box and I hope we are as impressed with the next ones. I love that it gives us some new flavors to try every month and we get to enjoy this one together.
rating 5.0. Really good teas! I am a basic black tea drinker, but these teas entice me a few times a week.  I've never had anything quite like them!

rating 5.0. Giftable One of the flavors just wasn’t for me, but made a good gift. The orange tea was so good and i love that they give you reusable tea bags!! Amazing value and a great way to try more than just plain black tea.

rating 5.0. Beautiful and Delightful: Would be a perfect gift! I was so delighted when I opened this box. The teas were packaged beautifully with reusable tea bags. Each tea had a description and clear packaging in back. I have not tried the tea yet; however, it is beautifully colored and smells very fresh and fragrant.  I also received 2 cards with information about the company and the product.  I bought this for myself and so glad I did. I would Highly Suggest this as a gift.

rating 2.0. Do not order if allergic to rice Many of the tea mixtures include rice! If one is allergic to rice, there is no way to know whether your order will include tea mixtures containing rice, not whether rice May have accidentally made it into a nearby mixture. The packaging is quite nice and it is a great concept for tea on the go, or for a person living alone to enjoy fresher tea in many varieties. The packaging is quite protective and shipping is prompt.

rating 5.0. Best tea I’ve ever had! So fresh. Tea is for the most part the only thing I drink, so my cubbard is packed with brand named teas like Lipton, Twinings, Stash, Bigelow, Tiesta, and tons more and none of them I feel come close to the quality, taste and pureness of Simple Loose Leaf. This is by far the best tea I’ve had before, it’s so fresh and packs so much taste per cup it’s unreal.

The first sampler pack was absolutely delicious and opened my eyes to a few teas I haven’t heard of before, the Genmaicha, which was so unique and refreshing, and the Blue Lady. Their version of the blue lady is my favorite tea I have ever had, period. I bought another lavender earl grey tea at my grocery store since and it was so bitter and harsh comparatively, no comparison.

After my first month that was only $3, I was hooked! I searched up their website and found they offer green, herbal and black tea boxes as well for sale, same as here, $11.99 after shipping. They had a deal, 50% any box subscription so I got green and black for only $6 a piece.
After receiving I was thrilled to received 8 teas that I have never heard of before in my life. I’ve only tried 3 so far, but all have been winners, especially the cranberry orange herbal. I typically HATE herbal but this was incredible and was packed with dried cranberries.

For $11.99, you’re not getting a lot of tea I’m going to be honest, but what you are getting is a nice assortment of high quality tea that you most likely have not heard of before. This is perfect for people like me who is simply bored of the 3-4 choices grocery store shelves provide, and want teas from Africa, India, China, Indonesia and other countries around the world!

I attached a picture of all the teas I’ve received so far, left 4=sampler, middle 4=black box, right 4=green box.

rating 5.0. Get this in your life! I fell in love with Simple Loose Leaf when I tried their Kukicha. If you can nail a relatively obscure Japanese twig tea, you have my attention. I tried the Subscription box on a whim. What a surprise! Not only are they good teas, they’re teas doing good! I loved the blood orange tea and the Oolong was exquisite. I really like the packaging abc the employment opportunities they promote. Customer for life!

rating 5.0. Great Tea!! My wife loves the variety. The quality and flavors are great. I bought the subscription because it was half price for the first delivery.  It is "designer" tea, for lack of a better term and so it seems a little pricey for the amount of actual tea you get.  However, it is beautifully packaged, you get reusable tea bags and the shipping is free.  I will keep this monthly subscription for a while.
rating 5.0. The TEA !!! I love tea! This is an awesome way to try tea. The sellers were so helpful! Thank you!! we will continue our subscription . yay! :)

rating 5.0. Wonderful I love this subscription box. Always a fun assortment of herbal and caffeinated. I have received a few boxes now and I think it is wonderful and very reasonably priced. It's like a little gift to myself every month.

rating 5.0. Tasty quartet of interesting teas Got my first delivery and the teas are delightful. 3 leaf teas and 1 herbal. Interesting combinations of flavors. All 4 are delicious. Love the reusable tea bags too! I am getting several pots out of each flavor, so, a good value as well.

rating 5.0. Absolutely Devine I'm not cancelling out of any malicious intent, I'm merely moving to your website, because you make amazing teas and I think you deserve to keep the cut of your profits that Amazon keeps.
rating 5.0. Highly recommend Received as described. Clear instructions on how to brew each tea. I’ve only tried the blood orange tea, but it was delicious!!  Can’t wait to try the others!

rating 5.0. Nice intro to the tea club I am a 4 cup a day coffee drinker and wanted to try and replace one cup with tea.  New to tea drinking thought I would try this.  Was great, liked the different options, one was no caffeine so that was great at night. Loved the small bags that came with it.  Would be great to include a measuring tool as well, but I recommend trying this club!
rating 5.0. Tasty Rich Robust and Stout Tea 4 ALL SEASONS It has been a while since I ordered tea. I remember receiving it. Oh, what a Glorious Day it turned Out To B...

rating 5.0. Cute, yummy, and fun Loved my first box. The genmaicha (green tea with roasted brown rice) was a standout, and I ordered the full-size package. I love the size of the resealable bags, the cute reusable canvas teabags, and the easy-to-follow instructions. Would make a cool gift, but these are just for me! ;)

rating 5.0. Pleasant! Excellent customer service - won me over!

Generous portions for its price (tea samplers of this quality and portion sizes are usually more costly). I really enjoyed the Blue Lady Earl Grey - fantastic flavor that lingers. I also enjoyed the Blood Orange Herbal Tea a lot - overall, great quality teas for the price! Would definitely recommend.
rating 3.0. If you really have a varied palette, you'll enjoy this. Didn't find the teas that good.  The person I gave it to, really liked all the teas.  Guess it's just a person"s individual taste.

rating 3.0. It's ok This tea was just ok. All the tea leaves seems to be chopped up (such as the oolong) and not very fragrant (such as the genmai). I have box of oolong that I bought in Chinatown and they dried up, whole leaves that expand when you brew it. The genmai that I also bought from Chinatown also is much more fragrant just from opening it up. This tea is probably only slightly better than some good teabags out there.

rating 5.0. Lovely Gift Idea! I got this tea subscription for my teenage daughter. It was a fantastic way for her to learn more about loose leaf teas, and find out which ones she enjoys the most!
The packaging is cute, they send a wide variety of teas, and it is a great value for your money!
Perfect gift!

rating 4.0. Good flavor, not so good packaging The tea tastes great, although a little pricey. Do not like the way it is packaged. Even though the bag is resealable, because of the weird bottom, I have to cut off the bottom to more easily get the tea out of the bag. Reseal it with a bag clip.

rating 3.0. Very little product. Only made 2 cups per sample. I gave this as a gift to my mother who loves and drinks teas daily. I thought this would be enough to enjoy for most of the month. Turns out that each pouch of only 4 in the box each month seeped only 2 cups. Not really worth the price. :(

rating 5.0. Life changing experience The human bark box for all tea lovers. Some of the teas have been a little too strange for me so far, nevertheless, it feels exciting to try new things from all over the world. After a few months of these boxes I no longer buy tea from anyone else.

Some recommendations: blue lady grey, simple earl grey, blood orange, and my favorite so far black vanilla. I love it so much I’ve completely given up coffee.

Highly recommended!

rating 5.0. Impressive This tea is so good! I have always liked a good cup of tea but after trying these I guess I didn't really know what a good cup of tea tasted like. I have finished 3 of the 4 samples from this month and even ordered an entire tin of one of them because it was so wonderful. There is not a lot in each packet but you do get about 4 cups per packet. So, the question is whether it is a good value. Even at full price that is under $1 for each cup. Each flavor is a unique treat so when evaluating it that way it really is not so bad in price. Then when you read the description of the company and all of the good they are doing it just makes it seem like it is the best value in the world. I plan to enjoy month after month of these wonderful teas and get to feel good about where my money is going at the same time. As I sit here writing I am pleased to announce that it is just about "tea time"! Yay!!!!
rating 1.0. Beware: lowest quality possible Dust and stems. Loose leave of the lowest quality. Very disappointing. Not recommended.

rating 5.0. Good QUALITY tea! Tea is good quality.  Think TEAVANA, not pre-bagged powders.  4  different  tea types are sent, this is great if you like variety, and trying new flavors.  They send fabric tea pouches to put the tea in, which freaked me out at first b/c I've only ever used paper tea bags, or a tea ball.  I rinsed off the fabric tea bags, got them wet and wrung them out a couple times, poured some tea in and put in my mug.  Worked great.  You can re-use them if you dump out the used tea right away and just rinse them out again.  They send great literature about the 4 teas they send.  This is a FANTASTIC box for the price.

rating 2.0. Low quality tea. Not impressed at all. When my first box came in, I immediately brewed all four teas, with each one yielding approximately 8 cups.

The teas included were an Oolong, a lavender Earl Gray, a Green Tea with rice in it, and an orange herbal Rooibos tea.

The Earl Gray was very mild and not bad. It doesn't even rank in the top ten Earl Grays that I have had, though. It's probably the best of the four teas that came in the box.

The Oolong Tea was pretty strong, musky, and smelled terrible. I turned it into iced tea to control some of the pungent aroma. When chilled, it's not bad as a sipping tea, but I certainly wouldn't want to try it again.

The Green Tea was pretty unremarkable. It was filled with grains of rice, which didn't add much of anything to the brew. I added some lemon and honey to make it more appealing.

The Blood Orange Roobios tea wasn't bad, but not nearly as tasty as most other herbal teas I've had. I think I'll pass on this one.

I went to their website to check out their Earl Gray tea, and noticed that it is more than TWICE the price of top-grade Earl Gray that I order directly from Assam, India. That is hilarious. It's clear they make their money on marking up unremarkable tea and selling it to their subscribers on the back end.

I cancelled my subscription immediately.
rating 3.0. Not for me I liked only 1 of the 4 teas sent in the shipment, the Blood Orange. This isn't for me.

rating 3.0. Subscription is a great deal.  I just thought I could pick the teas each month. I am not enough of a tea connoisseur to enjoy the green or black teas if the selection of the month is too strong.  I incorrectly thought that the box would include my selections after the first shipment, but each month it will be their offering for each category.  If you enjoy experimenting, this is a great deal for the amount/quality of tea you get.  Even if you end up tossing a selection a month because you don't like it.  Just be aware that this is not the Netflix of tea.  Your preferences will not affect what is shipped to you.
rating 5.0. Excellent tea subscription Favorite tea subscription box! Gives a good variety, well packaged, with helpful notes. Supplements my already large tea collection.
rating 5.0. Beautiful Set This a a wonderful way to experience various teas. Nifty presentation.

rating 5.0. Very Good Tea Four packets of very nice tea! (I don’t really need the cotton teabags, but will try to think of another use for them.) My husband surprised me with this, and I was very pleased!
rating 5.0. Nice variety Lovely variety. It's nice to have a little surprise every month. I will definitely be buying some of these again

rating 5.0. Highly Recommended, Even Though I Canceled. There's not a single thing I disliked about the Simple Loose Leaf Subscription in the 2 months I tried it. I Loved all 8 new tea experiences!

I love the teas and so did a couple of tea loving friends. I canceled because the company's website offers the same teas in the subscription,but in 100 gram packages mostly for under $15. I won't stop ordering their tea, but the value offered in bulk, directly from their website is a better option for my tea drinking habits. I would recommend trying this subscription if you're looking for exotic teas that you'd love to buy a lot more. This subscription will like introduce new all time favorites. I just can't afford to buy a couple varieties while keeping my subscription.

This is the best valued tea subscription available on Amazon. Credit where credit is due. Most are likely overpriced and out of my range.

The canvas bags tie it all together.

rating 5.0. It was a surprise! My wife is a tea fanatic; if you were to look in our "tea cupboard" you would see 50 different (AT LEAST!) varieties of tea, and I am constantly griping to her because there are so many, they fall out if you open that cupboard.  So when I saw this "Tea of the month" club............  PERFECT!!!  She was dumbfounded!  Could not believe that I was adding tea to her collection.  She enjoyed a cup within minutes of opening the box, and I, of course, was the hero.  Great job!!!

rating 3.0. Great idea, but . . . I thought this would be a fun way to try some different teas. I like the packaging, and the reusable, canvas-like, tea bags are a neat idea (if not what is shown in the picture). However, I cannot see trying to clean them after every cup. Most of the tea samples had large amounts of dust and tiny slivers, and I suspect that the end result would have been better if I had actually used the bags. Instead, I used a teapot with a loose-leaf filter. We've tried the orange herbal and the oolong, but we really did not like them. At the end of the day, if you want to try some different teas without committing to a huge purchase, this is one way to do it.
rating 2.0. Where are the bags? Seems like a good concept and idea.  Tea is good but wow...only 4 bags?  That means I get 4 cups of tea....what about the rest?

rating 5.0. Great Opportunity to Learn more about an ancient art! Thanks for a great deal! This is one of the best buys I ever made on Amazon! I always wanted to know more about teas. It helps me to know which I like and which I do not. Thanks to all for a great little box of teas! It shows that 72 year olds can find new tricks and love the process. Thanks a devoted fan!

rating 5.0. If you love tea, you gotta try this box! As a huge tea lover I was so excited to try this box, I was not let down! Loved all of the different flavors, the price is great, and it comes with reusable tea diffusers in case you don’t have one.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Beautiful Tea, beautiful flavor.....Fantastically YUM!  :) Tried the teas and they are wonderful.  Pretty packaging.  Well proportioned packages.  Beautiful flavors.  The explanation of flavor and caffiene level is really nice.  Looking forward to the next box!

rating 5.0. Full size What a great box. It gave me a great assortment of products and or tools. Great sizes of everything. Not 3 washable rounds 4 ur face a whole bag full. Keeping this 1. It helps that it is every other month also.

rating 5.0. Vitamin rich creme first box This is kind of an easy yes for sub box lovers. We all like getting tiny samples but every now and again a full size is best. The packaging was nice too. rating 1.0. They are a high-end or luxury brand.  Too bad my pay dates do not work with their billing dates. I got a sample or two.  It's ok. rating 5.0. Great value & nice surprise gift for myself! Tremendous value for $15 a month. I am very pleased. So far I've gotten the eye creme & the moisturizer. For the pricing (these are far more expensive to purchase directly) I am thrilled.

While I may not know what I'm going to get, i do know it will be a quality product for a crazy good price.

It's packaged up nicely...I will continue with my subscription for months to come.

UPDATE: It's now a year & I am still thrilled with this box. There is one product each month - and this is clearly stated up front . All of the products i have received have been great. I think it's been twice I've gotten newly introduced products - so these aren't overstock or expired. Quality ingredients... the $15 price makes this an incredible value.

rating 5.0. Well presented One full size sunscreen and one sample. Sunscreen is thick- which I think is good.

input: rating 5.0. Easy to follow directons I think what is most important is to have easy to follow directions and examples and the first kit I received had nice easy to follow examples and suggestions. I am looking forward to the next project. I am doing this to try new things I would probably not attempt on my own and this seems to be perfect.

rating 2.0. Everything they promise, and yet still disappointing. Does the box come with everything you need for the craft and clear directions? Yes! Is the end result a craft that you really want to keep? No! Is it worth almost $40/box? Not even close! I love crafting and I was excited to try something new. I didn’t expect that something new to be a box with a stick, string, and beads. (Literally!) Some boxes were better than others, but that stick was the last straw for me.

rating 5.0. Worth it. I have thoroughly enjoyed my once a month craft project, so far nothing to over whelming, easy to follow instructions and mostly all supplies needed are included. I have even added new skills to my crafty repertorie.

rating 3.0. Not what I was hoping for. I was a little disappointed when I got my first box because I love crafting. rating 4.0. Looks fun Bought for a gift. The crafts looked like they would be entertaining. Giftie touch a couple of the boxes but I cancelled after the third box.

rating 5.0. Very nice first kit! I received my first kit today, and it is as promised -- Everything I need to complete is in the kit including the objects this kit is designed for. It's a little pricey for what it is, and I already have the necessary skills.

However, the flip side of the coin is that all the prep work has been done for me! It's a cute project (not saying what it is-no spoilers in this review!) that I could have pulled together myself. But, that would entail my going to the hardware store for part of it and going to the craft store for the rest. Then, at the very least, I would need to get out a pencil, tape measure, an awl and my circular saw. Phew! After that I would be tired of working on the project before I even had a chance to assemble it (I have a very short attention span).

So, pricey goes into making it easy for me to make this project. I do look forward to upcoming kits now. It would be nice for the company to have a survey to find out what the buyer would be interested in learning, as well as those crafts that would totally put the buyer off.

rating 1.0. Cheap, not worth the price. I will be cancelling. It is a great concept to try new stuff, but this months package was MAYBE full of ten bucks worth of stuff. Two dollar store mugs, a cheap pine stand, a sharpie, and white acrylic paint. I don’t consider writing “Mama Bear” with a black sharpie onto a cheap mug...arts and crafts for adults! The directions that are included can be found on any DIY site for free. Save your $!
rating 1.0. Wasn’t worth the money I didn’t think the craft I got was worth the price I paid. I canceled after the first order, there are other subscription services with better value

rating 5.0. Very detailed I love the subscription and idea of receiving new project especially receiving material and tools that are required for specific projects! Unfortunately I personally had to end my subscription but wanted to at least leave on a positive note and did not end my subscription because of issues with the company, I ended my subscription because of personal issues on my end nothing related to adults and crafts subscription. I highly recommend this description if you are a crafter who cannot keep their mind on one project at a time
rating 5.0. Learn something new each box It’s great for kids and adults.

rating 3.0. It is just as advertised, but too wide of a variety for me The crafts were complete and were all varied, but many did not strike my interest.  If you like a really wide variety, then this is great.  If you dont, you probably wont be happy.  Great products though, good quality.  So really, it is as advertised

rating 5.0. Great Idea! I got my first craft box. Everything you could possibly need is included. I am not giving away any clues, because the whole idea is to get a surprise craft project, right? Loved the first one. Fun, easy to complete. The sad part is I have to wait until next month to receive the next one.
rating 5.0. Looks like nice stuff I got my first box I am very excited to get to crafting.

rating 1.0. Not worth it This box was a huge let down for me. At $40, I was expecting a really nice, high quality project. Something like the different projects on their product page. What I got was a zip lock bag full of cement, that leaked out and a bunch of other cheap supplies. Did they lie? No. It’s got everything I need and detailed instructions. It’s also a craft. Is it worth $40, no way. It looks like a year back would have been a great time to be a subscriber, now I would only recommend it if you want Dixie cup sized chunks of cement around your house.

rating 1.0. Junk product & scam I have gotten nothing even close to the value of the wood burning kit listed in the description.
The first month was ok. The project was simple, but at least I got actual products: a sealed tube of paint, glass marker, etc.
Month 3, I got 2 bags of plaster in ziploc bags and a few sizes of Dixie cups. There is also a dollar store folder. The total value of the materials inside is less than $2 and there are absolutely no tools.
This is a scam: this is not even close to the value promised in the subscription write-up where they say you'll get new tools (like a wood burner) and quality materials.
rating 3.0. Not worth the cost The materials and project were not worth the money - you must have some craft skills too :)

What I got was a zip lock bag full of cement, that leaked out and a bunch of other cheap supplies. Did they lie? No. It’s got everything I need and detailed instructions. It’s also a craft. Is it worth $40, no way. It looks like a year back would have been a great time to be a subscriber, now I would only recommend it if you want Dixie cup sized chunks of cement around your house.

rating 1.0. Junk product & scam I have gotten nothing even close to the value of the wood burning kit listed in the description.
The first month was ok. The project was simple, but at least I got actual products: a sealed tube of paint, glass marker, etc.
Month 3, I got 2 bags of plaster in ziploc bags and a few sizes of Dixie cups. There is also a dollar store folder. The total value of the materials inside is less than $2 and there are absolutely no tools.
This is a scam: this is not even close to the value promised in the subscription write-up where they say you'll get new tools (like a wood burner) and quality materials.

rating 5.0. Loved it! I loved my first kit! rating 5.0. I had a subscription with them years ago I'm shocked to see any bad reviews! So I have to share my two cents.

I had a subscription with them a couple years ago, I was impressed with the kit and I'm a picky brat so that says a lot.

Now, you do have to take in consideration that it's possible that you won't love every single craft, it that's what you're expecting, I don't think a surprise craft box is for you. You can always find something online you want to make and go and get supplies yourself. That has nothing to do with this subscription though and shouldn't take away from a positive review. I liked not knowing what id get, and knowing i would have everything I needed to make the craft and I could gift to people who would like ans enjoy the craft made by me.

Even if you didn't get everything you wanted, is it really fair to leave a complaining review? The point is to enjoy crafting and convenience (I think).

rating 2.0. This box will disappoint you a lot So many boxes are so disappointing. The MCU 10 Year anniversary box. The Avengers: Endgame box. These boxes broke my heart. I do not believe for a second that these boxes are chosen by fans.

The 10 year box could have been Cap and Bucky on the train in First Avenger. It could have been Fury and Stark at the bar introducing the Avengers initiative. It could have been any number of iconic moments off the top of my head and it was iron man fighting whiplash.

There were two pops in the Avengers: Endgame box and one was Valkyrie. Valkyrie is a great character. But in 22 movies in the MCU Valkyrie has no business in this box.

Wanda using her powers.
Spidey with the gauntlet
Tony snapping
Baby Antman/Old man Antman
Falcon coming through the first portal

Almost anything would have been better than Valkyrie. I won't forgot how this box was ruined.

current_product_reviews: rating 1.0. FRAUD! NOT KOREAN BEAUTY PRODUCTS! DO NOT SUBSCRIBE! Previously, I was pleased with this subscription box until the last two boxes. December's box didn't arrive until February and I posted a picture of January's box because it was SO unbelievable! The only Korean item in the box was a cheap vitamin serum that was included in a box three months ago. The Corsx pimple patches were also included in a previous box and 4 pouches of them can be purchased on Amazon for $10. The other items are on off brand called Beauty Treats (NOT Korean) that are purchased in bulk on Amazon. I could have purchased multiple quantities of these poor quality items for MUCH less than $35. Claiming this is a Korean beauty box and then sending Amazon brands items is called FRAUD and I have reported this subscription to Amazon as such and demanded a refund.

input: rating 5.0. Educational and entertaining Love this. It came in the mail today and my 10 year old grandson hasn’t put it down!

rating 5.0. 12 Year-Old Daughter Loves This! My 12 year-old daughter loves this. I was concerned because Highlights eludes to younger ages. She was occupied for 2 days straight, figuring out the multiple mysteries in order to solve full crime. Similar to Clue, where you determine Who, What, Where and How. It made her work and think, but she also enjoyed it a lot. We are both looking forward to next box. The first box is not a sample, it is a full size mystery ready to solve.
Continuing subscription as Christmas gift.
rating 5.0. Loved it I loved it but the renewal price is a little high. I’m sad that I have to cancel the subscription

rating 5.0. Best Thing I’ve Bought in a Long Time My eight year old daughter absolutely devoured this. It was so much fun. There are so many pieces to it. She got a passport and stickers for her stamps as she goes to each country. Then we went about solving the mystery and she just thought it was so exciting. There were only a couple puzzles she didn’t enjoy or understand very well out of the approximately  fifteen it came with. Neither of us were in love with the book about Egypt it came with. It was a little too hard dry facts. I’m hoping the other books for the other countries are done a little more creatively. But the rest of it, crossing off who did it and going through the puzzle pages hunting down the clues was just so much fun. I highly recommend it.
rating 1.0. Not interesting None of my kids, ages 7-11, were at all interested. They all enjoy puzzles and reading but this had zero appeal for them.

rating 5.0. Wish I had this when I was a kid! This is a fun way to teach children about different countries. The activities keep you engaged and there is some problem solving required. Plus, the mysteries require that you go back to the country guidebook and read for specific information.
All of this will help your child to improve his or her informational reading. Your child will learn fun and interesting facts about the country and will improve thinking skills along the way. When you figure out the who did it, where did the person do it and what object was involved, there is a real sense of accomplishment. Highly recommend this!

rating 5.0. Exciting The kids called me last night after they received the first box. My granddaughter was very excited . She talked a out the huge map. I have not seen the product myself however my daughter was impressed .

rating 5.0. I'm 33 and I had fun too!! Fun. Had to put that first. I got this for my 10 year old daughter. She is autistic. Once she finds a topic she likes, she wants tons of information on it. This package is nice because it comes with a puzzle book and a fact book. Which was very well written and attention grabbing. The puzzle book was awesome as well. It's not just random puzzles with that country's facts inserted. As you go through the pages you cross off items, locations, and suspects until you know who did it. Very cool concept. I did this with her and I had fun as well. Parent involvement is not needed to complete. I definitely recommend and we are keeping this subscription going in our house.

Was this helpful? Please Shmash that helpful button.
rating 3.0. For elementary age children My 9 year old seemed bored

rating 5.0. My kids are already asking when the next one will be here We got our third one today and my kids (8 & 9) ripped into it with excitement. I did the first one with them and had a lot of fun. The types of puzzles are the same in each activity book, but the content is different per the case. They figured out how to cheat and solve the mazes without looking up the trivia answers in the second month. I told them they had to read this time. It’s a good way of making non-fiction reading fun.

I originally subscribed with the hopes of saving them up to use on a vacation where we will be doing a lot of traveling and waiting, but they’re so excited to get them that I don’t think I’ll be able to manage it!

Save the map, passport and stickers you get the first month, you won’t get it in every package. I didn’t know and ditched the map from the first one. Wish I hadn’t.
rating 5.0. Fun snow day activity! My kids had so much fun with this!  It was educational and the right amount of puzzles to uncover. The materials were well done.
rating 5.0. This is a great gift I bought these for my niece. She LOVED it!! I only planned on a 3 month subscription, but she loved it so much - her grandma took up the subscription.
rating 1.0. Great idea but poor quality Cute idea but the book was unreadable.
rating 5.0. Engaging Daughter loves these kits, actually have to tell her to take a break or she'll be done in a few days!

rating 5.0. Imaginary vacation/missions for kids and family My 7 year old LOVES these! He gets super excited when they arrive in the mail. He loves feeling like a spy-detective. The who-done-it mysteries are cute. My husband does feel that they are a little formulaic and repetative, but my 7 year old still loves it. I love that my son learns a bit about places around the world while on an imaginary adventure. They are fantastic educational tools for the house-bound Corona kids (and parents). We can imagine we've been somewhere else!
rating 5.0. Great mystery box for my 8 yo! She loves it and can do on her own.

rating 5.0. Excellent Product If you have a child who likes to solve mysteries and enjoys learning about history and other cultures, this is perfect for them. My son was hooked right away with the fun letter that explains the mission. We really enjoy the map that was included. This is not a quick activity book, there are so many different activities. We didn't work on it everyday and it took us about a month to complete everything and solve the mysteries which was perfect timing for when we received the next packet.  I am an early elementary teacher and was both pleasantly surprised and am impressed with the variety of activities to complete: search and find, matching, codes, opposites, critical thinking skills, etc. The reading level of the guide book is higher, I would guess about third grade and above, and the activity book would probably be upper second grade or higher. My son was able to read the activity booklet and I would read to him from the Top Secret Guide Book. It was a nice balance for shared reading. So, if you are wondering if this is at the right reading level and interest level for your child, I would say it is good from first grade (with help reading from adult or older sibling) to 5th grade. The older the student, the quicker and more independently they will be able to get through the activities. I highly recommend this.
rating 1.0. Takes too long to ship This takes weeks to ship. Do not recommend.
rating 5.0. Very cool for kids! Our daughter thought it was very cool and is really enjoying doing the passport.
rating 5.0. Loved it!! My daughter (who is 8) loved this, she was so excited when it arrived and can’t wait for the next one.  Plus she learns something at the same time.

rating 5.0. Great learning opportunity The first one we received was about Canada and I think I loved it more than my child! It is beautifully done and very informational, I cannot wait for the next one to come!

rating 5.0. Great for Learning! Loved the box. My kiddo loved going through the puzzle book and looking for answers. Helps with knowledge of the highlighted area and we ended up doing some of it together as a family (which was fun).

rating 5.0. Cancelled but not for why you might think.... My kids are too old. The 12 year old finished the Peru mystery in less than a day, not even completing all the puzzles but instead skipping around looking for the answer.

rating 5.0. Great family activity My niece loved this kit, the instructions were great, each activity was intriguing and she learned about a new country
rating 5.0. Very satisfied! Love it! I wasn’t sure if my 9yr old son would like this or not. He absolutely loves it and couldn’t wait to sit down and start the adventure.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. My Kids Love These! I started homeschooling this year, and I ordered this subscription for my kids (10 & 7).  They both love it.  I have to say that my 10-year-old could do this whole thing in a very short amount of time.  That said, it has a lot of information in it and I just spread it out, doing 2-4 pages a day (each "activity" is two pages).  I love that it comes with the book about the country.  Every month in homeschool, we study a different country, and we decided to just make that country the same country that this mystery is about.  It's a fun surprise of which country we will focus on.  Working on the mystery gives us a lot of talking points about the country too.  I recommend this for sure, but just be prepared if you give it to a kid that can read well and is older, then they can do it very quickly on their own.  It isn't really very challenging.  But my mystery loving kid LOVES it!

input: rating 5.0. Super cute Really cute and well curated box. The toys were well made and adorable. My dogs really likes the treats. Love it!

rating 2.0. One size doesn’t fit all While my dog seemed to enjoy the treats, she couldn’t have been less interested in either of the toys. This box is advertised for dogs that are 0-35lb and they almost need to add in another size. The two toys were larger than my 10lb dog’s head and they were too big for her to carry in her mouth. Since the toys are half of the box, this subscription is not worth it to me. I will not be renewing. Cute idea though.

Treats were a hit! And the Dapper Dog Box arrived on a perfect day! Our large fur baby (80+lb) lab had cancer surgery. Her spirits lifted when I gave her the strawberry plushie and a lavender treat. Awesome feel good box on a not so good day.

rating 4.0. The treats were amazing! My dog tore up the croissants squeaky really fast, she is a chewer!! Didn’t really understand what the hard plastic blue coffee cup shape was for. Wasn’t really a toy she would play with??

rating 5.0. My Dog Loves it😃 The box was such a great deal! My dog is very aggressive with her toys and tears a stuffed animal into shreds in 15 minutes, so I was very worried about the toys durably. The stuffed moose with a squeaker inside that came in the box, has lasted over two days (It was her Christmas present) and is her new favorite toy! She is a Corgi and the box even came with a Corgi Christmas card, the box also came earlier than expected, very pleased!!😃

rating 5.0. So Cute! Great surprise and fun! Great toys and treats/bones to replace older ones. Also so festive so the perfect way to get in any holiday/season spirit!

rating 2.0. Was looking for better quality. I was not a fan. It was my first box. The bandana was cute, but one of the treats my dog did not like. The other is a cake to bake. rating 5.0. DOG VERY HAPPY we liked the toys and the bandanna, but it is very expensive after the first box and i dont think is worth almost 40 dollars for 2 toys , a bandanna and 2 treats, if it would be less, we would go back
rating 5.0. Very cute Box was a little beat up but the stuff inside was so cute and my dogs loved the snacks. Bandana is cute too
rating 3.0. Great suprises.... The box of goodies had doubles. 2 toys, 2 bags of treats 1 scarf. Expensive for what you get.

current_product_reviews:
rating 5.0. Our Dog Loves it Oliver has received two boxes now. All his favorite toys have come from this subscription (and mom loves putting him in the bandanas). Last month, we got treat we never would have bought for him ourselves but it turned out he loved the fruit smoothie flavors. Oliver is very gentle with his toys so I can't say how durable they are but the squeak is very pleasant. We fully intend to continue ordering these boxes.

Photo: Oliver with his favorite toy (all time) from the July Dapper Dog Box

rating 1.0. DO NOT BUY False advertisement.  Waste of money.  It has crap like regular potato chips and everything is tiny.
rating 3.0. Ended subscription after one box Cute idea and an okay selection of snacks, but the items were tiny - sample size almost.  Not worth a $1.80 each.
rating 5.0. Great value And a great way to discover new, healthy snacks.  I'm a fan.

rating 5.0. Great way to discover new snacks! I love this - it's a great, commitment way to explore and discover what works for you. I've discovered things I love and wouldn't have been able to find before, without having to commit to an entire box of each.
rating 2.0. Two Stars I was not a fan of most the snacks

rating 5.0. Great for indecisive people I’m the kind of person who loves to snack throughout the day, but I never know what to get when I’m at the store! This has been a great option for me, as it always gives me a variety of sweet and salty snacks, while simultaneously doing good for the world! The snacks are delicious and there are often healthy options. I love the subscription aspect so I don’t even have to think about ordering it again, and it’s always a pleasant surprise when it’s on my doorstep!

rating 5.0. For my brother who lives in a Full Care Facility. I subscribed to this for my brother who is very lucid but must live in a full care facility due to his Parkinson's. The great thing about SnackNation's subscription is that my brother gets a surprise regularly ... and from my side it is a great because this gift it is healthy. His greatest complaint is that living in a full care facility there is not a lot for him to look forward to ... His care givers report to me that when his snack box arrives he gets so very excited and happy and each day he takes a snack, eats it and feels that he is remembered. Personally I would think this is a great gift for loved ones who live in this circumstance as well as kids away at school...
My wife said little things like this can mean so much to your loved one. It is more than a card and food/snacks are always a great gift. She said remember that his stomach is quite close to his heart ... feed his stomach with a gift of food and warm his heart! Thank you SnackNation for helping Tony feel as if he is remembered by those of us who love him!!

rating 5.0. Creative Snacks You Won't Find Just Anywhere! This product was recommended to me by a friend and at first I was skeptical about the cost but I have been pleasantly surprised!! As a young professional and grad student it is nice to have a selection of healthy and fun snacks to grab on the go. I LOVED the cinnamon sugar cookies, pop triangles, fruit snacks, and jerky! Of all of the items included there was only one I didn't like. These were all snacks that I have not seen at my local grocer so it is fun to branch out and eat more than just granola bars! If this box is in your budget it is a yummy treat!

rating 5.0. quality, healthy snacks When it comes to snacking, quality, variety, and convenience are essential. This box has the perfect mix of sweet and savory, and just the right size to satisfy. My first box already introduced me to several new products and the subscription  model is super easy and affordable. Definitely recommend SnackNation to anyone who cares about staying healthy, but doesn't always have the time to think about it.
rating 5.0. Absolutely terrific Loved the variety of snacks!  Looking forward to my next order!
rating 1.0. Too costly Too much money for what you get canceled after first shipment
rating 5.0. Variety Very good for the most part. Some items are a bit high on the carb spectrum but over all quite tasty
rating 4.0. very good don't care for the gummy bear type low carb., low salt, very good don't care for the gummy bear type stuff
rating 2.0. Small The box was way smaller than I was expecting and the snacks were crammed in it and more like sample sizes than if they were one portion then....😮
rating 4.0. Great service Lots of very yummy choices and I ended up purchasing some of the individual products. Only minor drawback is not customizing choices: i.e. no beef products, etc.

rating 5.0. Good variety of different snacks I would normally not purchase ... Good variety of different snacks I would normally not purchase however since receiving these boxes I have purchased several of the snacks separately. I look forward to trying new snacks every month. Definitely worth it.

rating 4.0. Great way to try snacks Gave a great variety of healthy snacks to try.  The only thing I would suggest s a way to customize snack preferences, but overall a great way to try out new snacks and the ones I don't like others at work enjoy for me!
rating 5.0. Tasty snacks There was a nice selection. Price welled if you like a variety for snacking then this is it!

rating 5.0. I have made several decisions that I consider my best decisions of this year I have made several decisions that I consider my best decisions of this year.  The first was to get my health back on track and lose weight.  The second was to assist this goal by signing up for SnackNation healthy snack boxes.  Why? Because healthy snacks are difficult to try and find when you have no idea what you are looking for.  These boxes come right to my door and are very Weight Watchers friendly.  I have found multiple snacks through SnackNation so far that I now purchase directly from their makers, such as PopCorners chips.  I really appreciate what snacknation offers and will continue to receive these boxes for the foreseeable future.

rating 1.0. What a disappointment - missing two snacks out of an 8-snack box Purchased our first subscription to SnackNation for our college student as a Christmas gift. Thought it would be great for them to receive a box of healthy snacks each month.

The first box showed up and we were going to wrap it and put it under the tree, but decided to see what snacks were sent first. Smart idea we did that because there were only 6 snacks in the box along with a card saying "extra snacks" were added! What a disappointment - there should have been 8 snacks plus whatever "extra" snacks as noted in the added card. Unfortunately, it won't be a gift we'll be giving.

Majorly Disappointed for the subscription price.
rating 5.0. Great gift! I ordered SnackNation for a health-conscious, hard-to-buy-for friend's birthday.  She has thoroughly enjoyed each and every box so far!
rating 5.0. Interesting! some That I dont like, My Roomates liked it. so it is good to share to everyone!
rating 4.0. Variety Excellent surprise of healthy snacks each month.

rating 5.0. This box has consistently surpassed my expectations I don't treat myself often, and I'm glad I went for it with this box.  The contents have been fantastic every month thus far and there were a couple months in a row that were heavy on the dark chocolate and that is the kind of happiness this box has brought me.  Not to mention the worthy cause.

rating 5.0. Interesting and tasty snacks! We look forward to our SnackNation box every month. The snacks they send are tasty, without fail, and usually interesting things we haven't seen before. Each month, we find two or three (we get the 8 snack sampler) that we enjoy so much we go out and find them to purchase more.

I waffled between a 4 and 5 star rating, because as others have commented, it's on the pricier side for snacks. However, I've landed on 5 stars because the product they ship really is top-quality. I know from researching and purchasing more of our favorites that some of these snacks retail for over 2 dollars (I'm sure they get a bulk discount, but the margin seems fair). The risky work of trying these expensive products on our own -- and discovering what we don't like -- is a thing of the past!
rating 1.0. Don't order anything No value at all. All of the products were terrible.

Sorry guys but tastes were just not good.

rating 2.0. Taste and Selection I only enjoy 3 or 4 items from each box that is delivered monthly.  Most of it is too bland for my liking.  I know it is organic and supposed to be good for me, but if I can't eat it, what's the point.  I will be cancelling my subscription next month.
