rating 5.0. Fun! This was real fun!  It had things we knew we’d like and things we had never tried before!  I recommend it!
rating 5.0. Great Selection of snacks! I've been very pleased with the two boxes I've receive so far.  There have been plenty of snacks and all of good quality.

rating 2.0. Disappointed I have been getting the snack boxes for about a year now. When they first started they had a nice variety of healthy options that were different from usual snack fare. The last four boxes however have been a huge disappointment. I have even gotten the same product three months in a row. And the snacks seem to have degraded from actual healthy options to “health halo” options such as natural potato chips. After having been extremely disappointed for the third month in a row now, I am cancelling my subscription. I wouldn’t even recommend this unless you like getting the same things over and over.

rating 5.0. Discover the food you love...literally My boyfriend and I love it

The best part of this snack box is that they also donate 1 box to Feeding America.

They give you all sorts of different healthy snacks and if I don’t like them my boyfriend loves them and vice versa.

The point of a snack box is to try new things with a joy of mystery, and this snack box is perfect for it.

rating 3.0. A Fun Luxury The snacks are mostly small samples of mostly expensive but high-quality snacks.  I've priced some of the ones I like so I know.  I have done this subscription for 3 boxes so far, and have noticed some repeats of brands or actual snacks already.  Not cool.  Hard to keep up the variety perhaps, but not my problem.  If it happens too often, I'll just cancel I guess.

rating 5.0. Great gift idea for family & friends! I ordered a few of these boxes as gifts to send to my siblings and parents. It's been a great way for them to try new snacks without committing to a full sized box of something they've never tried before. We've all found a few favorites too! If you're looking for a gift idea, I highly recommend checking out SnackNation!
rating 2.0. nothing great dont buy it, its not worth the price or the taste
rating 5.0. Try something new! Like trying different items in small amounts.
rating 5.0. Snack Natiom LOVE THIS BOX , SO FULL TASTEY  AND NEW SNACKS. THERE VERY CREATIVE.
rating 1.0. Not worth it Terrible quality and quantity for the price. Odd snacks that seemed old and stale. Waste of money

rating 5.0. 10/10 Recommend! I saw some negative reviews and was a little worried about subscribing, but wow am I impressed! Definitely worth the money. I got my first box and haven’t tried a single product that’s disappointed. I’m always on the hunt for healthy snacks that don’t taste like salty cardboard, so this is perfect for me! A good many of the negative comments were about the snacks all being health conscious snacks, but it’s says that in the description, sooooo... Anyways, you should give it a try. Get less snacks if you’re iffy, but I think you’ll be pleasantly surprised.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Glad we tried it! Great idea, i bought this for my son who is 11 he didn't like everything, so his Dad and i will eat the rest.  The snacks are on the healthier side which is one of the reason like this box, also the idea of trying something new each month is fun. . Love the Pineapple, coconut chips!

input:
rating 5.0. They loved all the toys My 3 cats loved all the toys, and the box. I had to take 2 toys away so they wouldn't have them spread throughout the house. My one cat loves the box and a month later is still climbing into it and napping, despite her being too big for it and spilling over the sides.
I don't really need to receive a monthly supply of cat toys - my cats are pretty good at not destroying them. But was glad to have some fresh ones with this box.

rating 5.0. Excited kitties Update: The red cardinal they got in one box had to be thrown away. It was loved a bit too much by all the kitties. 4 cats 'loving' on it left it in tatters. I hope we get another one. haha

I get the dietary box so get one more toy instead of treats. We have 4 cats which two have food allergies. One of our kitties was with me when we got the last box. I sat on the floor with him. He was so excited he was nuzzling and playing the the toys while I was trying to detach them from the cards. He loved everything in it, then rolled in the box. One of the other kitties has been playing with the box. He likes to nudge it open (it's upside down) to get under it. I've considered cancelling it, but they get so excited over it (whoever happens to be near when I open it) that I won't. All four have been enjoying the toys. They still play with the toys they have gotten in previous boxes. We're getting a little stacked up with toys, so I may put some away and bring them out at another time. Just like human kids' toys. haha

rating 5.0. Always a pleasure Our cat has enjoyed every treasure to the fullest but i had to stop the subscription because i think we have too many toys now lol. I will order again soon as it is cheap and worth the expense.

rating 1.0. Not worth it.  Not as advertised. The box is advertised as containing toys, treats and goodies.  I gave this a try in response to a marketing email Amazon sent me.  What I received was a box with five stuffed toys (that’s it!), all made in China and two were exactly the same.  No treats and no goodies.  Definitely not as shown in the pictures.

rating 4.0. So much fun! We subscribed to KNB many years ago and one of Moose’s favorite toys was a spaceship from a space themed box. We joined again this month and our first box was another space themed box! Guess what the favorite toy was? A rocket ship. Moose nosed around and played with some of the toys before grabbing the rocket and running away with it, clearly claiming it as his. Here he is, snuggled up with it.  Another cat claimed the star wand, another the astronaut, and even the empty box has enjoyed some attention! So glad we rejoined! :)

rating 5.0. Two for two so far! Two paws way up! Maybe I should be embarrassed but honestly, I’m so dang impressed by the curated collection of toys this team put together for my cat.
I ordered her a box on a whim when they were the Deal of the Day... I chose the treats option and the first box arrived pretty soon after. My cat and I snuck a peak at the ‘Off to College’ themed KitNipBox before my husband (dad) got home and I knew she was into it the moment I lifted the lid. She caught the scent of the cat-nip laundry sack, and it was ON. She made a fool of herself when dad finally gave it to her... I’m talking chewing on it, rolling over like a dog, and all around turning into a feline frenzied fool.
Just yesterday, box 2 came. This time it was a safari theme... and my cat was SITTING on the box waiting for one of her slow brained parents to OPENTHEBOX! Got it, kiddo. Out came feathers on a stick - a classic favorite... a crinkly elephant which she immediately crunched to death... a catnip toy which is strangely MIA this morning... a toy hat with a bell that has impressive air-time when tossed like a frisbee and I think something else my husband stashed from her.
I love that this takes the annoying portion of finding toys that she wants/likes at the big name stores and paying the ridiculous prices out of the picture. I don’t have to spend an hour searching for them on amazon either. Someone who clearly knows cats is doing that for me. And since my cat is just a tad fat (I sympathize though, it’s hereditary,) I love that I can get her one that’s all toy focused. It’s a total win from this feline mom!

rating 5.0. Old Cats Like It They all come running - seems they all know the box has arrived. On our 3rd box now for my five 13 and 14 year old kitties. This month was the safari themed box. They like everything in it. The mama-cat went wild with the 'vest', throwing it up in the air, tossing it about. It's great to see her playing again.

Most of my toy choices simply weren't working for my kitties. Their one favorite mouse product was discontinued by the manufacturer a few years ago and the extras I bought are slowly dying. They had no interest in the toys I was getting them except the glitter ball. So, I tried a Kitnip box to see if they could improve on what I was buying and it has been pretty successful. I get the box without the treats, so they get an extra toy. So far, out of 3 boxes, only 2 toys were not played with - those went to my sister who has much younger cats.

Here's the thing - it's not going to work for all cats. If your cat tears toys apart, your cat will tear these apart as well. They are well made toys, but they are not indestructible. Some of my cats like big toys, some prefer teeny tiny toys. I was actually surprised Mama was playing with the safari vest as she is normally exclusively a tiny toy cat. Pricewise, not bad - the average toy at Petsmart is $5-7. So 5 toys for $20 is pretty reasonable especially since they are playing with most of them! Each box includes a wand-like toy for you to encourage them to movement, although the one that hung on the door was of no interest to my older cats.

rating 3.0. Feathered wand string not cat friendly My cat was in love with the box before it was opened. The toys were being attacked before I could remove the packaging. But, when the wand was untangled for her to play with, she bit into the elastic type string and it was broken off within 2 minutes of play. Tied the 2 ends together, she bit that off within 1 minute. String was removed and the wand thrown away and she just has the feathers to play with now. I am hoping she didn't swallow any of that string. Will see how she does with the next box, but the company needs to seriously get a sturdier wand string like the ones I get from the pet stores or even Walmart & Target. She has had those for years without breaking the string with her teeth.

rating 5.0. Meowy nice! Really cute items and my cat especially loved the crinkly kicker! The bag of catnip (in lieu of treats) will come in handy to stuff some of his other toys. We can't wait to see next month's box.

rating 4.0. My cat loves this! I didn't realize that my cat even cared about toys since he only ever played with one dog toy in the house.  However, through buying these monthly boxes, I see that there are some toys he absolutely loves and others he could care less about.  I gifted the ones he didn't like to a friend who told me about how much her cat loved some of them.  So, I guess all cats have their preferences.  I keep digging his favorite toys out from underneath the fridge and stove and give the ones he doesn't care about to other cat owners hoping they will find a happy home.  While I've stopped my subscriptions for a time, I fully intend to subscribe again in the future.

rating 1.0. Overpriced, cheap toys These were really cheap toys- I got the first box discount which made it the same price as what I’d pay in a store for them, but otherwise it would be way overpriced

rating 1.0. Once again no T-shirt, no collecter pin, no pop exclusive art comic book This is my third Funko box and the I have to say I'm disappointed. My first one was the Captain America civil war and that box was AMAZING! a shirt, collector pin, pop figurine, comic book, patch and so on. I then tried the Avengers Infinity War which was the last run before it went to amazon. No T-shirt, no collector pin, and no comic book but a pretty cool mug and a cool pop figure. Now comes this Deadpool box and AGAIN I'm disappointed. NO t-shirt, NO collector coin, NO collector patch, NO Funko artwork comic book! The ONLY thing I liked was the pop figurine that you can find in a lot of places so don't let them fool you into thinking its a Funko box exclusive. C'MON FUNKO! go back to your older box format already! As of right now I CANNOT recommend this box to anyone who loves getting loot boxes. You get one more shot with the Venom box and that only because I loved the Venom character growing up. If you guys can't deliverer then I'm out.

rating 5.0. Love this box I loved my box. The Deadpool on a unicorn figure was the hit of my office. I cannot wait for the next one.

rating 3.0. hoping the next one is much better when the announced that the marvel collectors club funko was not being done, then announced amazon was going to handle it i was bummed then happy. i knew they could not get shirts done for the first box so was not expecting a shirt at all .
overall the pop was fantastic, but not worth the cost of the box. the luggege tag was nea. . a tiny funko sealed mini and that taco holder where not up to par. that taco holder was beyond silly and not in a good way.
enamel pins and patches where a huge part of the old boxes for sure and need to be brought back to these new boxes. i am hoping that the VENOM box will be much better. if not i will need to determine if i plan to continue getting these.

rating 3.0. So-so first box, hoping it improves I was a founder with the original MCC box when Funko was producing it, so I haven't missed a box yet. Now that Amazon has taken it over, I am optimistic that the box will get better. For those that are unfamiliar with the MCC Box, when Funko started it, each box was unique and had comic print on the inside of the box that corresponded with the box theme. The box also contained a contents card so you knew what was in the box, a pin, a patch, an exclusive variant cover comic, a shirt (or on rare occasions a hat), an exclusive Pop figure and several smaller Funko items.

With that being said, let's start off with the POSITIVES about the Deadpool box ....the Pop figure was nice and unique, and the luggage tag was nice. The NUETRALS are the taco truck 2 taco holder and the fairly unimpressive generic box. It is a different item that I never would have thought to sought out on my own. The NEGATIVES are the Pop keychain (not impressed), the lack of a contents card listing the items that are contained within the box, no exclusive variant cover comic, no wearable item, no pin, and no patch. I will stay subscribed at this point to see where Amazon goes with this, but if the quality of items doesn't increase....there are other things I can, AND WILL, spend my money on.

rating 1.0. "wow, that's small" - disappointment at first glace Right from the opening of the mail box it was disappointing.  I ordered the Dead Pool box last month and it was decent with some fun items.  This one... flop.  I'm highly considering cancelling my subscription.  Surely not worth the cost of $30 between the pop vinyl and t-shirt.  A stressball, sticker and micro figure wouldn't add that much value either.

rating 1.0. A Review of the Deadpool Box... Follow-up SO, I have been getting the FMCC Boxes for a few years and I have always loved the attention to detail and care of thought put into them. BUT, this recent box was lackluster. The POP! was still very cool as was the little collectible items with it, but I felt less enthused by the packaging and lack of description card. Maybe this is more cost effective, but it actually cost more than the previous box... sooo, I'm at a loss for that one. I know that it's just a box, but We have been saving them over the years. I suppose the biggest thing I'm saying is that in my opinion the price increase does not show in the creation of the package. It's our hope that they will put a little more of the previous thought and care into the next one. (but of course we will probably continue to collect them as long as they continue to come with wickedly cool POP!s) 4 Stars because the guts were still pretty rad.

**Edit: We have Cancelled the Sub. It wasn't worth the money, not even my Husband's favorite "Venom" could save the subscription. It is really disappointing to find that they have put such little attention to the details that the previous boxes had and get they increased the prices on us! I am considering posting pictures of my old boxes with their contents next to one of these new ones so there can be no questions or comments about "how can there be so many low star reviews". It's just a disappointment plain and simple.

rating 2.0. Not worth the asking price I signed up for the Deadpool box originally and let this continue on to the Venom box. I love both of the characters so I thought why not. The Deadpool box left a lot to be desired, the taco holder and luggage tag were just meh. The Pop was neat as is the mini pop but they were NOT worth the $29.99 price.

The Venom box though.. wow, INCREDIBLY underwhelming. A decal (not sure where I'm going to stick this but okay), a pint size hero which is almost clear and mine has a defect in the head), a "stress ball" but it's less of a stress ball and more of one of the foam squish toys which are popular with kids these days, the pop is not bad (though the red lips are too red IMO), and a shirt. I don't understand why the shirt is dark blue with light blue images and writing and not black with white writing.

Incredibly let down, I've cancelled my membership and I will not be ordering another box. Sorry Funko but this was a letdown.

rating 1.0. Awful [Venom Box] Look, I am a huge Venom fan. I'll buy almost anything with him in it. But this box was a massive letdown. I stopped my lootcrate sub for dropping in quality but that was only 19 a month. For $30 (per box) I was hoping for a bit more quality of the items I got. I get it's a Funko box, so I assumed I'd have to get a Funko Pop figure. So here's what my 30 bucks got me:
- A venom face car decal (not bad)
- A venom Pop figure (It's okay, not great, and he's throwing up some kind of green goo)
- A playskool figure. Like the old kind...that was just a wood ball glued on a cylinder. It had venomish eyes and jagged teeth so I guess it 'counts' but come-on...
- A square stress ball with a venom decal on it. meh.
- Tee Shirt? So at this point I'm thinking, hey at least I get a cool Venom tee shirt out of this thing. NOPE. It's a shirt that says venom with the funko pop decal version of venom's head. Seriously? It would have even been better to just have it say Venom. That would be far better than the funko pop head slapped on there.

I like collecting marvel things so I am square in the demographic here, but seriously this was a waste of money. I kinda wish I could just send the box back.

rating 2.0. Amazon SHIPPERS! Please Remember the Box is Collectable TOO! rating 2.0. Three boxes in, and things aren't looking too good. The Deadpool Box was fairly uninspiring. The Pop! was great, but the rest, not so much.

I loved the Venom box. Great pose for Venom, nice shirt, neat pint-size, decal. Your mileage may vary, but it was a step up, I thought.

The First Ten Years box? This one makes me wonder if Funko is even involved in curating the items. Funko boxes used to look like boxes for fans, by fans. But this latest looks like it was planned by someone with little investment in the community.

For starters, how about that centerpiece? Iron Man vs. Whiplash. If you like Iron Man 2, great. None of the Marvel films have been absolute stinkers, not even Dark World. But Iron Man 2 isn't at the top of people's lists. And, perhaps more to the point, it is not worth commemorating in a celebration of Marvel Studios first ten years. Why not surprise and delight customers and do a Movie Moments diorama with Thor coming down on Cap's shield? Or if that already exists, surely there's something else out there. Even an exclusive Thanos Pop! marking some significant moment from Infinity War would have been a more fitting thing.

As for the rest of the items, I don't think Pint-Size are bad, or even the Pez, but the characters are not immediately recognizable in gold, and I had to look at the back of the package (with characters in color) to recognize Thor. And between the Pez and one of the Pint-Size, you've got two items from Ragnarok!

No Cap, no Guardians, and a lot of wasted space for Whiplash. People will always disagree about the class of item included, but the themes should always make sense. And for a box advertised as a celebration of the first ten years of Marvel Studios, this is an utter failure.
rating 5.0. Amazing! Loved the items, love the presentation. I regret not getting another one. I especially love the shirt!

rating 5.0. Perfect for fans of Funko and Marvel I don't understand all of the one star ratings for this subscription program. 28% of the people to review this give it one star which really skews the overall rating. I've received four of these now and I've never been dissatisfied. But I knew that some months you would get things you really liked and some months you would get things that weren't that exciting. It kind of depends on what you are a fan of. If you are a Marvel fan, and if you are a fan of Funko products, you will love this. Every other month there's that excitement and anticipation to see what will be in the next box. I usually hang on to the figures and the t-shirts. Some of the smaller items I give to friends or my wife or my kids. They love the little tokens. My friend sent me a photo of his luggage with the Deadpool luggage tag. I don't understand why people who aren't fans purchase these items and then downgrade them when they are exactly as advertised. I wish there were more programs like this in Amazon.

rating 4.0. A Good, Not Great Start to Collector Corps Going through Amazon This review is for the first Funko Marvel Collector Corps Box being distributed through Amazon.

For me the first major improvement (and I feel it is a huge one) was the time for me to receive the box after launch. I had my box in a few days where as the old subscription would take a week or more through DHL.

The box came with a nice POP! Deadpool figure but after that it was really lacking I felt. The taco holder and the luggage tag were mediocre at best and I felt they have been removing a lot of value in this box over the last several months - no more t-shirts it seems, definitely no more comics and now the pin and patch are gone.

I am hoping that the Venom box delivers some better items to go with the POP! figure.

rating 1.0. Got this subscription for my wife, I am embarrassed Well....here’s the deal. I subscribed to this Marvel fan pack for my wife. She has always been an avid follower of The Marvel Universe and I figured this was the perfect thing to surprise her with. I had read thru all the less than encouraging reviews before her box got here and thought ,oops I may have made a mistake here. After reading about only partial boxes where not everyone got the same items and the less than thrilled attitudes of serious collectors I was worried . Well, I figured it was the first shipment after the Marvel/Funko merger, and she would be getting the next box and it should be much better right? Well, I kid you not, my wife not only did not receive the next collector box in the series (she was sent the Deadpool box), And, she was sent a box with only 3 fricken items in it.
A lot of people complained about the items they received and I agreed with most of them. But how about getting your first fan box which was to have 4-7 top quality collectors items in it and having only three things in the whole box!!!!, the main Deadpool on the unicorn, a key chain and a piece of crap taco truck.

I am flabbergasted and am leaving it up to my wife as to whether she wants to give it one more try or just cancel the subscription as an idea that was meant well but fell short.

I am so angry at this joke that I can’t figure out why anyone would want to continue their sub knowing what a farce Funko and Amazon have made out of this. Oh well live and learn.

What a rip-off!!! $30 for a $5 statue a .50 key chain and a plastic taco piece of trash that has no monitory value!
rating 2.0. Going to give it one more chance Received the deadpool box, my 13 year old wasn't thrilled. Going to try again with venom to decide on keeping the subscription or not.

rating 2.0. Not worth the asking price I signed up for the Deadpool box originally and let this continue on to the Venom box. I love both of the characters so I thought why not. The Deadpool box left a lot to be desired, the taco holder and luggage tag were just meh. The Pop was neat as is the mini pop but they were NOT worth the $29.99 price.

The Venom box though.. wow, INCREDIBLY underwhelming. A decal (not sure where I'm going to stick this but okay), a pint size hero which is almost clear and mine has a defect in the head), a "stress ball" but it's less of a stress ball and more of one of the foam squish toys which are popular with kids these days, the pop is not bad (though the red lips are too red IMO), and a shirt. I don't understand why the shirt is dark blue with light blue images and writing and not black with white writing.

Incredibly let down, I've cancelled my membership and I will not be ordering another box. Sorry Funko but this was a letdown.

rating 1.0. A Review of the Deadpool Box... Follow-up SO, I have been getting the FMCC Boxes for a few years and I have always loved the attention to detail and care of thought put into them. It's our hope that they will put a little more of the previous thought and care into the next one. (but of course we will probably continue to collect them as long as they continue to come with wickedly cool POP!s) 4 Stars because the guts were still pretty rad.

**Edit: We have Cancelled the Sub. It wasn't worth the money, not even my Husband's favorite "Venom" could save the subscription. It is really disappointing to find that they have put such little attention to the details that the previous boxes had and get they increased the prices on us! I am considering posting pictures of my old boxes with their contents next to one of these new ones so there can be no questions or comments about "how can there be so many low star reviews". It's just a disappointment plain and simple.

rating 2.0. Three boxes in, and things aren't looking too good. The Deadpool Box was fairly uninspiring. The Pop! was great, but the rest, not so much.

I loved the Venom box. Great pose for Venom, nice shirt, neat pint-size, decal. Your mileage may vary, but it was a step up, I thought.

The First Ten Years box? This one makes me wonder if Funko is even involved in curating the items. Funko boxes used to look like boxes for fans, by fans. But this latest looks like it was planned by someone with little investment in the community.

For starters, how about that centerpiece? Iron Man vs. Whiplash. If you like Iron Man 2, great. None of the Marvel films have been absolute stinkers, not even Dark World. But Iron Man 2 isn't at the top of people's lists. And, perhaps more to the point, it is not worth commemorating in a celebration of Marvel Studios first ten years. Why not surprise and delight customers and do a Movie Moments diorama with Thor coming down on Cap's shield? Or if that already exists, surely there's something else out there. Even an exclusive Thanos Pop! marking some significant moment from Infinity War would have been a more fitting thing.

As for the rest of the items, I don't think Pint-Size are bad, or even the Pez, but the characters are not immediately recognizable in gold, and I had to look at the back of the package (with characters in color) to recognize Thor. And between the Pez and one of the Pint-Size, you've got two items from Ragnarok!

No Cap, no Guardians, and a lot of wasted space for Whiplash. People will always disagree about the class of item included, but the themes should always make sense. And for a box advertised as a celebration of the first ten years of Marvel Studios, this is an utter failure.

Perfect for fans of Funko and Marvel I don't understand all of the one star ratings for this subscription program. 28% of the people to review this give it one star which really skews the overall rating. I've received four of these now and I've never been dissatisfied. But I knew that some months you would get things you really liked and some months you would get things that weren't that exciting. It kind of depends on what you are a fan of. If you are a Marvel fan, and if you are a fan of Funko products, you will love this. Every other month there's that excitement and anticipation to see what will be in the next box. I usually hang on to the figures and the t-shirts. Some of the smaller items I give to friends or my wife or my kids. They love the little tokens. My friend sent me a photo of his luggage with the Deadpool luggage tag. I don't understand why people who aren't fans purchase these items and then downgrade them when they are exactly as advertised. I wish there were more programs like this in Amazon.

rating 1.0. Got this subscription for my wife, I am embarrassed Well....here’s the deal. I subscribed to this Marvel fan pack for my wife. She has always been an avid follower of The Marvel Universe and I figured this was the perfect thing to surprise her with. I had read thru all the less than encouraging reviews before her box got here and thought ,oops I may have made a mistake here. After reading about only partial boxes where not everyone got the same items and the less than thrilled attitudes of serious collectors I was worried . Well, I figured it was the first shipment after the Marvel/Funko merger, and she would be getting the next box and it should be much better right? Well, I kid you not, my wife not only did not receive the next collector box in the series (she was sent the Deadpool box), And, she was sent a box with only 3 fricken items in it.
A lot of people complained about the items they received and I agreed with most of them. But how about getting your first fan box which was to have 4-7 top quality collectors items in it and having only three things in the whole box!!!!, the main Deadpool on the unicorn, a key chain and a piece of crap taco truck.

I am flabbergasted and am leaving it up to my wife as to whether she wants to give it one more try or just cancel the subscription as an idea that was meant well but fell short.

I am so angry at this joke that I can’t figure out why anyone would want to continue their sub knowing what a farce Funko and Amazon have made out of this. Oh well live and learn.

What a rip-off!!! $30 for a $5 statue a .50 key chain and a plastic taco piece of trash that has no monitory value!

So many great options and they pick Whiplash from Iron Man 2? 2 gold Pint Size Heroes are cool and a gold Hulk Pez is alright. This bos is a disservice to fans.

Just got the Venom box. The Pop looks great, the t-shirt is okay, the rest is just junk.

This is my 8th Marvel Collector Corps Box and 1st since Amazon took over the subscription. Lots of people here have commented on the value of the box. I felt like it was fair but not great. Taking into account that a POP! RIDE similar to this retails for $29.99 and a POP! KEYCHAIN for $6.99 I didn't get ripped off. I would have preferred a t-shirt or a 2nd POP! but the items were cute. Prior to Amazon taking over the subscription some of the extras had gotten questionable. They need to stick to what their customers enjoy POP! figurines and t-shirts. I will be giving this one more shoot. Hopefully the Venom box will be better.

rating 1.0. Awful [Venom Box] Look, I am a huge Venom fan. I'll buy almost anything with him in it. But this box was a massive letdown. I stopped my lootcrate sub for dropping in quality but that was only 19 a month. For $30 (per box) I was hoping for a bit more quality of the items I got. I get it's a Funko box, so I assumed I'd have to get a Funko Pop figure. So here's what my 30 bucks got me:
- A venom face car decal (not bad)
- A venom Pop figure (It's okay, not great, and he's throwing up some kind of green goo)
- A playskool figure. Like the old kind...that was just a wood ball glued on a cylinder. It had venomish eyes and jagged teeth so I guess it 'counts' but come-on...
- A square stress ball with a venom decal on it. meh.
- Tee Shirt? So at this point I'm thinking, hey at least I get a cool Venom tee shirt out of this thing. NOPE. It's a shirt that says venom with the funko pop decal version of venom's head. Seriously? It would have even been better to just have it say Venom. That would be far better than the funko pop head slapped on there.

I like collecting marvel things so I am square in the demographic here, but seriously this was a waste of money. I kinda wish I could just send the box back.

rating 5.0. MARVEL COLLECTOR CORP BOXES - LOVE EM If you collect Funko Pops, specifically Marvel Funko Pops, the collector Corp boxes are a good deal. From time to time, they fall short, like any other Funko item. However for the price on Amazon and whats in the Box, its usually a good investment. Depending if you are a real collector, or someone looking to just make a buck flipping, will be the difference. I love Marvel, and the Marvel Funko Pop Line. I don't buy to rip people off with super inflated prices, I buy for enjoyment. If that's the case for you (reading this), subscribe and enjoy !!!

rating 4.0. A Good, Not Great Start to Collector Corps Going through Amazon This review is for the first Funko Marvel Collector Corps Box being distributed through Amazon.

For me the first major improvement (and I feel it is a huge one) was the time for me to receive the box after launch. I had my box in a few days where as the old subscription would take a week or more through DHL.

The box came with a nice POP! Deadpool figure but after that it was really lacking I felt. The taco holder and the luggage tag were mediocre at best and I felt they have been removing a lot of value in this box over the last several months - no more t-shirts it seems, definitely no more comics and now the pin and patch are gone.

I am hoping that the Venom box delivers some better items to go with the POP! figure.

rating 1.0. Big changes. None good. When compared to previous boxes released by Funko directly this one fell way short.

Previously the boxes were well more thought out, and had attention to detail.

1. The art work on the old boxes was always appreciated and caused the box to be an item to keep as well

2. A card use to be included providing some cool information regarding all of the items and the Focus character.

3. Usually a pin, patch, or comic with a unique funko cover art was included.

3. Only 1 item in the box was of excellent value The actual POP and 1 nice to have the jet chain. Unlike previous boxes whereas there were a seveela nice to have items. Vice filler junk.

4. People are stating that this of us who question the changes are wrong like who needs a patch. Well when you’re a collector and vaulue the details those small
Items really do make a diference and create a sense of pride in the membership.

Well that’s long enough. I sure hope the the feedback is well received and that updates are made to bring things back to where they were just a couple months ago. Take care

rating 3.0. Using Deadpool Box for review as base have been ordering since Marvel Collector Corp was first announced which I still love because of the Hulkbuster PoP. So i am very curious to wonder why the switch to Amazon. After receiving this Deadpool box, i am intrigued that this box is glossy compared to the original printer brown cardboard box. There's less artwork on these boxes which was disappointing.
As for the contents sole based on the Deadpool box, i got exactly 4 items. No shirt and was very disappointed and even more sad there are no Collector Pins and Patches. So it appears these boxes now collaborating with Amazon have less items for your money's worth. So hence for the 3 stars. hopefully the next Venom box will change my mind.
As the exact items in this Box
1. Deadpool on Unicorn Pop - Great Exclusive as all PoPs are from Collector Corp
2. Taco Holder - Interestingly weird but cool
3. Mini Key Chain Pop of Deadpool - If you're into smaller key-chain PoPs great, unfortunately I am not
4. Deadpool Luggage Tag - cool but not worth the money you're paying for in the box.

rating 1.0. Don't buy this unless you're an avid fan of the featured character. Attached is the card that came in the box showing all of its contents.

Frankly, this isn't "Collector" Corps. There isn't anything to collect in this box. The only reason we're remotely okay with its contents is that we love the featured character.

We've paid $30 for a Pop! figure and a t-shirt. It's not upsetting in this case, but it would be if we weren't fans. There is no incentive whatsoever for this to be a subscription service. There isn't anything collectible about it besides the Pop and the t-shirt.

input: rating 1.0. For $30 I Expect Better While the Funko Pop in the Deadpool and Venom boxes were neat, the rest of the box contains nothing of value. Deadpool providing a taco holder and baggage tag, Venom having a decal and stress ball. Poor quality items. Considering a pop is generally $10-15 and I have spent $30 per box, this is hugely disappointing. I’ll give it one last try with the Marvel Stud10s box, but that’s just for the Pop. Unless that box really delivers something special, I’m going to unsubscribe from this horrid bastardization of what once was a great subscription service.

rating 2.0. Not great value as it used to be. Feel like they offer less and less, but go up in price. This is my first box since it switched to Amazon and I was very disappointed. Although I love the exclusive pops that came with Endgame's box (Cap with Hammer especially), it felt like a missed opportunity. I love Valkyrie but it would've made wayyyyy more sense to have Iron Man as the 2nd exclusive pop! Come on! It's the most monumental, iconic, and recognizable aspect of the film! I would've been such a strong box if it had Cap and Iron Man, the biggest curtain calls for the film (Black Widow still has a chance in her solo outing).

The box really doesn't have much other things to offer. The shirt was cool..... and then I got coasters.....coasters????? I paid $35 for coasters???? They're cute but not $35 cute. I felt cheated, especially as I had gotten these boxes when it was just from collector corps. Now there's no pins, nor other funko figures other than the pops (which are great but again, missed opportunity to better match theme). Just feeling like the exclusives are very basic items.

Here's to hoping Spider-Man's box is better. If not, I'm gonna have to cancel and just buy the exclusive pops elsewhere. It'd be around the same price anyways....

rating 1.0. Done. I tried to give the benefit of the doubt here, but I cant keep my subscription anymore. Way to reach into the depths of marvel and pick something special. Why not give us creator pops like ditko, kirby, romita instead of ANOTHER thanos and ANOTHER loki. The pin was cool, but the decal is weak. This could have been so good with nearly endless possibilities, but you chose to be lazy and press the button on the pop maker that is nearly worn out from being used too much. Thanks for nothing.

rating 2.0. Disappointed. First I will say, it seems like they might have been somewhat listening, I saw a lot of comments that mentioned the address labels on the collectible box, because my box was put inside a plain shipping box.
As for the contents, I'm super disappointed. 10 years of Marvel studios cinema, there are so many iconic moments, one liners, beloved characters, and of course Stan Lee's cameos. I did not dislike Iron man 2 personally, but it isn't what I would choose to sum up the franchise, the first Iron man or Avengers seems infinitely more iconic? And then nothing else in the box was even something I would buy, they were just little fillers in my opinion, the general feel of the contents was what can I cheaply throw in. I love Ragnarok, but 20 movies and only 2 represented, one 3 times? The other of which is generally considered one of the least favorites of the universe by fan consensus. I would not have spent $20 on this box personally, knowing whats in it, and how little of the whole marvel cinematic universe it represents. No Cap, No Ant-man, No Spider-man, No Guardians. So many options, so little delivery, so disappointing.
Doubt I'll consider any of the future boxes.

rating 3.0. Using Deadpool Box for review as base have been ordering since Marvel Collector Corp was first announced which I still love because of the Hulkbuster PoP. So i am very curious to wonder why the switch to Amazon. After receiving this Deadpool box, i am intrigued that this box is glossy compared to the original printer brown cardboard box. There's less artwork on these boxes which was disappointing.
As for the contents sole based on the Deadpool box, i got exactly 4 items. No shirt and was very disappointed and even more sad there are no Collector Pins and Patches. So it appears these boxes now collaborating with Amazon have less items for your money's worth. So hence for the 3 stars. hopefully the next Venom box will change my mind.
As the exact items in this Box
1. Deadpool on Unicorn Pop - Great Exclusive as all PoPs are from Collector Corp
2. Taco Holder - Interestingly weird but cool
3. Mini Key Chain Pop of Deadpool - If you're into smaller key-chain PoPs great, unfortunately I am not
4. Deadpool Luggage Tag - cool but not worth the money you're paying for in the box.

rating 1.0. 10 Year box (more like screw the fans box) I can't say enough to express how much I hate the fact that I paid for this crap. Cancelled, and never sub again. I hope they lose every single sub after this "10 Years of Marvel" bs, nothing "10 years" about it.

rating 5.0. Awesome Box, Worth the Money! This box is extremely underrated and so I  think it deserves at least some love. I bought the first ten years box and the Avengers Endgame box and the Pops in both were amazing. I think people are just forgetting that since these pops are 100% exclusive to the boxes they're worth the 30 bucks,  and the extra stuff in the box besides the Pop are a bonus. These boxes are super cool and I would love to see them continue. I just wish it had some more appreciation.

rating 5.0. Great items you can’t get anywhere else I love the Funko Marvel Boxes! Full of stuff I love. Everyone in my family has a subscription! We love Marvel and we are getting new shelves for our collection

rating 5.0. Worth it The venom box was worth it. The variety of product really pays for itself with the pop, shirt, pint size hero, sticker, and stress ball. So much in just this box. Marvel collector corps has always been great to subscribe too

rating 2.0. Not worth subscription or renewal UPDATE: Venom
This box may be worse than the last. The pop is a generic Normall size POP. No premium like you would find in past.

Decal and pocket pop are garbage. Shirt is plane Jane.

I already canceled the subscription after this debacle.

Deadpool: Funko Pop was cool but the whole box was not worth $30, especially when these boxes are suppose to be priced at $30 but have value of $50. If Venom box doesn’t improve I will cancel and never buy again! I don’t blame Amazon but I do Funko. Their Disney boxes at HT are just as bad and cost $33

rating 4.0. Lot of hate on this box but I actually really liked it Lot of hate on this box but I actually really liked it. We all came here for the POP!, which was awesome! Every other item that comes in these boxes should just be considered extras. I actually liked the taco holder as well, maybe that's just because I understand the humor behind it...
rating 5.0. Highly recommended A lot for the money.  It's fun, never know what you will get.

rating 3.0. Better than the deadpool... But not much. The collectors boxes used to be much better from Funko. The Tee shirt is ok but I agree with another reviewer why is it blue and not black and white which would have more in keeping with the theme. They already have said the next box wont have a tee... not really sure if I am going for it I certainly cant whole heartedly recommend these "collectors" item...

rating 2.0. I Thought I’d get a Bigger Better Box for Endgame Much better than the Deadpool box. Weirdly, my favorite thing is the little tiny dorbz of venom. But at least with this box we get an exclusive venom pop figure, whereas the Deadpool box we got a generic pop. I’ll actually use the things in this box.

5/29
You’d think the end of ten years, all these movies leading up to this movie, you’d get more. I like the shirt. I like the Captain America with Mjolnir, the valkyrie seems a bit random. But then they give you two flimsy coasters. Four items and two of them I could be without. So, yeah.

rating 1.0. Big changes. None good. When compared to previous boxes released by Funko directly this one fell way short.

Previously the boxes were well more thought out, and had attention to detail.

1. The art work on the old boxes was always appreciated and caused the box to be an item to keep as well

2. A card use to be included providing some cool information regarding all of the items and the Focus character.

3. Usually a pin, patch, or comic with a unique funko cover art was included.

3. Only 1 item in the box was of excellent value The actual POP and 1 nice to have the jet chain. Unlike previous boxes whereas there were a seveela nice to have items. Vice filler junk.

4. People are stating that this of us who question the changes are wrong like who needs a patch. Well when you’re a collector and vaulue the details those small
Items really do make a diference and create a sense of pride in the membership.

Well that’s long enough. I sure hope the the feedback is well received and that updates are made to bring things back to where they were just a couple months ago. Take care
rating 5.0. Worth it I should have joined this sooner. I only really wanted the pop but the other items in the box are actually pretty cool.

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Cool 'End Credit' box First box I got was Infinity Saga End Credit, and I loved it! 2 cool pops, a nice Shawarma t-shirt (size M fits great to me), one Groot pin and one Thanos sticker

input: rating 5.0. Healthy plants I really have been enjoying the plants I've been getting from Costa farms. This is the first time doing this subscription. I'm very happy. Such cute plants. So well packaged!

rating 5.0. Small, but very nice, plant assortment I received a nice assortment of small plants.
Four little bitty succulents and a small snake plant.

The two care cards were nice. It gives tips on how to water, feed and care for the plants. And had a place to name your plant.

Hopefully in the future a subscription for larger plants will be offered. But until then, I’ll stick with this small plant subscription.
rating 5.0. plants my wife loved it, that's enough for me
rating 5.0. the perfect present they were all alive when I got them and would make perfect presents if you don't know what to get them.
rating 5.0. Beautiful & Healthy These plants arrived healthy & I was surprised by how big the snake plant was. Such a beautiful package.

rating 5.0. Very Nice Plants The plant arrived quickly and they were all in one piece. They were very beautiful and very healthy. My only complaint is the price. Don't get me wrong, I understand that plants as beautifully grown as these can be costly, but i am seeing other subscriptions quite a bit cheaper. I'm trying different subscriptions out right now. Who know's Costa Farms might be the best one in the end. We shall see :) Very satisfied with my Costa Farms plants

rating 4.0. Great flowers Great flowers but 4 are tiny ones . There's no flower name, care just flowers.  If you don't know flowers you'll have Google.  Flowers are just what they say from the farm and BEAUTIFUL.

rating 3.0. Not worth the price I received two little tiny succulents and a larger one ,plus a ratty looking Pothos that's probably going to die.  I love Costa Farms and was pretty excited to see a subscription option but I am really disappointed. I feel like the price is just to high and not worth it.

rating 3.0. Meh Only received 3 succulents instead of 4. No watering cup included for first timers like advertised. Also ordered a plant separately from this box. They shipped both orders together but they gave me the same plant in this box that I already ordered separately. Cool.
rating 5.0. Love it ! Everything arrived safely and packaged well !

rating 5.0. Awesome Customer Service Received my first box. Plants were incredibly healthy and well packed. Zero damage. Did, however, have another issue which was 100% unique to my personal situation. I contacted Costa Farms via the email included with shipment and I gotta tell you: I am floored by the wonderful response. Megan with Customer Service went beyond expectations, so much so that I just ordered 4 additional plants from them. I had previous experience with one other plant I ordered from Costa Farms in early 2020 and it is thriving. So while I cannot comment on long term health/quality of current shipment I can say this company stands behind their product and wants their customers to be happy. Means everything to me when ordering anything online - especially living plants. I’ll never order plants online from another company. Thank you Costa Farms!

rating 4.0. Cute but needs improvements So I am subscribed to the H2O, cactus, and succulent small box. I received 2 H2O plants and one cactus/succulent. So a total of 3 plants but they came in small/medium containers, not super small, maybe 4 to 5 inches in diameter. The box contained the 3 plants, a small blue water cup, a sticker, and some information. The information does not tell you the name of your plants received, therefore I am unsure of the names of the ones I got. It gives general information cards on how to take care of them but on the card it also has a portion on the other side that you can fill out the name and birthday of them. All plants were in good condition after hearing my UPS guy throw the box on my stairs. The one plant with the red outline on the long narrow leaves did have 2 rotting leaves towards the bottom of them. They easily came out of the soil when I touched them. I have not looked at the actual roots of this plant to ensure the whole plant won't be rotted in a couple days but I will later.

Some improvements that they could make to these boxes are actually telling us what plants were recieved and how many plants come in the small box. I read that some get 4 or 5 and I wonder if they are subscribed to a different size box maybe? I think an improvement would also be selecting the lighting for the plants that we would like. I received full sun plants and I was hoping to get some that needed little or medium light, I like to have some plants in my bathroom and bedroom and it's not always light in there, (husband works night shift).
rating 5.0. Great plant subscription kit! I really love my Costa Farms O2 4U sub. box! It has a great variety of plants amd info about them!

rating 5.0. Cute little cacti I just got my first shipment and the plants are cute. They come in little pot with a cute small watering can. There is one that is heart shape that is different and cute. The others are the usual kind and all came in good shape.
rating 5.0. Impressed! I instantly found these little guys a pot! The assortment is great, plants healthy - I even have flowers! Now I’m very excited about my next month!!

rating 2.0. Two duplicates I got two aloes and two of the same succulent in my first box. My neighbors were happy to take my duplicates.
I am canceling after one box. Super disappointed, I was looking forward to plant mail.

rating 5.0. Get the subscription. Very worth it. I've received the order two times. These are what I got (I repotted the ones in the white pot)
These are the most well packaged plants I've ever received.
I forgot about the first package and they survived neglected by me in a box for 6 days!!!! They still came out strong and beautiful.
I forgot the second package for 3 days and they also came out doing great thanks to the careful packaging of this subscription.
Everyone needs a subscription like this. My house smells cleaner and looks great greener! I'm excited to see what they send next 💚

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Absolutely beautiful! I am thrilled with my plants every single month.  I love the surprise and unboxing them.  They're always packaged really well and very easy to unpackage.  I always get a new little watering cup with each delivery as well.  My plants are always in pristine condition, very healthy and I've had zero issues with any of them.  I usually receive my plants within 2-3 days of them shipping.

rating 5.0. Absolutely beautiful! I am thrilled with my plants every single month.  I love the surprise and unboxing them.  They're always packaged really well and very easy to unpackage. rating 5.0. Love first order, it bloomed! I started with Costa farms O2 collection. Loved the selection and they were shipped well and arrived healthy. Joined this subscription from Costa Farms! These were my first cacti. So pleased, it bloomed!!

rating 1.0. Sad set of plants - cancelled my subscription ☹️ The last few years have been the blossoming of our houseplant life and we love it. My husband thought this would be a fun subscription and I ran outside as soon as it was delivered. I was extremely disappointed with what was inside the box. For $27, we got about $6 worth plants and three of them were not doing so well. The succulents were so teeny and their leaves soft. And the ivy was not doing well. The other plant seemed fine. I’m shocked to see what other people got inside their boxes while looking at some of the reviews. I was definitely expecting better quality plants,  bigger plants, and more plants than 4. We didn’t get this. Subscription cancelled.

rating 4.0. Nice plants but… I received 4 plants that were very healthy and wrapped with care. They were also gorgeous. My only real issue is that the plants aren’t labeled. Normally I can recognize them but if you are a novice plant person that can be harder.

The reason this is a problem is now would a new plant parent know how to care for a plant if they don’t even know what type of plant they are getting.

I got a Brasil, parlor palm, and 2 mini succulents.

rating 3.0. Way smaller than I expected I love plants, so this subscription is still something I will keep. Reality is though these plants are tiny and honestly overpriced. The succulents were not in great shape when they arrived. So far, three weeks later all seem to be okay.

rating 3.0. Misleading on quantity! As far as quality goes I always buy my plants from Costa Farms because their plans are always healthy and high quality. However the issue I have with this subscription box, is it very clearly states in the description that you will get one of the bigger plants and then bare minimum of three or four smaller ones. My box I only got three total. One snake plant and two succulents. Which in my opinion for the size of them was a ripoff for $32. They packed it so they knew that they did not even put the bare minimum of plants in there. Description clearly State you will get one of the snaker ferns or one of the bigger ones, and then at least three or four of the smaller succulents or cactuses. I only got two succulents which look the exact same, one is a little bigger than the other and then I got a snake plant. That is a rip-off for the $32 and I was very disappointed that that's all I got. Probably won't continue the subscription box since they don't actually give you what they claim to.
rating 4.0. 1st time buyer, I was surprised at the quali Great way to start your way, into plant growing.
rating 5.0. really great for the price we loved getting plants every month and the plants were always in excellent shape and a good variety!  will definitely subscribe again!!

rating 3.0. Not impressed I have bought many plants from Costa Farms on Amazon, and have always been pleased with them. Until this box arrived! I received three plants for my first box ever. Not impressed at all and one of the plants was broken. I’ll give it one more month to see if it gets any better if not, I will be canceling I want

rating 3.0. What are these? It's beyond my scope of comprehension as to why a nursery wouldn't send something telling us exactly which plants came in the box. Hard to correctly care for something when you don't know what it is.
rating 5.0. Costa Farms High Quality Plants Beautiful If you’re shopping for plants I highly recommend Costa Farms Excellent plants with great follow up support!

rating 5.0. MUST GET!! YOU GUYS! You will NOT be disappointed! These plants are absolutely gorgeous. I got 4 in my first box. I’ve only received one so far but I will be a subscriber for life! Even if I chose to give some away, it’s a win! For the people saying they didn’t get the plant description and care in their boxes, I’m sorry! I got all of the papers detailing the plant and their care which is so incredibly helpful. Only thing I wish that Costa would do is let you choose the amount of light required plants in each box as I’m after a variety. But I am so happy with this sub and you will be too!

rating 5.0. Great customer service It’s a fun subscription for plant lovers! Sure you can go to Lowe’s or Walmart garden section and buy these plants there but it wouldn’t be as fun as getting mystery plant box!
Now , it’s not something I’ll be subscribing to for long time because after awhile too many plants is just too many plants. But it’s fun to try it out.
I always receive 2 bigger plants and 2 succulents . 4 total. I’ve never received more or less. The box comes with directions and some plant information / care sheets. The plants are always very well packaged .
Customer service is great, if any of your plants arrive damaged or dead, just email costa farms directly ( not Amazon) and they will gladly ship a replacement for free.
One of my boxes arrived during snow storm and all plants were frozen dead ( due to delay in delivery for 3 whole days). Costs farms sent me a new box with same plants and second time around they arrived perfectly healthy .
All my plants are doing good to this day.
Highly recommend costa farms plants !
rating 5.0. Beautiful collection! This is a very nice collection of plants, with variety. I even have succulents. It was given to me as a gift.

rating 5.0. Perfect gift…. to myself! What plant lover doesn’t love a plant mystery box 🪴 Kind of forgot I ordered this one night when I couldn’t sleep… so glad for that insomniac night!  As with all  Costa farms plants I’ve purchased, plants arrived well packed (with a heat pack) and beautifully intact.  Loved the “caution cactus” stickers!  So much fun, I’m looking for to my next box!!

rating 4.0. I loved them They came well packaged and healthy looking . The only thing I would change is I would have liked a small sticker or something telling me what they were but thanks to Reddit I boa do know .

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Great Customer service I have now received 2 month of boxes, the first box came in February , plants were beautiful, doing great.  the second box received last week, the fittonia didn't make it, it froze, as it was coming to MN and we had a really cold snap, and there was no heat pack this time.  I contacted Costa farms, and they replied so quick, and said that they would send out a replacement for the plant that didnt make it.  They are so awesome, I just got my delivery, and they sent the whole box to me, this time with a happier fittonia, they are chilly plants, but look so much better.  I am going to keep with this, I love the surprises I get every month, and its nice that they stand by their plants and want you to have happy plants.
other_product_reviews: rating 3.0. cool treats sadly my dog is a big chewer, and even though he is 15 pounds, and this was marked for large dogs, he can consume one of the bully sticks or pigs ears in about 10 minutes.  so as much fun as this subscription was, I had to cancel as it won't last as long as I was hoping for him., and I was nervous giving to a larger dog, as they may try to eat the whole thing in bigger bites.

rating 5.0. fun sub box I  got my first plant, I love it, I really hope I haven't killed it, it showed up on steps when MN was having  a -15 high for the weather.  I let it thaw out and soaked in water as per instructions.  Can't wait for this months plant.  I bought some pretty pebbles to put in the pots.

input: rating 5.0. Finally, elite inner Trekkie t-shirts! Finally!, t-shirts that show our inner Trekkie, that don't have stupid sayings on them, or stuff that everyone else is wearing.

rating 5.0. AWESOME T-SHIRT My husband was so excited with the first Star Trek T-Shirt of the month club.  People stopped him at stores to ask where he got it, and he said "My wife joined me up for the Star Trek T-Shirt of the Month Club.  He's excited like a child!  Thank you D
rating 3.0. Middle of the road The quality of the t shirt used was just ok and the shirt ran on the short side. The screen printing was pretty good.
rating 5.0. First time, enjoying it Just joined this month. I like that if my husband doesn't like the shirt design we can return it for a refund
rating 5.0. One of a kind Great value for a new star trek t-shirt each month!
rating 5.0. Such Fun I started this subscription as a gift for my adult son. He enjoyed the first one. Hopefully they will give a bright spot through out the winter. Less fatten than a food gift.

rating 5.0. Unique Designs Update: the designs are def hit and miss. Finally got a keeper. Hopefully the rest are as unique and error free.
Unique design at least on the first one so keeping it. The best part is that you can return any you don’t like.

rating 2.0. Stained Shirt First shirt I received arrived with multiple stains.  The shirt is white and has what looks like coffee stains or something.  Design is okay.  May try again, but not overly impressed as a first impression.
rating 3.0. Color Don’t like the red color.  As for fit, I’ll have to wait for Christmas, since it’s a gift for my husband.
rating 2.0. Meh First t-shirt was ugly and cheap looking.  If we're not better next month I'm quitting.

rating 2.0. Still think I was expecting something a little more professional looking Well see how this goes.  The first shirt I got was the “Make it Snow” cap Picard shirt.  2nd Shirt was spelled wrong.  This was also is a little week. I admit I was expecting something a little more professional looking.

rating 5.0. What fun it is to receive a surprise Star Trek t-shirt! This was great!  The shirt is good quality and the Star Trek image was seasonal which was a fun (except it would have been better long sleeve) image of Picard saying "Make it SNOW"!  Can wait to see what is next.

rating 1.0. Dont waste your money Its stupid holiday shirt if Capt Picard saying Make it snow..where does it say that these are holiday themed with not funny sayings.
I'm returning it and cancelling.
Not happy.

rating 1.0. The needs of the few The shirt cut was too conservative to be an XL unless one is built like a 22 year old swimmer. Fabric quality was adequate. Spock's image was ok but the "friend" caption is too "kumbayah"
to be worn publicly.
rating 5.0. Great Shirt Everyone I know loves it and wants to join the club

rating 5.0. Trektastic! I like the surprise of not knowing what the shirt will be each month. The first one was super-nerdy and kind of weird, but in spite of the bad grammar, I wear it anyway with pride. Live long and prosper enough to join this tee shirt club!
rating 4.0. Keep it authentic The shirt seems to be of good quality, printing is of good quality but the extra wording below the crew is not authentic STAR TREK, I don’t like that

rating 2.0. T shirt I tell you what.we have been very happy with this Star Trek t shirts however this last one is awful, I mean really with all the ships and people in the show or even a planet you pick a mouse with a tee shirt on it how sad is that.also just got the last shirt with Riker on it with a back hand palm pretty sad that’s when I canceled the shirts
Hope this helps some body
Grant

rating 2.0. I got the same shirt I love startrek, my whole family does but they were disappointed when January's shirts came and they were the same as Decembers.  I really hope that Februaries is different or I will have to cancel.
rating 1.0. Misspelled! I guess I trusted the product, but 4 months later, someone mentioned that shirt is misspelled. And Amazon wants at least one star sellected!

rating 1.0. Size and quality of the shirt Since every shirt is seemingly a different brand so are the sizes. For example if you select an Xtra large depending on the brand that you receive it may be a Large or XX or Med who knows. While its labeled correctly the size basically varies with every shirt. Would not recommend this.

rating 5.0. If you don’t like your first shirt, send it back, don’t cancel just yet. I started this subscription for my husband and my brother in law November 2020.  I have received some really great T-shirts for them.  Since they are both huge Star Trek fans, they have really loved them.  I have also received some really ugly, cheap looking T-Shirts.  Since Amazon’s shipping and return policy does not cost the customer anything, it’s definitely worth the money to belong to the club.  I would recommend that Amazon send us a picture of the next T-Shirt instead of just shipping it out.  I have only returned the white, cheap looking shirts.  I would tell Amazon not to ship the ones I think are ugly IF they showed them to me first.  The majority of the shirts have been really good looking . All things considered, if you are (or you have a loved one who is a huge Star Trek Fan,) join the club, I think you will be very happy.

rating 4.0. nice design Husband loves it!  Some of the reviews concerned me, but what the heck, I went for it.  First shirt is fairly nice quality. The decal on the shirt, Discover Fleet Academy, is unique but a little scratchy looking, but maybe its supposed to look that way.  I hope its doesn't shrink and the decal stays on.  I'll try and wash in cold water, inside out and hang dry to be sure.
rating 5.0. My daughter designed October 2021! What can I say? My beautiful daughter designed the October 2021 shirt.  She grew up in a Star Trek household.  Best shirt ever!

rating 1.0. I do believe we are getting punked It feels like the designers are purposely creating these terrible s-shirts and using AI to determine just how low they can go before Trekkies stop throwing cash at them. Even the shirts with decent graphic attempts, such as the Borg Queen was well done, but will I wear that even to a Star Trek convention? NO! I hung in there after Balok, Prune Juice, and the recent Guide to tribbles. I just can't take it anymore. Unsubscribing.

input:
rating 5.0. An Improvement on the Loot Box concept so far So I wanted to reserve my judgment till we got our second box. I was a fan of collector's corp before, and I wasn't disappointed with the first box through Amazon, but felt there was room for improvements. With the Venom themed box, Im pretty happy, all things I could see myself wanting if I saw it at a normal brick and mortar store. I definitely a move in the right direction. I didn't get the feeling, like they had sent me some overstock they needed to get rid of because no wanted to buy ot. I'll try to remember to add pictures later, I dont want to be the one to spoil it for people who haven't it yet.

Long story short, I was pleased that this box essentially packed as much Venom Funko awesomeness into one box and stayed on theme. So much so I unsubscribed to a few other loot crates, Ive been disappointed with recently to make room in my budget for this one.

If you're a funko and a marvel fan you'll like this crate alot. Just gotta keep in mind you're getting your moneys worth. I've seen complaints here about quality. I'm just surprised people expect several high quality items in a box that costs less than 50 bucks

rating 2.0. Disappointing and little bang for the buck. Look at the example they provide that is allegedly "$50" value:  an exclusive Venom Pop ($12 or generously $15), a Venom-Pop t-shirt ($10-$15), a sticker ($2), a stress ball ($2), and a mini Venom ($1-$2).  If you really like every thing in the box, it's a reasonable value, but a) it's not an exceptional value and b) one probably won't be thrilled with most of the items included.  So unless you enjoy of bi-monthly surprise of getting stuff you wouldn't have bought given the choice, I recommend passing on this.  Spend the money on a Pop figure and a t-shirt you really want, and you'll probably be happier.  Don't worry about the fear of missing out with these boxes.  Unlike the original Marvel Collector Corps boxes that were shipped directly from Funko, you can't count on these Amazon boxes to include anything exceptional.

rating 1.0. What is wrong with u Marvel? You are paying less in corporate taxes than ever before and you give us this cheap crap? Dont reward your fans like this. We have been loyal. Why dont you reward us with a super cool Stan Lee? Show the man some respect. He made Marvel, for christ sake!

rating 1.0. My 2nd, and Last, Collector Corps Box Can't really say how disappointing these boxes are.  The Deadpool box was my first, and the Venom will be my last.  Everything in the Venom box was a disappointment.  The Pop was super underwhelming, the shirt was bad quality and a poor design, I don't even know what the other little figurine was supposed to be, and then a sticker and cheap stress ball.  This was maybe worth $15 bucks at the most.  I won't be sticking around to see if next months' is any better.

rating 1.0. Not worth the money I tried it out for the venom edition. The pop was Just ok.  The shirt  the other stuff just felt like leftover swag. It doesn’t feel special or curated. It just feels like similar stuff thrown in a box.

rating 4.0. Awesome moment, but needs more! I REALLY liked the movie moment pop, but it seems like the other exclusive items are just thrown together. The $50 value is definitely not holding up it's side
rating 3.0. I was expecting more... I was expecting more... this was the first collector corp box from amazon. I am a little disappointed. Lets wait and see the Venom box.

rating 2.0. Underwhelming The Pop! was great, but the other items felt like filler. Who really has been asking for a small decal or stress ball, and how are those premium items? The box barely met its value for me. I'll give it one more shot, but it was very disappointing.
rating 5.0. Makes a great gift! I bought this as a gift for my newphew who LOVEs Deadpool. I am very pleased with the contents...and with my nephew's response to the gift.
rating 1.0. Poor Hi, I did not quite understand.

rating 2.0. Disappointing Launch A significant decline from Funko distribution. Some items were already hit or miss before, but this box feels like a cheap miss.  1 cool big item and 3 trinkets. A comic, patch, or pin would have rounded out the box better. I like that it’s a little cheaper because of Prime, but still not worth $30. Will see how the Venom box turns out before I bail.

rating 1.0. Not worth the $ for a declining subscription box service Subscribed since the Deadpool box. That one got some shaky reviews, but it's was the best one so far (after Amazon took over Funko's subscription), and I did like a majority of the items contained.

The Venom box went downhill; less items and they all felt inferior.

It's hard to imagine that it could get worse, but the First 10 Years box dropped the bar even lower.
The idea of a big Pop! was appreciated (as I do like the one from the Deadpool box) but it feels more like "we don't expect this to sell well, so lets just give it out." If you had mentioned the Movie Moment to me before I had opened the box, I would have laughed. It's hardly one worth commemorating, out of all the other movies in the franchise, and doesn't fulfill the notion of '10 years of marvel.'

No longer have any fear of missing out on any cool future items from these boxes;
just disappointment.
Unsubscribed.
rating 4.0. Ok Good, first one, not what I expected, but hey, it's fun
rating 5.0. The best thing is anticipating and getting stuff you cant buy in storea Good stuff...would definitely gamble on it again.
rating 5.0. Venom Funko box is fantastic!! Love it! Great Pop figure of Venom and definitely love the shirt!! Awesome box!
rating 4.0. Great item could be better Items were ok need to be better pops in this boxes since they are from collectors corp.
rating 4.0. Love it! I can't wait for my daughter to see this box! She's going to love it!

rating 4.0. Worth the price, but it’s not the holy grail I know a lot of reviews are bashing this box, but I loved it.  The box it came was pretty cool, which is a plus. The Deadpool on a unicorn pop? AMAZING! The other three items are a little light, but I’m not mad at them. The pocket pop is cute enough, and while I don’t actively collect them I do enjoy them, so I’m excited for it. The taco holder is adorable, it doesn’t feel like it’s built to last, but it’s still great fun. The luggage tag is a well made Funko Orbz style Deadpool, and it’s super cute, but not very exciting. The best part was that pop, and let’s be real; that’s why we’re all here. I definitely got my thirty dollars worth, even if the pop wasn’t exclusive. I’m going to personally keep up with it’s value on the resale market, just out of curiosity.
rating 1.0. Disappointing considering the hype 1 quality item and 3 small items of poor quality

rating 5.0. Awesome stuff! The Venom Box was great! My son loved all the items, especially the figures and stress ball! I almost wish the t-shirt was black & red, but still cool. All in all, great surprises for this price! I can't wait to see what's in the next box!

rating 2.0. Should have had a better, bigger & more exciting Pop. Just another variant of the many common Venom Pops. This is my first subscription box and I hope the next box is better than this Venom themed one.

The Venom Pop is okay but is not really special enough to be featured in an expensive box that only comes out every 2 months . It's just a regular sized Pop. There are so many Venom Pops (both old and several more recent ones) that look alike. If this box contained a bigger or a more unusual Venom Pop then it would have left more collectors like myself happy.

The Venom t-shirt is barely okay and could be improved in terms of the quality of the material used. Doesn't seem like this t-shirt is going to last a long time. It's a simple design on a cheap t-shirt.

Instead of the stress ball, tiny venom figure & sticker, I would have preferred something more useful...like a key chain, luggage tag, pen, etc.

All in all, the contents of this box isn't worth close to $30 + tax. And at this point, the only way for the Marvel Collector Corps Box is up. I'll continue my subscription until the next box. If it doesn't improve, then I'll be cancelling.

I included pictures of what I received, including out of the box pics taken from different angles, specially for those collectors who keep their Pops in the box. Please hit the button below if they were helpful. Thanks!

rating 2.0. Skimpy on items given the price tag. I disliked it because I think the price they charge for the items you get is terribly lopsided in their favor. It's not all bad, but it is skimpy given they charge $30 or whatever a crate.

I think the Venom crate was the least skewed. So it's not all bad. I also hate that it seems my initial review disappeared here. Since this is an Amazon backed service, it leaves a bad taste in my mouth that my not overly favorable review was removed.

Pretty good on communication, pretty eh on the items delivered. You might love it, but keep your expectations low.

rating 3.0. Please add a clothing item! I have been a long time subscriber of the marvel box. It always included an apparel item, patch and pin on top of the exclusive Funko pop and other collectibles, dependent on the value of the pop item included. I do like what the box included aside from the yellow, plastic chimichanga truck, filler item. I just really expected an apparel piece like a t-shirt. I understand the box is on a new platform and that might not be as profitable as it was for Funko direct. It’s just a big drop from what they boxes had prior

rating 1.0. This box was a disappointment. The box was a waste. The Deadpool pop riding a unicorn is awesome, but I can't make heads or tails why the 3 other items were included. We though the taco holder was for making sand castles at first.

rating 4.0. The pop is pretty cool It shipped in a really small box seems a bit easy to mess these up . But other than tha cool pop shirt could of been of venom and not a stress ball that is kind of lazy even more lazy then looking up an older cool drawing to use instead of the stress ball even the pop itself would of been better shirt art geez easy things u can do to improve

rating 2.0. Not worth it... yet. I came from the DC Legion of Collectors. Nobody has picked up their contract yet, so I decided to give Collector Corps a try. The only thing keeping me from making this a single star is that I know it's not Amazon's fault. They handled the shipping very well, as expected, and it is not their fault the contents of the product were lackluster.  If this next box isn't an extreme improvement, I'll definately be canceling this one.

rating 1.0. The Deadpool Box didn't worth the price. Not sure if this is Amazon fault, because the past boxes (from Funko) were great.

rating 2.0. Save money for Pops you really want Another fail. Of all the “Marvel studios 10” Movie moments recently released, the one they decide to put in our MCC box is Whiplash/ Ironman? They put the one movie moment that would probably have been been passed on if given a choice. Walgreens gets Hulk/Loki, HulkBuster/Hulk. Hot Topic got the amazing Cap/Thanos and MCC gets this one? Wow...what a fail. The rest of the box has 2 Blind Bag Pocket Pops and a Ragnarok Hulk Pez...ugh. Bottom line, you’re better off using the 33$ that it costs to subscribe to these boxes and use it on Funkos you actually want.
rating 5.0. Love FUnko Great for the Geek in our family (or yourself) :)

rating 2.0. Horrible The Deadpool box is absolutely horrible. The box itself isn't nearly as sturdy as previous boxes. The taco holder is a joke. The keychain is meh. rating 1.0. HORRIBLE BOX!! AMAZON FIX IT Just like the majority of the other subscribers here to the collector's box...this was a huge disappointment!! Amazon and Funko you are both better than this. FIX IT! If you don't when the next box ships, I guarantee you sales metrics will show a whole lot of unsubscribing being done. I hope you look at your reviews and are taking notice of the 1 star ratings.

Bottom line: It's supposed to be a collector's box, not a box piece of junk with Deadpool's face on it. Give me $29.99 worth of stuff and not a 1 cent taco holder with a sticker of Deadpool on it. Seriously, make these boxes worth collecting. If you do this right, I'm sure you'll make a ton of margin dollars off the boxes.
rating 1.0. Went from great to lame Was so much better before Amazon... totally not worth it anymore. There is no real value in these boxes anymore.

rating 4.0. DC Legion of Collectors former Subscriber here. I identified as a 51% part DC Fan and as a Marvel fan only 49%. 100%  Comic fan.
