After the announcement of my favorite POP seller (only contested by Hot Topic) was getting the Marvel box did I start paying attention again. Since the DC movies are OK, but the Marvel movies are on another level. And after reviewing the past DC and Marvel boxes and their contents, I realized I should've been with Marvel from the very beginning. I am excited for the box with the Anti- Hero, Venom, to arrive.

rating 1.0. Very Disappointing I received both my Deadpool and Venom boxes with shipping labels on the collector's box. It's just ugly.  Didn't feel worth the price, especially when some items are dollar store quality.  The blue Venom t-shirt looks like someone made poor color judgement when they print them out.  I have a Stitch (Lilo & Stitch) Hangry t-shirt that looks very similar to this one.  I kept telling my husband it looked like Stitch without ears!  Overall, I am cancelling and will just go and buy the t-shirts and/or Pops I like and check the dollar store for the filler crap.

The box isn't worth the money, and definitely not worth the value they said it was.

rating 1.0. Funko needs to step their game up and stop making BS Pops. How Many Stranger Things pops does 1 need The selection...Whiplash and Ironman??! So many others they could of drew from. Not to mention every time THEY receive their CollectorCorps box it always seems to have every item in the box but yet I receive mine and the only thing in the box is the whiplash and iron man 2 pop. I’m giving them one more shot and I hope they bring their A game because it surely seems Funko has been putting out more letdowns than something interesting. seriously Funko “Blink 182” Pops??!! Hopefully they create as many Blink 182 Pops as they did with Deadpool! That’s very thick and straightforward sarcasm. Blink 182, ya gotta be kidding me!!!!!

rating 2.0. Disappointed I was definitely underwhelmed when I opened the Deadpool box.  I was expecting more, based on the fact I used to get GeekFuel mystery boxes for about the same price. I enjoy purchasing mystery boxes but I’m not sure if I will get another through Amazon.

rating 3.0. Not Funko’s best, but it is above average The Deadpool box was enjoyable. The Pop! was awesome! But still, it seemed to be lacking something and only had the minimum amount of items. True, it’s a great value for the subscription but I thought it lacked some sizzle.

rating 4.0. Great! Everything in it was super awesome, but the groot pop came slightly smushed on one side
rating 1.0. terrible quality. no customer help when issue also. terrible. do not recommend this at all. do not waste money. they do not attemt to make sure you even receive this item.

rating 2.0. Great if you collect Pop! figurines It's not a horrible deal. I bought this for my 6 yr old and me. I think I just hyped it up more in my head more. It'd be a really great subscription if I collected the Pop! figurines. However, I dont. I was thinking it'd be more cool Marvel knick knacks (t-shirt, comic book, cool toy, etc.).
rating 5.0. Makes a great gift! I bought this as a gift for my newphew who LOVEs Deadpool. I am very pleased with the contents...and with my nephew's response to the gift.

rating 3.0. Not Funko’s best, but it is above average The Deadpool box was enjoyable. The Pop! was awesome!  But the taco truck taco holder, although clever, was not something I was particularly excited about. The luggage tag is cool, and the keychain was good. But still, it seemed to be lacking something and only had the minimum amount of items. True, it’s a great value for the subscription but I thought it lacked some sizzle.

rating 5.0. Great Product Despite shipping delays, once it shipped it arrived quickly. Box was in great condition! Super cool collectible items or to use it as a gift! Shirt material is soft, both pops were in perfect condition. Can’t wait for the next one!

rating 1.0. Once again, a disappointment I started with Funko Collector Corps when it first began and was not available through Amazon. It started out great, but has steadily declined over the years. This box was among the worst! I was so excited by the idea of Marvel's 10th anniversary, and all the opportunities they had. All the great films to choose from! Instead, I got a scene from one of the (arguably) worst films- Iron Man 2. I also received a golden Hulk Pez dispenser and 2 mini figs (Thanos and Fandral). They are cool, but definitely not worth the price of the crate. I will no longer be subscribing.
rating 1.0. Disappointing considering the hype 1 quality item and 3 small items of poor quality

rating 4.0. Neat, surprise as should be! X-Men is my favorite comic and cartoon so I had to order it, and at the time you don't know what your getting. The surprise is fun with these boxes, can also lead to disappointment but surprise it is

rating 4.0. The pop is pretty cool It shipped in a really small box seems a bit easy to mess these up . But other than tha cool pop shirt could of been of venom and not a stress ball that is kind of lazy even more lazy then looking up an older cool drawing to use instead of the stress ball even the pop itself would of been better shirt art geez easy things u can do to improve

rating 1.0. VERY SAD AND DISAPPOINTED What can I say that hasn't been said already? Surprised at the movie moment they chose. I would have thought that they would have used a more iconic moment, only four items in the box, nothing really 'fun' nor anything that seems to actually commemorate the ten years we've seen in the MCU. I was also one of the people that followed this subscription into Amazon, and really wish they had not changed. Really feel gypped and suckered. I *might* see what the X-Men box will have, but might not even last that long. Sorry Amazon, but you have truly created a dud with taking over this box; and the lack of care to the fans that have purchased this box is truly showing.
rating 1.0. Missing item After coming here I realized mine was missing a key chain

rating 2.0. No longer as good as it was and not really worth the money. I used to look forward to my Marvel boxes when it first came out. Now, it's barely worth the price. No more Marvel Collector Corps pins, patches, or comics... now all I get are one or two Funko Pops, some other trinket and a T-shirt. Highly disappointed in this reincarnation since it was taken over. 😑😕

rating 1.0. Very Disappointed in the Deadpool box. The Deadpool box was advertised as a $50 value. Sure, the Funko was neat, but that plus the taco truck, key chain, and luggage tag together were not worth the $30 cost of the box. I purchased it thinking I would at least get a shirt or a mug, but was left feeling like I way overpaid for what would probably be a $12 Funko otherwise.

rating 2.0. Save money for Pops you really want Another fail. Of all the “Marvel studios 10” Movie moments recently released, the one they decide to put in our MCC box is Whiplash/ Ironman? They put the one movie moment that would probably have been been passed on if given a choice. Walgreens gets Hulk/Loki, HulkBuster/Hulk. Hot Topic got the amazing Cap/Thanos and MCC gets this one? Wow...what a fail. The rest of the box has 2 Blind Bag Pocket Pops and a Ragnarok Hulk Pez...ugh. Bottom line, you’re better off using the 33$ that it costs to subscribe to these boxes and use it on Funkos you actually want.

rating 1.0. Are you all really fans?! Disappointing April 2022 after not getting anything for awhile.

I get a bland Grey Tshirt saying I’m not single I’m saving myself for Thor? (Lame, not even inclusive usage)

Then old levitating Scarlet Witch and Baron Zeno (k the dancing one is cool)

But no love for Moon Knight?!??! Are you all really fans?!

rating 1.0. HORRIBLE BOX!! AMAZON FIX IT Just like the majority of the other subscribers here to the collector's box...this was a huge disappointment!! Amazon and Funko you are both better than this. FIX IT! If you don't when the next box ships, I guarantee you sales metrics will show a whole lot of unsubscribing being done. I hope you look at your reviews and are taking notice of the 1 star ratings.

Bottom line: It's supposed to be a collector's box, not a box piece of junk with Deadpool's face on it. Give me $29.99 worth of stuff and not a 1 cent taco holder with a sticker of Deadpool on it. Seriously, make these boxes worth collecting. If you do this right, I'm sure you'll make a ton of margin dollars off the boxes.

current_product_reviews:
rating 4.0. Reused pops but not bad Marvel Collector corps boxes are hit or miss but this one is pretty nice. I really like the pops but they aren’t much different from the commons. Jane Foster is completely reused just with blue glowing eyes, and Thor has a new helmet as well as blue eyes but not glowing.

The shirt fits fine? I guess, just I’d recommend getting these boxes in a size larger to factor in shrinking out of the dryer.

Comes with a Korg pin and Valkryie sticker. Overall this is a nice box, I would go with an 8/10, blows the Groot one out of the water.
other_product_reviews: rating 2.0. Skip this one Shirt quality is great, Funkos look fine but just nothing about this box screams must have. Going from the Multiverse of Madness box to this one was very disappointing but I’m sure you will love this if you’re a huge groot fan.

rating 5.0. My Chloe loved this box and all the contents!! This was a great Valentine's gift for her.  She is still playing with the toys and she enjoyed the treats.  I never would have thought to try that treat brand or flavor but she wants those over the ones she has always had.  I can't say enough nice things about the box. The toys were her favorite kind, crinkly and small so she can bat them around and chase them.  These were Valentine themed and I couldn't find any like that in stores here locally.

I hope that future boxes will be better.

rating 5.0. Our Cats love freshly ‘catnipped’ new toys!! Good quality toys. Value for money is also very good. Kittens & younger cats would go crazy with most, if not all, these toys. Some are safer (no parts to rip off & swallow) & more sturdy (can last w/rough cat play) than others.

rating 4.0. Cats like 5/5 I love buying this for my kitties. They had a blast and the catnip quality was amazing. The only thing kinda disappointing was it doesn’t connect to their site. Customer service was amazing about it (through meowbox.com) . Oh and another plus some toys were purchased from small vendor! My cats loved the treats too! I would suggest to try a box here and if you love it (like us)subscribe through the vendor!

input: rating 5.0. My kitties excitement is well worth the purchase of this Meowbox. These boxes are cute, and my kitties love them! One of my cats thinks that new toys are all his, so he will plop his parts all over them, lol. But there's enough to share. I order the regular box and my four kitties share well together. And personally, I get a kick out of the themes. They may be a bit silly but whoever makes these cute toys puts a lot of effort and thought into making them cute. I enjoy my kitties excitement every month when their box arrives. That alone makes this well worth it to continue my subscription.

rating 5.0. Try it out, it’s nice! For anyone on the fence, I would recommend getting it. There’s a few reasons why:
1.) The themes are really cute and all the toys are FILLED with catnip. Watching my cat go nuts every time it comes is worth the $23 alone.
2.) you can always cancel. There’s no risk. They even let you skip months if you would like.
The only downside I would say is that when you first order, everyone gets the same starter box. Personally, the starter box is the most boring. It’s an exercise theme and comes with different toys you would find at a gym. This does make it difficult to cancel, as you can’t restart your membership without restarting the whole membership cycle (thus getting the exercise theme again). Because of this, I am giving 4 stars instead of 5.

Looks like same and it is $3 less a month. I hate when you cant get help easily.

rating 4.0. mixed bag I got 2 boxes so far, and the themes were cute (valentine's for Feb and plants for march). My cat went crazy for the treats and one of the premium wool toys, but no interest in the other toys (5 per box). The other toys were all very similar-- small wands or little plushies which my cat will barely even look at. I think they need more tassels, feathers, noise, catnip, etc. to get cats interested. Plus there was an absurd amount of packaging waste from the toys. I'll probably skip a few boxes and get another one eventually.

rating 5.0. LOVE this subscription My cat absolutely adores his meow boxes. I subscribed for bark box for my new pup and felt bad that my cat wasn’t getting any new toys - so I made a subscription for meowbox. I have no regrets with this purchase. I’ve gotten two boxes and absolutely adore the cute little themes they do. The toys are wonderful, I haven’t found one that he didn’t like yet and they’re very well manufactured.

input:
rating 5.0. Try it out, it’s nice! For anyone on the fence, I would recommend getting it. There’s a few reasons why:
1.) The themes are really cute and all the toys are FILLED with catnip. Watching my cat go nuts every time it comes is worth the $23 alone.
2.) you can always cancel. There’s no risk. They even let you skip months if you would like.
The only downside I would say is that when you first order, everyone gets the same starter box. Personally, the starter box is the most boring. It’s an exercise theme and comes with different toys you would find at a gym. This does make it difficult to cancel, as you can’t restart your membership without restarting the whole membership cycle (thus getting the exercise theme again). Because of this, I am giving 4 stars instead of 5.
rating 5.0. Meowbox is a winner My kitties loved everything in this box.

The toys are a hit with my other kitty, especially the catnip mermaid tail that came in the underwater theme box! And of course, the box itself is always a fun toy :D

rating 4.0. Good, but maybe not for every cat Every cat has their own personality this Rings true especially with my own cats. The contents of the box tend to be batting toys and some treats. I had freeze-dried treats each time in my cats do not like freeze-dried but they did enjoy the other treat that was in my last box. As for the toys they occasionally play with batting toys on their own but most frequently they get playful with a toy that is moving. My one real fault for this product is there are no feather toys or any shoestring toys that I can use can I play with my cat and get them interested in play time.

That is not to say the product is bad because it's great and for the right personalities it is a blessing to have so I give it 4 stars to spite my own personal experience is a little less appealing to me because I think it's wonderful to try at least once and I think there are plenty of cats out there that will enjoy the treats that come in here and the toys that they can bat around on their own. Again for me I'll throw one of these toys across the floor and my cat will run to it and stop once it no longer moves

rating 2.0. Definitely overpriced I was very disappointed with the size of the box. I expected a delivery at the door of my apartment, but it was so small that it fit in my mailbox. The toys were fine, mostly catnip stuffed. But definitely overpriced, probably twice what you would pay for the items in a pet store. I canceled after the first box.
rating 5.0. A blast This box was such a treat for the kitty! So much fun!

current_product_reviews:
rating 2.0. Cats didn’t enjoy Neither of my two cats liked any of the 4 toys in the box. They were all big toys, my dog is enjoying them more.
The treats they don’t enjoy either, it’s a lobster and cheese flavor that stinks to high heaven.
Wouldn’t buy again.
other_product_reviews:
rating 3.0. 2 mask cause issues, but rest were good. Bought this for my girlfriend for Christmas and overall it was a hit.
Variety of face mask is nice, and the box and instructions was also nice.
Reason for 3 stars is that 2 of the mask cause skin issues for us. I tried one of them and my face got chemical burned or something, it was red and swollen and you could see the lines of the mask on my face.
Same thing happened to my girlfriend but not as serious.
We are also both sensitive skin, and pale, but this has never happened to me before.

rating 5.0. Best tea I’ve ever had! So fresh. Tea is for the most part the only thing I drink, so my cubbard is packed with brand named teas like Lipton, Twinings, Stash, Bigelow, Tiesta, and tons more and none of them I feel come close to the quality, taste and pureness of Simple Loose Leaf. This is by far the best tea I’ve had before, it’s so fresh and packs so much taste per cup it’s unreal.

The first sampler pack was absolutely delicious and opened my eyes to a few teas I haven’t heard of before, the Genmaicha, which was so unique and refreshing, and the Blue Lady. Their version of the blue lady is my favorite tea I have ever had, period. I bought another lavender earl grey tea at my grocery store since and it was so bitter and harsh comparatively, no comparison.

After my first month that was only $3, I was hooked! I searched up their website and found they offer green, herbal and black tea boxes as well for sale, same as here, $11.99 after shipping. They had a deal, 50% any box subscription so I got green and black for only $6 a piece.
After receiving I was thrilled to received 8 teas that I have never heard of before in my life. I’ve only tried 3 so far, but all have been winners, especially the cranberry orange herbal. I typically HATE herbal but this was incredible and was packed with dried cranberries.

For $11.99, you’re not getting a lot of tea I’m going to be honest, but what you are getting is a nice assortment of high quality tea that you most likely have not heard of before. This is perfect for people like me who is simply bored of the 3-4 choices grocery store shelves provide, and want teas from Africa, India, China, Indonesia and other countries around the world!

I attached a picture of all the teas I’ve received so far, left 4=sampler, middle 4=black box, right 4=green box.

input: rating 5.0. The recipe cards are the absolute BEST Love everything about this subscription!
rating 5.0. Love this! We just got our first “kit” and we love it!  Lot’s of fun planned for Christmas vacation week.  Looking forward to more of these!

rating 5.0. My son loves this subscription After only one box, we are loving this subscription.  The recipes are simple but the food is delicious. The tools are of good quality and are made to last. We are looking forward to our second box.

rating 5.0. Fun gift for the kid who likes to be in the kitchen My son is eager to get started in the kitchen making these recipes. He is 9 years old & enjoys helping out when I am cooking or baking. I’m really enjoying the colorful kid friendly easy to follow recipes. The fun added cooking tools are a huge plus!
rating 4.0. Expensive Nice idea but expensive for what you get, some recipe cards two kitchen gadgets kid size. Granddaughter was disappointed.

rating 2.0. Not worth it I ordered a trial based on so many good things I heard about Raddish  but I was rather disappointed. There’s no way I’d pay regular price for $2 value of tools and three recipe cards. Also we tried to follow a latke recipe and oh my, they were salty. I didn’t pick up on it right away that 2+ tsp of salt for 3 potatoes is overkill. What a way to dampen a kid’s excitement about making a successful dish.

rating 1.0. Not worth it for the quality of tools or recipes. Son was unimpressed. Recommend: No
Value for the money: 1/5
Educational: 1/5
Overall: 1/5

For nearly $30 you get maybe $5 worth of items. The recipes are interesting, but I can buy a whole cookbook of child friendly and interesting recipes for that price, and have money to spare. My son is a huge fan of Gordon Ramsey and was thoroughly unimpressed by this kit, the conversation cards, and the dollar store quality tools.

I have already cancelled this subscription three times and somehow they keep adding me back to the list. I cancelled immediately after submitting for the promotion in December, because I wanted to try it out but didn't want to be roped into a subscription before deciding.

My son is 9 and an excellent little cook and foodie. My son thought this didn't offer anything more than we already have an do at home, and in fact had a lot of negative things to say about the kit overall. I was glad I had already cancelled.

Lo and behold, after Christmas while looking for things to spend a giftcard on, we were subscribed again and I cancelled again.

Today I logged into my account to order a birthday gift for a friend, and saw an order for January in my account! THIS is the third time now I've seen this in my account. I have gotten confirmation each time I've cancelled. I again got confirmation, but this order was placed on the 1st, after being cancelled twice previously, and is now "up to the seller" if they'll cancel. I am calling my bank and reporting thia as a fraudulent charge. I have received multiple cancellation confirmations.

My guess is they know this kit is garbage and has to resort to fraudulent practices to keep selling them.

rating 3.0. Too complicated for young chefs. I love the idea of this. However, the recipes are too complicated for my preference. For an early chef, it’s nice to keep the ingredient list to a minimum. In addition, I have found on more than once occasion that the recipe was wrong and we had to improvise. Again, not a bad learning experience but it was above my child’s cooking level.

rating 2.0. Waste of Money I received two boxes. Absolutely a waste of money. They only provide recipes, a patch for your kid, and a kitchen utensil. This month I received tongs and a recipe book. You can spend $0 by going online and printing kid-friendly recipes.

rating 3.0. High Cost Outweighs the Benefit We recently received the "Swedish Eats" kit.  Included were tongs and a small folder with three recipes, a patch, a craft, and information on Swedish history and traditions.  The recipes included a meat, side, and breakfast bread.  Pros:  Exploration of other cultures, online options for dietary modifications, and recipe cards that can be wiped in case of spills.  Con:  Cost.  The material would be best priced at the $10-$12 per month price range, not $24.

rating 1.0. RIP OFF!!!! Got this for my granddaughter for Christmas. Not impressed. She got her first shipment this week. This is very expensive for a recipe, a whisk and a badge. I think this is a rip off.

rating 3.0. Amazon Orders Don’t Include Apron! This box is actually really cute and has a lot of curriculum towards the theme of the box. That being said, I think they should lower the price $10. $14 would be a really fair price point for this but the current price is outrageous for a box of print outs. I would even be willing to pay that without the included tool, patch and box it comes in. Everything you need is packed into a small envelope in the box and that would be simple to ship. We got tongs in our box this month. They are of nice quality and definitely will be used but in no way were essential to our Swedish themed box or any of the cooking lessons. I would have rather paid a lower price and bought my own tongs. Also, it is not stated except in answered questions but when you buy this box on Amazon, it does not include the apron. Seriously? That apron is where you are supposed to put your included patches each month so at this point, I’m really not too interested in the patches.

I think I’ll try this one more month and cancel if I still don’t think it’s worth it. We do Green Kids and both of the Little Passports boxes which have similar price points but feel like they are priced fairly for what they include. Radish Kids feels like an envelope of print outs that you easily could find curriculum for online or in a kids cook book - although if they lowered their price, I would feel like it was worth the time I saved finding that curriculum.

rating 1.0. Overpriced and Not Good for Young Kids Decided to give this a try because it was only $8.88, and my four year old loves to cook.  The box arrived and I was disappointed even at that price point.  The recipes weren’t good for young kids (raw ground pork?), and while there was some interesting information in the packet, it wasn’t anything you couldn’t find online.  The tongs were okay, and I suppose if we had something to collect the patches on that would be neat?  I cancelled before getting charged full price.

rating 5.0. High quality materials and content. High quality materials and content! I researched many kids subscription boxes before landing on this one, we were not disappointed!

My daughter loves the tools, badges, recipes and activities. We love the quality and it's interesting for both adults and kids!
rating 5.0. Good deal My daughter loved making the dessert recipe.  I like that there were several recipes in one box.

rating 5.0. Look forward to it every month! We love these kits!!  My daughter looks forward to their arrival every month.  The recipes are easy for her to understand,  but very instructional at the same time.  The table talk cards are fun for everyone!

rating 5.0. Perfect for a kid who loves to cook I bought subscription for my 7 yr/old grandson who loves to cook. Whole family enjoying learning about different food from different places. Love the little extra gift. This month all about Valentines and he got measuring spoons.

rating 4.0. Worth it! (Even though I agree it’s overpriced) While it might be a little over priced the information and excitement my kids show is worth it!  Every box comes with recipes (easy enough to find online), but it also includes fun facts about countries, cultures, traditions, geography.  It’s great to have everything be related and educational about more than “here’s a recipe I found online”.  I do wish we could upgrade through our amazon subscription, we may switch to radish directly so we can access the online bonus materials too.  My kids have shown more interest in food and have tried everything so far!  (And my kids are PICKY).

rating 3.0. I'm a fan of the idea but not the execution I purchased the discounted first month of one of these boxes (the February 2020 Cupid's box) to try out. I agree with others that $24 a month is a lot for what you get, but I would be willing to look past this, factoring in not just the items you receive, but the amount of time you'd have to invest in putting something similar together.

However...

In two of the three recipes, we had to make significant adjustments. Not just for taste preference (way too much salt called for in one), but for practical purposes. As an example... the muffin recipe that came with this was the consistency of wallpaper paste 'as is'. Had to add liquid to thin it down enough to be able to add the chocolate chips and raspberries (which would have been a total mess to try to mix in otherwise). So for me, if the recipes can't be used as written, what's the point?

I did agree to give this one more shot, so time will tell.

Also on the negative side... not only do you not receive the apron by going to Amazon route, you don't have a way to create an account on the Raddish Kids site. It just seems like this could have been better thought out.

rating 5.0. Great gift that keeps on giving Super cute gift idea, that keeps on giving! My 8 year old gets so excited to receive her box. She loves the tools. We even bought her an apron to pit her patches on! Shes loves cooking things for her family to try.
THANK YOU RADISH!!

rating 5.0. His enjoyment and excitement. My grandson loves receiving a new package every month and we all enjoy sharing the cooking experience with him.

He is five years old and loves to cook. It’s perfect for his age and his interest.
rating 3.0. Expensive but well thought Its definitely well put together but I feel like the price is very high for one kitchen tool and a few recipes. It just wasn't worth the cost for us.
rating 3.0. Not worth price The items are good but not worth the price

rating 3.0. Not what my daughter wanted brought for my daughter She got the valentine box so She had measuring Spoons that was in heart Shape which she didn't like, I thought It was cute. then she got recipe Cards which contains berries, She's allergic to all berries and there's no where that I can add that on the Subscription. She didnt like it, because it was just recipe cards and spoons. I'll let her get the next box hopefully she change her mind.

rating 2.0. Sneaky Auto Renew I thought I was only signing up for 3 months, but it auto-renewed me WITHOUT notice!! When the fourth and finally fifth box came in the mail I got suspicious and decided to check it out. I was able to cancel my subscription, but should never have been auto-renewed in the first place. And although it's a cool idea to get kids interested in different foods, I'm not sure it's worth the steep price tag.

rating 4.0. its ok... Ages 4 and up is a stretch.. our first box was Japan, my 6 year old helps me cook nearly every night and I thought these would be more kid friendly so he could be in charge and I could be the helper. So far that was disappointing, he got bored halfway through. Will continue for a couple more boxes just in case, but not blown away so far

rating 2.0. Just okay. Covid has caused us to try a lot of new things in our household. Homeschooling and subscription boxes being two of those things. Raddish was really highly recommended by many homeschoolers I know.

The recipes were okay. The patch was okay. The utensils were okay. The playlist and homeschooling plans were... Okay. Are you seeing a pattern?

rating 3.0. You can create your own cooking with your kids and save the money I liked the recipe cards and the grocery list. I didn’t like how the photos of the box show it comes with cooking utensils and yet our first box came with a plastic spoon and fork.
rating 5.0. Cooking Box My niece received the box and was very happy . She is making doughnuts today.

current_product_reviews: rating 4.0. Daughter loves this My daughter absolutely loves this sub. box and looks forward to it every month. The added cost of the kitchen equipment isn't really worth it to us so far as we have better versions of what is being sent but she likes that touch and uses "her" equipment. The recipes are good. The are easy enough to follow and give a solid sense of accomplishment for your kid. That you will enjoy eating it doesn't hurt, either. All in all, the best sub. box I've tried on Amazon.
other_product_reviews: rating 3.0. Good presentation, good finds, way to little for the money I would rather get a less glossy pamphlet about what I'm eating and box they come in and get more snacks/variety. This is a very good production. The snacks are all interesting even if you don't like them all. I've never heard of any of the things sent (though that doesn't say all that much - I'm an idiot) but at the money spent for what you get, it just isn't worth it for very long. +3 stars for quality of treats and materials, -2 for value. Got 2 or three months (don't know if I cancelled before the 3rd month - see the aforementioned idiot comment)

rating 1.0. Had subscription for two months, received the same box twice - complained, never heard from them Ok, so let's get the crappy customer service out of the way - had the subscription for two months. Received the same box twice. Emailed, never heard back from. Have received no credit, Amazon simply puts me in touch with the provider. So there's that.

This is a kitchen chemistry set with a nice coat of paint on it. No different then the ones you could buy in a toy store, except that can give you dozens of experiments per set while this seems to give you two. For about the same price. So there's that. My son thought that each set would add to each other and we waited to see, but as I said, it was literally the same thing twice.

1 star for service. 1 star for product. 1 star for the disappointment

input: rating 3.0. 4-5 tiny toys not the best but ok Box is tiny. Toys are all tiny. Kids loved it though so I guess I’ll give it another go but I don’t think it’s worth $25.
rating 3.0. Don’t waste your money Small toys and expensive for what they are. Cancelled after one month

rating 5.0. Give this box a chance This is a review coming from my child’s reaction. Let it be know that any parent can easily go out and buy any of these items from the store, duh. So please disregard those reviews that just need to say that. Also disregard the parents that review this product based on their opinion, obviously we know you didn’t buy this for yourself Linda. Anywho, my daughter loves the box. They have interesting toys that she immediately recognized from YouTube, I’ve never seen them at the store, but she knew exactly what they were. She loved going out to the mailbox and seeing the yellow box, and she asks me daily when the next box is coming. I’m really happy that this little box is bringing her so much joy, and happiness especially right now in the time we’re in. I have to say this saves me money too, I’m not buying her a toy every time we go to the store, I just remind her she has to wait for her toy box to come, and we’re out the door, free of those $10 toys that add up so fast!
rating 5.0. Lots of current toys. My granddaughter was thrilled with her box. A very good value for the money.
rating 5.0. Awesome, always! Love it always a great surprise and treasure find!
rating 5.0. Great My daughter cant wait for her next box
rating 5.0. Great surprises My grandkids love this and they love getting it every month!

rating 3.0. Just okay My daughter is 3 so she is excited like most kids to receive toys in the mail but after everything is open that is when the fun ends and now I just find the little pieces all over the house and under the couch.

rating 1.0. Not worth it The pics advertised show a few more things in the box then you actually get most show 6-7 and my box only had 4 things in it so not really worth the money I could pick 4 things out and spend as much if not less

rating 5.0. Perfect surprise My daughter has been begging for one of those subscription boxes advertised on commercials but they are all so expensive starting at $40-50 a month!! This box was loaded with little surprise toys and made my 8yr old so happy!! I think there were probably 5-6 little toys in it that were perfect for any little girl!! I thought it was totally worth the price and would make a fun present for any little girl. We will definitely keep this subscription to see what the next months hold!!
rating 2.0. Waste The boy box was more age (4) related than the girl age (7). Cute idea I would say not worth the money
rating 5.0. Nice selection I bought this to use it as stocking stuffers. 50/50 chance of being useful. It’s perfect. Several things my daughter will enjoy.
rating 5.0. Genial Ecxelente 😍 pedi 4. 2 para niña 1 para niño y 1 mixta ..juguetes de muy buena calidad y marcas reconocidas.  Les invito a invertir 25$ en esta cajita no se van a arrepentir .

rating 5.0. Granddaughters loved this! Probably their favorite gift! It was filled with many surprises and delights! They loved every single item and I ordered TWO (1 each for the granddaughters) and both were completely filled with different product - no duplicates!

Needless to say I went with a monthly subscription. Excellent value!

rating 5.0. My Daughter LOVED This! Nana lives far away and wanted to be able to give the kids something regularly so we decided on this box for my daughter. She loved the first one and can't wait for the next one to arrive. Had a ton of cute items she had seen on youtube kids and was pumped to be able to try them. Will have to do an "unboxing" video as she refers to it! LOL

rating 4.0. Collectibles, small toys The biggest toy was a plush hanger, in general they are collectibles of shopkins playmobil, polly pocket, hatchimals. I think for the price is fine, and my dougther love the open this kind of products. I will continue with my subscription.

rating 5.0. Fun. Money well spent! Name brand items. This was a very rewarding subscription box. I have 2 daughters ages 7 and 9. So instead of just letting them open this, I kept it for random gifts, like a long car ride or after getting shots at the doctors office. Everything was name brand, some were items we were unfamiliar with, but most we were. They loved everything! I added up the cost that I felt I would pay in Walmart and felt the cost of the box was cheaper than what retail would have been. I will continue my subscription because it's always nice to have Birthday or special occasion gifts on hand!
rating 4.0. Great idead for kids My niece loved the little surprises in the box.
rating 5.0. Variety My kids has loved every box.
rating 5.0. Very happy! I got this for my grandchildren and they know every toy in the box. They can't wait for the next one to get here.
rating 5.0. Great subscription My daughter loved everything that came in it.
rating 2.0. Not worth it Did it for 2 months and wasn’t worth the monthly price

rating 3.0. Confused Me personally wasn’t too happy with this box they say it’s for kids up to 8 years old but it’s more like 5 years old it had too many things in it for a younger child BUT my 8 year old granddaughter was excited about it and liked it

rating 4.0. Much better second month thank you!!! This is an update because first review i was not impressed. This is my second month. This second month for whatever reason was much better. I did the math and if I wear to buy everything from amazon myself it would cost around $38 an i only paid 25 for the subscribtion so i think sometimes you do save money. Also for the girls box its only great if your kiddo loves dolls. Mine is 3 and absalutly loves small dolls. There perfect for her to hold and play with and store in her purse. She likes big dolls too but thoes are easy to find.

The first box felt really much of a rip off honestly but this month was alot better. We have a clear purse she collects all her figures and dolls in that she gets from these boxes. I spend almost 40 dollars on a jojo siwa subcribtion for my other daughter and she said she wants me to cancel the jojo box so she can get these toy boxes instead. However theres no way to get 2 subscriptions at once so i have to make a whole nother amaZon account just to do it so i would highly suggest them figure out how to make more then one subscribtion for thoes with multiple children.

Over all we love it and its alwayse fun going through it.

Only second box but so far alot of surprise toys. And legos additions wich is always fun

input: rating 5.0. Fun! Sharing with my daughter! Something for both generations!
rating 5.0. Very interesting and pretty colors Super pretty make up.  I bought this for my daughter and she loved it.
rating 5.0. NICE I am really enjoying the mascara on a daily basis since I got it. The other products are very nice too. Going to get it next month :)

rating 2.0. Not ideal to be able to enjoy daily I love the idea. I love the colors. I love the fact that it is vegan... however, I have only found ONE item that I could actually use everyday. I will be cancelling my subscription soon. The wacky colors are fun, but not realistic. The fun should be balanced with products I can use daily. I loved the lavender lipstick, but it’s not everyday wear. I loved the silver lip gloss— but not every day. I will not ever wear
Baby blue mascara. I gave all my surprises to the teenagers in my life. I really want to be a part of this box, but it’s a waste of money for me without items I can use daily :(

rating 2.0. My first box was a bust :( I've never tried them in person but, from what I've seen online, Medusa's Makeup Cosmetics are pretty wicked-cool!  The presentation and the packaging were sublime and the whole thing inspired a sense of anticipation! Then I opened the box. There were 4 full sized deeply pigmented, high quality vegan items.  The dark greyish silver lip lacquer and bright blue mascara were really disappointing though. Frankly, really disappointing.  The gold highlighting powder and the mauve eyeshadow were a bit better but still pretty boring. I think a good amount of people would find that wearing bright blue mascara and grey-black/silver lip gloss on a regular basis to be....unrealistic. (There's a good chance that it's going into my makeup collection and rarely have reason to make an appearance. )  I should take that back and say, for ME, I find "wearing bright blue mascara and grey-black/silver lip gloss on a regular basis to be....unrealistic."  I'm one for trying new things that are outside of my comfort zone.  I don't, however, like that I received a subscription box of highly rated cosmetics and I've given all but one away. I really want to like this makeup so I'll give Medusa's Makeup - Cruelty Free And Vegan Beauty Subscription Box one more try.

rating 4.0. Awesome indie brand makeup box, known for bright colors! I’ve noticed most of the bad reviews for this box on here are people saying this box should be for kids and they weren’t wanting bright and neon makeup colors, well that’s what this brand is known for and they do a great job of it! If you don’t like bright colors and trying new products that are often a bit daring, then this box is NOT for you. However I am 30 years old and I absolutely love the glitters and bright colors often featured in this box, they apply beautifully and can be worn subtly if you know to apply them. I will say their monthly boxes can be hit or miss, so I usually like to see what’s going to be featured in their boxes for the month before I commit to buy through Amazon (which is so easy to do on here compared to through their site). For example their December box was a huge hit for me (pictured), but I just wasn’t feeling their January so I’ll likely pick up again in February. Love that they’re a cruelty free brand and they do have wonderful, innovative products. Definitely would recommend for other makeup obsessed people who aren’t afraid to use bright shades!
rating 3.0. Meh This box is ok.... meh.... don't get a lot..... I have joined every monthly box and this one is like birtchbox

rating 5.0. First box was fun and cute! Just got our first box (I'm sharing with my daughter) and we were really excited about everything included in the box. We haven't used the products just yet, but are looking forward to doing so. She snagged the pretty glitter liquid eyeshadow and I am going to try out the matte liquid lipstick. There was also a cucumber facemask and witch hazel hibiscus facial spray toner. We may need to start getting a separate box for each us so that I can keep all of the products lol.
rating 1.0. Waste of money! Awful colors and products. No refunds so don’t waste your money.
rating 1.0. Makeup box One lipstick is a bright orange! Definitely not my color
rating 5.0. Great Box Loved this makeup box! Enjoyed getting to use new products- of which I got a liquid eyeshadow & a liquid lipstick.

rating 5.0. First box!!! So, cosmetologist here and makeup addict. I’ve tried it all. Luxury to drugstore and I will say being a pink haired babe I am not afraid of color. If you’re a like minded human and love all things neon or Smokey, this is for you! If you’re a neutral lover I wouldn’t recommend.

rating 5.0. Eager to see more Love the concept, enjoyed a few products so far. Some weren’t that great. It’s personal, I didn’t enjoy a color of lipstick, but I can’t and wouldn’t dock any stars for that. Overall looking forward to the next box.

rating 5.0. Can't wait for my next one! I LOVED my first box. I will not use everything, the lipstick was a bright pink that i may gift to someone else but I definitely got my money's worth with everything I will use and love.

rating 5.0. Good stuff I love this box. There's a great variety. I don't understand why someone would be upset that they're getting crazy colors. Go and look at their website before subscribing. Yes, you will get bright and interesting colors. I've gotten several lipsticks, a spray toner, several eye shadows, glitter bath salts, two lip balms, and much more. All great. No plans to unsubscribe any time soon.

rating 3.0. I love that it's vegan, but the colors were sort of out there I was really excited to see a makeup subscription box that was 100% vegan and cruelty free. I received 4 products in mine: a lipstick, a loose glitter, an eyeshadow, and a "tinted" lip balm. The lipstick is gorgeous and I think I can use the eyeshadow, but as a metallic silver, it might be more of a liner color for me. I have no idea what I would use the glitter for. The lip balm is super hydrating and feels good, but it is this mod light yellow shade that reminds me a lot of the concealer lip trend of the naughts. I will probably use the balm at night just to hydrate and not as an actual makeup product.

I absolutely adore the bright pink color of the lipstick, but the other three products are probably not going to get a lot of use. I like the company and looking at their website I do see some things I am interested in trying. Medusa's Makeup is a lot like Urban Decay where their overall aesthetic is edgy, but they have products for everyone. I will probably not do the subscription box again. I tend to wear natural looking makeup with maybe a pop of color in the lipstick or eyeliner, so I don't think this is for me. If you are someone who loves to try out bright, avant guard looks or goes out a lot this subscription box will be a lot of fun for you.

rating 5.0. Great box Received my second sub box from Medusa today. Both boxes I have received thus far have arrived in good condition and a timely manner. The products themselves are very fun. Medusa does sometimes have some rather outlandish colors, but so far for me everything I have received is working out well.
rating 1.0. Clean ingredients but eclectic color selection Great idea (I’m all for vegan products) but horrible colors that cannot be used daily.

rating 4.0. Great Gift Idea For Teenagers My daughter-n-law loved the packaging and the fact the products are vegan. However, the colors were not for a 40yr old.  Luckily she has a preteen daughter who loves lipstick and she was able to give this item to her.  I think as the purchaser I would say it is a fantastic gift idea for younger girls and the price for what you get is very good.  I think it is a personal choice when it comes to color and unfortunately, for my daughter-n-law it missed the mark only because of the color.

I did not get 3, I got a tiny ugly brown eye shadow by wet and wild ( very cheap) and a pink blush .... I am super disappointed I was looking forward to fun  colorful make up

rating 2.0. Make up is eh The make up is okay. I didn’t get anything really good. The brush looked cool but didn’t work too well. I got an ugly shade of lipstick and a bath salt thing that was okay. rating 5.0. subscription Amazing products, I got my first box and it didn’t dissapointed me.
rating 5.0. Cute box I get so happy seeing these packages in the mail. Such a sweet treat

rating 2.0. Not worth it. I bought this as a gift and it came as a Halloween theme, after Halloween. Also it did not come in a cute box as pictured just five items of chunky make up wrapped in bubble wrap all together. Some selection were cheap sample like items. Would return if I could.
rating 1.0. Disappointed Seems really cheap. Not good quality makeup

current_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Great makeup box. Well worth the price. I was very pleased when I opened, my first Medusa's makeup box. Very generous sizes. Great lip colors. The matte lip color stays on all day. Rich pigment. All of the products are great. I can use everything in this box.
other_product_reviews: rating 5.0. Great subscription box. All items in box are lovely. I love this jewelry box. I chose big and chunky. The ring in the little flower box was worth the price of the whole box. All other pieces are gorgeous. Very pleased. Can't wait for my next box.

input: rating 5.0. High quality masks I was a little sus about 7 masks for 19$ but they’re all really high quality sheet masks and most are vegan. I would def reccomend!
rating 5.0. Love it Just got my first month and love it!!
rating 5.0. Face Mask Subscription Box? Yes please! I’m obsessed with this subscription! Really good value for the high end masks that you get. I really look forward to getting this box each month!
rating 5.0. I can't even. So good. So freaking good. I can't word.

rating 2.0. Not Designed for Large/Men’s Faces The holes for mouth, eyes, and sometimes nose are extremely tiny. I have to cut them every time so they fit. I don’t have a giant face, these holes are just shamelessly tiny. From the marketing and text on the packages, I would assume these masks are for the Eastern Asia market. Also, if you have facial hair, the mask won’t stay on there.
Bottom Line: if you have a tiny, smooth face, these are for you. If not, either stay away or be aware.

rating 5.0. Exceeds expectations This set was awesome, and the box it came in was very nicely packaged. The variety in brands and specialties of the mask were very well curated and it's a nice set to add to a collection or someone who wants to get into masking. My only problem with it was I wish it gave the individual prices of each mask and the ability to rebuy a mask if I liked it. Basically where each mask is selling like the link to where that mask is. I should also add that I have sensitive skin and eczema.
rating 5.0. So Fun! My new favorite monthly package.

rating 2.0. Too many "Whitening" masks I might have liked this more if it was more catered to my skin needs/wants. Of the masks I received more than half were whitening which (it's winter in Minnesota, I haven't seen the sun in months, I don't need to be more white right now) isn't desirable and as I think that this is product provided to a wide audience with a wide range of skin types and ethnicity will possibly disappoint many new subscribers. Also I would really love an option to select only masks not tested on animals. Just give us more options, one size does not fit all.
rating 5.0. I love it I love it, specially the variety of mask including with the explanation of each one also is a good remainder for me to continue taking care of my skin. Thanks ;D
rating 1.0. Only got the 4 pack, paid for 7 I signed up for 7 pack and got the 4 pack instead. Feel like this a total bait ns switch! Not worth the price if they only mail 4.

rating 4.0. Great products, need to work on shipping & consistency Love the selection and variety of face masks, and I think it’s a super fair price. However one time my box had broken open during shipment and they sent me a replacement, and most recently I was sent the wrong item (the 4 pack when I subscribe to the 7 pack). Hopefully they get more consistent as they continue to grow.

rating 3.0. 2 mask cause issues, but rest were good. Bought this for my girlfriend for Christmas and overall it was a hit.
Variety of face mask is nice, and the box and instructions was also nice.
Reason for 3 stars is that 2 of the mask cause skin issues for us. I tried one of them and my face got chemical burned or something, it was red and swollen and you could see the lines of the mask on my face.
Same thing happened to my girlfriend but not as serious.
We are also both sensitive skin, and pale, but this has never happened to me before.

rating 2.0. Fun to try out, not necessarily worth the price. I was super excited to try these out because I loooove skincare products, especially facial skin care products. The concept is great! Please note: I DO NOT HAVE SENSITIVE SKIN WHATSOEVER. I used one about once a week. I did not see much difference in my skin at all. And one of the masks, which was supposed to combat acne, actually made me break out pretty bad. And once again, I do not have sensitive skin in the slightest.

Overall, this is a fun product to try out, but if you want more obvious results, I would suggest you look elsewhere.
rating 5.0. Nice assortment of face masks So far I’m loving the variation of face masks in the box.
rating 5.0. Love getting a new box every month! Subscribed for my daughter and she absolutely loves getting this box every month. Great variety of masks and value for money.

rating 5.0. HONESTLY GREAT QUALITY I AM SO IMPRESSED THANKYOU FACETORY!! I never write reviews because honestly who has time for that but I am loving these masks! The boxes are so well curated and thought out and  the masks are seriously amazing. If you feel like treating yourself then this is an excellent way to do it. I only wish there were more masks because they are so so good! I will stay subscribed!

rating 5.0. Every month is a pleasant suprise I like the 7 Lux variety and every month wait impatiently for new box delivered to my doorstep. The reason for this review is to comment on high professionalism of the customer service. This month I received the wrong set - 4 masks instead of 7 (you know, we are all humans). I wrote email to FaceTory about mistake and they responded very fast. And my problem was resolved very fast - I have received my 7 set box and was permitted to keep a 4 masks set. Thank you, FaceTory!
I had also opportunity to compare 4 masks and 7 masks options. 4 masks set is more basic, probably you can find something similar in shopping centers, but it will be legwork and time spending. Mailing to you is much more convenient, in addition the type of masks depends on season - in winter we need a little bit different masks than in summer (this is true for both sets). But 7 masks set have always couple of very unique and unusual masks that you will not find similar in our stores!

I will definitely will continue with 7 Lux set.
rating 5.0. Great Korean sheet masks subscription I love sheet masks and this subscription is great
rating 5.0. Sheet mask box! This is a fun box of face masks! Definitely worth the price!

rating 5.0. Very high quality I am very happy with the quality of the mask that I received. I checked the ingredients and they were really good and also the good ingredients placed really high on the ingredient lists. It came with 7 mask and also 2 bonus gifts. One gift was a hand and nail serum and the other was a face sleeping mask cream. This was really nicely packaged and came with an instruction booklet that was in English which is handy.
rating 1.0. Yuck Snail Mask? I’m vegan. Gross
rating 5.0. Best masks so affordable Love this subscription of face masks. Awesome deal and always have little gifts on hand.

current_product_reviews: rating 4.0. Good value, though I'm not a fan of sheet masks :) Unlike a lot of subscription boxes I've tried, I thought this one was a good value (especially at the discounted introductory price). I'd never been much of a fan of sheet masks (they don't fit my face, and seem wasteful in terms of packaging), but since they're all the rage lately I thought I'd give it another try. Nope, still not for me, but I would still recommend this box for those of you who are fans of sheet masks.
other_product_reviews: rating 2.0. Meh, not a great value My first box didn't feel like a great value at all. The largest item in the box was a bottle of aloe vera gel - this is something you can get anywhere, for like $2. Other items were also nothing special, like blotting papers and some weird cooling spray.  Not excited about any of the items, and doesn't feel like much of a "deal".
rating 1.0. Not worth $15 My first box only contained a few sample-sized products (face wash, retinol serum, etc). Wasn't a good value at all for $15, even compared to competitive boxes. Canceled.
